identifiers.\\\\n68:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n69:    * These identifiers refer to the reference legal entities of the CDS index.\\\\n70:    */\\\\n71:   @PropertyDefinition(validate = \\\\\\\"notNull\\\\\\\")\\\\n72:   private final ImmutableList\\\\u003cStandardId\\\\u003e legalEntityIds;\\\\n73:   /**\\\\n74:    * The periodic payments based on the fixed rate.\\\\n75:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n76:    * Each payment period represents part of the life-time of the leg.\\\\n77:    * In most cases, the periods do not overlap. However, since each payment period\\\\n78:    * is essentially independent the data model allows overlapping periods.\\\\n79:    */\\\\n80:   @PropertyDefinition(validate = \\\\\\\"notEmpty\\\\\\\")\\\\n81:   private final ImmutableList\\\\u003cCreditCouponPaymentPeriod\\\\u003e paymentPeriods;\\\\n82:   /**\\\\n83:    * The protection end date.\\\\n84:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n85:    * This may be different from the accrual end date of the last payment period in {@code periodicPayments}.\\\\n86:    */\\\\n87:   @PropertyDefinition(validate = \\\\\\\"notNull\\\\\\\")\\\\n88:   private final LocalDate protectionEndDate;\\\\n89:   /**\\\\n90:    * The day count convention.\\\\n91:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n92:    * This is used to convert dates to a numerical value.\\\\n93:    */\\\\n94:   @PropertyDefinition(validate = \\\\\\\"notNull\\\\\\\")\\\\n95:   private final DayCount dayCount;\\\\n96:   /**\\\\n97:    * The payment on default.\\\\n98:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n99:    * Whether the accrued premium is paid in the event of a default.\\\\n100:    */\\\\n101:   @PropertyDefinition(validate = \\\\\\\"notNull\\\\\\\")\\\\n102:   private final PaymentOnDefault paymentOnDefault;\\\\n103:   /**\\\\n104:    * The protection start of the day.\\\\n105:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n106:    * When the protection starts on the start date.\\\\n107:    */\\\\n108:   @PropertyDefinition(validate = \\\\\\\"notNull\\\\\\\")\\\\n109:   private final ProtectionStartOfDay protectionStart;\\\\n110:   /**\\\\n111:    * The number of days between valuation date and step-in date.\\\\n112:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n113:    * The step-in date is also called protection effective date. \\\\n114:    * It is usually 1 calendar day for standardized CDS index contracts. \\\\n115:    */\\\\n116:   @PropertyDefinition(validate = \\\\\\\"notNull\\\\\\\")\\\\n117:   private final DaysAdjustment stepinDateOffset;\\\\n118:   /**\\\\n119:    * The number of days between valuation date and settlement date.\\\\n120:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n121:    * It is usually 3 business days for standardized CDS index contracts.\\\\n122:    */\\\\n123:   @PropertyDefinition(validate = \\\\\\\"notNull\\\\\\\")\\\\n124:   private final DaysAdjustment settlementDateOffset;\\\\n125: \\\\n126:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\n127:   /**\\\\n128:    * Obtains the accrual start date.\\\\n129:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n130:    * In general this is different from the protection start date. \\\\n131:    * Use {@code stepinDateOffset} to compute the protection start date.\\\\n132:    * \\\\n133:    * @return the accrual start date\\\\n134:    */\\\\n135:   public LocalDate getAccrualStartDate() {\\\\n136:     return paymentPeriods.get(0).getStartDate();\\\\n137:   }\\\\n138: \\\\n139:   /**\\\\n140:    * Obtains the accrual end date.\\\\n141:    * \\\\n142:    * @return the accrual end date\\\\n143:    */\\\\n144:   public LocalDate getAccrualEndDate() {\\\\n145:     return paymentPeriods.get(paymentPeriods.size() - 1).getEndDate();\\\\n146:   }\\\\n147: \\\\n148:   /**\\\\n149:    * Obtains the notional.\\\\n150:    * \\\\n151:    * @return the notional\\\\n152:    */\\\\n153:   public double getNotional() {\\\\n154:     return paymentPeriods.get(0).getNotional();\\\\n155:   }\\\\n156: \\\\n157:   /**\\\\n158:    * Obtains the currency.\\\\n159:    * \\\\n160:    * @return the currency\\\\n161:    */\\\\n162:   public Currency getCurrency() {\\\\n163:     return paymentPeriods.get(0).getCurrency();\\\\n164:   }\\\\n165: \\\\n166:   /**\\\\n167:    * Obtains the fixed coupon rate.\\\\n168:    * \\\\n169:    * @return the fixed rate\\\\n170:    */\\\\n171:   public double getFixedRate() {\\\\n172:     return paymentPeriods.get(0).getFixedRate();\\\\n173:   }\\\\n174: \\\\n175:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\n176:   /**\\\\n177:    * Obtains the effective start date from the step-in date. \\\\n178:    * \\\\n179:    * @param stepinDate  the step-in date\\\\n180:    * @return the effective start date\\\\n181:    */\\\\n182:   public LocalDate calculateEffectiveStartDate(LocalDate stepinDate) {\\\\n183:     LocalDate startDate = stepinDate.isAfter(getAccrualStartDate()) ? stepinDate : getAccrualStartDate();\\\\n184:     return protectionStart.isBeginning() ? startDate.minusDays(1) : startDate;\\\\n185:   }\\\\n186: \\\\n187:   /**\\\\n188:    * Calculates the settlement date from the valuation date.\\\\n189:    * \\\\n190:    * @param valuationDate  the valuation date\\\\n191:    * @param refData  the reference data to use\\\\n192:    * @return the settlement date\\\\n193:    */\\\\n194:   public LocalDate calculateSettlementDateFromValuation(LocalDate valuationDate, ReferenceData refData) {\\\\n195:     return settlementDateOffset.adjust(valuationDate, refData);\\\\n196:   }\\\\n197: \\\\n198:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\n199:   /**\\\\n200:    * Finds the period that contains the specified date.\\\\n201:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n202:    * The search is performed using unadjusted dates.\\\\n203:    * \\\\n204:    * @param date  the date to find the period for\\\\n205:    * @return the period, empty if not found\\\\n206:    * @throws IllegalArgumentException if more than one period matches\\\\n207:    */\\\\n208:   public Optional\\\\u003cCreditCouponPaymentPeriod\\\\u003e findPeriod(LocalDate date) {\\\\n209:     return paymentPeriods.stream()\\\\n210:         .filter(p -\\\\u003e p.contains(date))\\\\n211:         .reduce(ensureOnlyOne());\\\\n212:   }\\\\n213: \\\\n214:   /**\\\\n215:    * Calculates the accrued premium per fractional spread for unit notional.\\\\n216:    * \\\\n217:    * @param stepinDate  the step-in date\\\\n218:    * @return the accrued year fraction\\\\n219:    */\\\\n220:   public double accruedYearFraction(LocalDate stepinDate) {\\\\n221:     if (stepinDate.isBefore(getAccrualStartDate())) {\\\\n222:       return 0d;\\\\n223:     }\\\\n224:     if (stepinDate.isEqual(getAccrualEndDate())) {\\\\n225:       return paymentPeriods.get(paymentPeriods.size() - 1).getYearFraction();\\\\n226:     }\\\\n227:     CreditCouponPaymentPeriod period = findPeriod(stepinDate)\\\\n228:         .orElseThrow(() -\\\\u003e new IllegalArgumentException(\\\\\\\"Date outside range\\\\\\\"));\\\\n229:     return dayCount.relativeYearFraction(period.getStartDate(), stepinDate);\\\\n230:   }\\\\n231: \\\\n232:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\n233:   /**\\\\n234:    * Reduce this instance to {@code ResolvedCds}.\\\\n235:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n236:    * product\\\\n240:    */\\\\n241:   public ResolvedCds toSingleNameCds() {\\\\n242:     return ResolvedCds.builder()\\\\n243:         .buySell(getBuySell())\\\\n244: //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\n876:     /**\\\\n877:      * Sets whether the CDS index is buy or sell.\\\\n878:      * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n879:      * A value of 'Buy' implies buying protection, where the fixed coupon is paid\\\\n880:      * and the protection is received  in the event of default.\\\\n881:      * A value of 'Sell' implies selling for standardized CDS index contracts.\\\\n1023:      * @param settlementDateOffset  the new value, not null\\\\n1024:      * @return this, for chaining, not null\\\\n1025:      */\\\\n1026:     public this.settlementDateOffset = settlementDateOffset;\\\\n1029:       return this;\\\\n1030:     }\\\\n1031: \\\\n1032: \\\",\\\"url\\\":\\\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/Strata--66225ca9@9d9ab49ce264443ddb305a8b1df6f48d01a2c67c/-/blob/modules/product/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/product/credit/ResolvedCdsIndex.java\\\"}\", \"annotations\": null, \"meta\": null}], \"structuredContent\": {\"content\": \"1: /*\\n2:  * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\\n3:  *\\n4:  * Please see distribution for license.\\n5:  */\\n6: package com.opengamma.strata.product.credit;\\n7: \\n8: import static com.opengamma.strata.collect.Guavate.ensureOnlyOne;\\n9: \\n10: import java.io.Serializable;\\n11: import java.time.LocalDate;\\n12: import java.util.List;\\n13: import java.util.Map;\\n14: import java.util.NoSuchElementException;\\n15: import java.util.Optional;\\n16: \\n17: import org.joda.beans.Bean;\\n18: import org.joda.beans.ImmutableBean;\\n19: import org.joda.beans.JodaBeanUtils;\\n20: import org.joda.beans.MetaBean;\\n21: import org.joda.beans.MetaProperty;\\n22: import org.joda.beans.gen.BeanDefinition;\\n23: import org.joda.beans.gen.PropertyDefinition;\\n24: import org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectFieldsBeanBuilder;\\n25: import org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaBean;\\n26: import org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaProperty;\\n27: import org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaPropertyMap;\\n28: \\n29: import com.google.common.collect.ImmutableList;\\n30: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData;\\n31: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.StandardId;\\n32: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Currency;\\n33: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.date.DayCount;\\n34: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.date.DaysAdjustment;\\n35: import com.opengamma.strata.product.ResolvedProduct;\\n36: import com.opengamma.strata.product.common.BuySell;\\n37: \\n38: /**\\n39:  * A CDS (portfolio) index, resolved for pricing.\\n40:  * <p>\\n41:  * This is the resolved form of {@link CdsIndex} and is an input to the pricers.\\n42:  * Applications will typically create a {@code ResolvedCdsIndex} from a {@code CdsIndex}\\n43:  * using {@link CdsIndex#resolve(ReferenceData)}.\\n44:  */\\n45: @BeanDefinition\\n46: public final class ResolvedCdsIndex\\n47:     implements ResolvedProduct, ImmutableBean, Serializable {\\n48: \\n49:   /**\\n50:    * Whether the CDS index is buy or sell.\\n51:    * <p>\\n52:    * A value of 'Buy' implies buying protection, where the fixed coupon is paid\\n53:    * and the protection is received  in the event of default.\\n54:    * A value of 'Sell' implies selling protection, where the fixed coupon is received\\n55:    * and the protection is paid in the event of default.\\n56:    */\\n57:   @PropertyDefinition(validate = \\\"notNull\\\")\\n58:   private final BuySell buySell;\\n59:   /**\\n60:    * The CDS index identifier.\\n61:    * <p>\\n62:    * This identifier is used to refer this CDS index product.\\n63:    */\\n64:   @PropertyDefinition(validate = \\\"notNull\\\")\\n65:   private final StandardId cdsIndexId;\\n66:   /**\\n67:    * The legal entity identifiers.\\n68:    * <p>\\n69:    * These identifiers refer to the reference legal entities of the CDS index.\\n70:    */\\n71:   @PropertyDefinition(validate = \\\"notNull\\\")\\n72:   private final ImmutableList<StandardId> legalEntityIds;\\n73:   /**\\n74:    * The periodic payments based on the fixed rate.\\n75:    * <p>\\n76:    * Each payment period represents part of the life-time of the leg.\\n77:    * In most cases, the periods do not overlap. However, since each payment period\\n78:    * is essentially independent the data model allows overlapping periods.\\n79:    */\\n80:   @PropertyDefinition(validate = \\\"notEmpty\\\")\\n81:   private final ImmutableList<CreditCouponPaymentPeriod> paymentPeriods;\\n82:   /**\\n83:    * The protection end date.\\n84:    * <p>\\n85:    * This may be different from the accrual end date of the last payment period in {@code periodicPayments}.\\n86:    */\\n87:   @PropertyDefinition(validate = \\\"notNull\\\")\\n88:   private final LocalDate protectionEndDate;\\n89:   /**\\n90:    * The day count convention.\\n91:    * <p>\\n92:    * This is used to convert dates to a numerical value.\\n93:    */\\n94:   @PropertyDefinition(validate = \\\"notNull\\\")\\n95:   private final DayCount dayCount;\\n96:   /**\\n97:    * The payment on default.\\n98:    * <p>\\n99:    * Whether the accrued premium is paid in the event of a default.\\n100:    */\\n101:   @PropertyDefinition(validate = \\\"notNull\\\")\\n102:   private final PaymentOnDefault paymentOnDefault;\\n103:   /**\\n104:    * The protection start of the day.\\n105:    * <p>\\n106:    * When the protection starts on the start date.\\n107:    */\\n108:   @PropertyDefinition(validate = \\\"notNull\\\")\\n109:   private final ProtectionStartOfDay protectionStart;\\n110:   /**\\n111:    * The number of days between valuation date and step-in date.\\n112:    * <p>\\n113:    * The step-in date is also called protection effective date. \\n114:    * It is usually 1 calendar day for standardized CDS index contracts. \\n115:    */\\n116:   @PropertyDefinition(validate = \\\"notNull\\\")\\n117:   private final DaysAdjustment stepinDateOffset;\\n118:   /**\\n119:    * The number of days between valuation date and settlement date.\\n120:    * <p>\\n121:    * It is usually 3 business days for standardized CDS index contracts.\\n122:    */\\n123:   @PropertyDefinition(validate = \\\"notNull\\\")\\n124:   private final DaysAdjustment settlementDateOffset;\\n125: \\n126:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n127:   /**\\n128:    * Obtains the accrual start date.\\n129:    * <p>\\n130:    * In general this is different from the protection start date. \\n131:    * Use {@code stepinDateOffset} to compute the protection start date.\\n132:    * \\n133:    * @return the accrual start date\\n134:    */\\n135:   public LocalDate getAccrualStartDate() {\\n136:     return paymentPeriods.get(0).getStartDate();\\n137:   }\\n138: \\n139:   /**\\n140:    * Obtains the accrual end date.\\n141:    * \\n142:    * @return the accrual end date\\n143:    */\\n144:   public LocalDate getAccrualEndDate() {\\n145:     return paymentPeriods.get(paymentPeriods.size() - 1).getEndDate();\\n146:   }\\n147: \\n148:   /**\\n149:    * Obtains the notional.\\n150:    * \\n151:    * @return the notional\\n152:    */\\n153:   public double getNotional() {\\n154:     return paymentPeriods.get(0).getNotional();\\n155:   }\\n156: \\n157:   /**\\n158:    * Obtains the currency.\\n159:    * \\n160:    * @return the currency\\n161:    */\\n162:   public Currency getCurrency() {\\n163:     return paymentPeriods.get(0).getCurrency();\\n164:   }\\n165: \\n166:   /**\\n167:    * Obtains the fixed coupon rate.\\n168:    * \\n169:    * @return the fixed rate\\n170:    */\\n171:   public double getFixedRate() {\\n172:     return paymentPeriods.get(0).getFixedRate();\\n173:   }\\n174: \\n175:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n176:   /**\\n177:    * Obtains the effective start date from the step-in date. \\n178:    * \\n179:    * @param stepinDate  the step-in date\\n180:    * @return the effective start date\\n181:    */\\n182:   public LocalDate calculateEffectiveStartDate(LocalDate stepinDate) {\\n183:     LocalDate startDate = stepinDate.isAfter(getAccrualStartDate()) ? stepinDate : getAccrualStartDate();\\n184:     return protectionStart.isBeginning() ? startDate.minusDays(1) : startDate;\\n185:   }\\n186: \\n187:   /**\\n188:    * Calculates the settlement date from the valuation date.\\n189:    * \\n190:    * @param valuationDate  the valuation date\\n191:    * @param refData  the reference data to use\\n192:    * @return the settlement date\\n193:    */\\n194:   public LocalDate calculateSettlementDateFromValuation(LocalDate valuationDate, ReferenceData refData) {\\n195:     return settlementDateOffset.adjust(valuationDate, refData);\\n196:   }\\n197: \\n198:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n199:   /**\\n200:    * Finds the period that contains the specified date.\\n201:    * <p>\\n202:    * The search is performed using unadjusted dates.\\n203:    * \\n204:    * @param date  the date to find the period for\\n205:    * @return the period, empty if not found\\n206:    * @throws IllegalArgumentException if more than one period matches\\n207:    */\\n208:   public Optional<CreditCouponPaymentPeriod> findPeriod(LocalDate date) {\\n209:     return paymentPeriods.stream()\\n210:         .filter(p -> p.contains(date))\\n211:         .reduce(ensureOnlyOne());\\n212:   }\\n213: \\n214:   /**\\n215:    * Calculates the accrued premium per fractional spread for unit notional.\\n216:    * \\n217:    * @param stepinDate  the step-in date\\n218:    * @return the accrued year fraction\\n219:    */\\n220:   public double accruedYearFraction(LocalDate stepinDate) {\\n221:     if (stepinDate.isBefore(getAccrualStartDate())) {\\n222:       return 0d;\\n223:     }\\n224:     if (stepinDate.isEqual(getAccrualEndDate())) {\\n225:       return paymentPeriods.get(paymentPeriods.size() - 1).getYearFraction();\\n226:     }\\n227:     CreditCouponPaymentPeriod period = findPeriod(stepinDate)\\n228:         .orElseThrow(() -> new IllegalArgumentException(\\\"Date outside range\\\"));\\n229:     return dayCount.relativeYearFraction(period.getStartDate(), stepinDate);\\n230:   }\\n231: \\n232:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n233:   /**\\n234:    * Reduce this instance to {@code ResolvedCds}.\\n235:    * <p>\\n236:    * The resultant object is used for pricing CDS index products under the homogeneous pool assumption on constituent  \\n237:    * credit curves. \\n238:    * \\n239:    * @return the CDS product\\n240:    */\\n241:   public ResolvedCds toSingleNameCds() {\\n242:     return ResolvedCds.builder()\\n243:         .buySell(getBuySell())\\n244:         .dayCount(getDayCount())\\n245:         .legalEntityId(getCdsIndexId())\\n246:         .paymentOnDefault(getPaymentOnDefault())\\n247:         .paymentPeriods(getPaymentPeriods())\\n248:         .protectionEndDate(getProtectionEndDate())\\n249:         .protectionStart(getProtectionStart())\\n250:         .stepinDateOffset(getStepinDateOffset())\\n251:         .settlementDateOffset(getSettlementDateOffset())\\n252:         .build();\\n253:   }\\n254: \\n255:   //------------------------- AUTOGENERATED START -------------------------\\n256:   /**\\n257:    * The meta-bean for {@code ResolvedCdsIndex}.\\n258:    * @return the meta-bean, not null\\n259:    */\\n260:   public static ResolvedCdsIndex.Meta meta() {\\n261:     return ResolvedCdsIndex.Meta.INSTANCE;\\n262:   }\\n263: \\n264:   static {\\n265:     MetaBean.register(ResolvedCdsIndex.Meta.INSTANCE);\\n266:   }\\n267: \\n268:   /**\\n269:    * The serialization version id.\\n270:    */\\n271:   private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\\n272: \\n273:   /**\\n274:    * Returns a builder used to create an instance of the bean.\\n275:    * @return the builder, not null\\n276:    */\\n277:   public static ResolvedCdsIndex.Builder builder() {\\n278:     return new ResolvedCdsIndex.Builder();\\n279:   }\\n280: \\n281:   private ResolvedCdsIndex(\\n282:       BuySell buySell,\\n283:       StandardId cdsIndexId,\\n284:       List<StandardId> legalEntityIds,\\n285:       List<CreditCouponPaymentPeriod> paymentPeriods,\\n286:       LocalDate protectionEndDate,\\n287:       DayCount dayCount,\\n288:       PaymentOnDefault paymentOnDefault,\\n289:       ProtectionStartOfDay protectionStart,\\n290:       DaysAdjustment stepinDateOffset,\\n291:       DaysAdjustment settlementDateOffset) {\\n292:     JodaBeanUtils.notNull(buySell, \\\"buySell\\\");\\n293:     JodaBeanUtils.notNull(cdsIndexId, \\\"cdsIndexId\\\");\\n294:     JodaBeanUtils.notNull(legalEntityIds, \\\"legalEntityIds\\\");\\n295:     JodaBeanUtils.notEmpty(paymentPeriods, \\\"paymentPeriods\\\");\\n296:     JodaBeanUtils.notNull(protectionEndDate, \\\"protectionEndDate\\\");\\n297:     JodaBeanUtils.notNull(dayCount, \\\"dayCount\\\");\\n298:     JodaBeanUtils.notNull(paymentOnDefault, \\\"paymentOnDefault\\\");\\n299:     JodaBeanUtils.notNull(protectionStart, \\\"protectionStart\\\");\\n300:     JodaBeanUtils.notNull(stepinDateOffset, \\\"stepinDateOffset\\\");\\n301:     JodaBeanUtils.notNull(settlementDateOffset, \\\"settlementDateOffset\\\");\\n302:     this.buySell = buySell;\\n303:     this.cdsIndexId = cdsIndexId;\\n304:     this.legalEntityIds = ImmutableList.copyOf(legalEntityIds);\\n305:     this.paymentPeriods = ImmutableList.copyOf(paymentPeriods);\\n306:     this.protectionEndDate = protectionEndDate;\\n307:     this.dayCount = dayCount;\\n308:     this.paymentOnDefault = paymentOnDefault;\\n309:     this.protectionStart = protectionStart;\\n310:     this.stepinDateOffset = stepinDateOffset;\\n311:     this.settlementDateOffset = settlementDateOffset;\\n312:   }\\n313: \\n314:   @Override\\n315:   public ResolvedCdsIndex.Meta metaBean() {\\n316:     return ResolvedCdsIndex.Meta.INSTANCE;\\n317:   }\\n318: \\n319:   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\\n320:   /**\\n321:    * Gets whether the CDS index is buy or sell.\\n322:    * <p>\\n323:    * A value of 'Buy' implies buying protection, where the fixed coupon is paid\\n324:    * and the protection is received  in the event of default.\\n325:    * A value of 'Sell' implies selling protection, where the fixed coupon is received\\n326:    * and the protection is paid in the event of default.\\n327:    * @return the value of the property, not null\\n328:    */\\n329:   public BuySell getBuySell() {\\n330:     return buySell;\\n331:   }\\n332: \\n333:   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\\n334:   /**\\n335:    * Gets the CDS index identifier.\\n336:    * <p>\\n337:    * This identifier is used to refer this CDS index product.\\n338:    * @return the value of the property, not null\\n339:    */\\n340:   public StandardId getCdsIndexId() {\\n341:     return cdsIndexId;\\n342:   }\\n343: \\n344:   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\\n345:   /**\\n346:    * Gets the legal entity identifiers.\\n347:    * <p>\\n348:    * These identifiers refer to the reference legal entities of the CDS index.\\n349:    * @return the value of the property, not null\\n350:    */\\n351:   public ImmutableList<StandardId> getLegalEntityIds() {\\n352:     return legalEntityIds;\\n353:   }\\n354: \\n355:   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\\n356:   /**\\n357:    * Gets the periodic payments based on the fixed rate.\\n358:    * <p>\\n359:    * Each payment period represents part of the life-time of the leg.\\n360:    * In most cases, the periods do not overlap. However, since each payment period\\n361:    * is essentially independent the data model allows overlapping periods.\\n362:    * @return the value of the property, not empty\\n363:    */\\n364:   public ImmutableList<CreditCouponPaymentPeriod> getPaymentPeriods() {\\n365:     return paymentPeriods;\\n366:   }\\n367: \\n368:   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\\n369:   /**\\n370:    * Gets the protection end date.\\n371:    * <p>\\n372:    * This may be different from the accrual end date of the last payment period in {@code periodicPayments}.\\n373:    * @return the value of the property, not null\\n374:    */\\n375:   public LocalDate getProtectionEndDate() {\\n376:     return protectionEndDate;\\n377:   }\\n378: \\n379:   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\\n380:   /**\\n381:    * Gets the day count convention.\\n382:    * <p>\\n383:    * This is used to convert dates to a numerical value.\\n384:    * @return the value of the property, not null\\n385:    */\\n386:   public DayCount getDayCount() {\\n387:     return dayCount;\\n388:   }\\n389: \\n390:   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\\n391:   /**\\n392:    * Gets the payment on default.\\n393:    * <p>\\n394:    * Whether the accrued premium is paid in the event of a default.\\n395:    * @return the value of the property, not null\\n396:    */\\n397:   public PaymentOnDefault getPaymentOnDefault() {\\n398:     return paymentOnDefault;\\n399:   }\\n400: \\n401:   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\\n402:   /**\\n403:    * Gets the protection start of the day.\\n404:    * <p>\\n405:    * When the protection starts on the start date.\\n406:    * @return the value of the property, not null\\n407:    */\\n408:   public ProtectionStartOfDay getProtectionStart() {\\n409:     return protectionStart;\\n410:   }\\n411: \\n412:   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\\n413:   /**\\n414:    * Gets the number of days between valuation date and step-in date.\\n415:    * <p>\\n416:    * The step-in date is also called protection effective date.\\n417:    * It is usually 1 calendar day for standardized CDS index contracts.\\n418:    * @return the value of the property, not null\\n419:    */\\n420:   public DaysAdjustment getStepinDateOffset() {\\n421:     return stepinDateOffset;\\n422:   }\\n423: \\n424:   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\\n425:   /**\\n426:    * Gets the number of days between valuation date and settlement date.\\n427:    * <p>\\n428:    * It is usually 3 business days for standardized CDS index contracts.\\n429:    * @return the value of the property, not null\\n430:    */\\n431:   public DaysAdjustment getSettlementDateOffset() {\\n432:     return settlementDateOffset;\\n433:   }\\n434: \\n435:   //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\\n436:   /**\\n437:    * Returns a builder that allows this bean to be mutated.\\n438:    * @return the mutable builder, not null\\n439:    */\\n440:   public Builder toBuilder() {\\n441:     return new Builder(this);\\n442:   }\\n443: \\n444:   @Override\\n445:   public boolean equals(Object obj) {\\n446:     if (obj == this) {\\n447:       return true;\\n448:     }\\n449:     if (obj != null && obj.getClass() == this.getClass()) {\\n450:       ResolvedCdsIndex other = (ResolvedCdsIndex) obj;\\n451:       return JodaBeanUtils.equal(buySell, other.buySell) &&\\n452:           JodaBeanUtils.equal(cdsIndexId, other.cdsIndexId) &&\\n453:           JodaBeanUtils.equal(legalEntityIds, other.legalEntityIds) &&\\n454:           JodaBeanUtils.equal(paymentPeriods, other.paymentPeriods) &&\\n455:           JodaBeanUtils.equal(protectionEndDate, other.protectionEndDate) &&\\n456:           JodaBeanUtils.equal(dayCount, other.dayCount) &&\\n457:           JodaBeanUtils.equal(paymentOnDefault, other.paymentOnDefault) &&\\n458:           JodaBeanUtils.equal(protectionStart, other.protectionStart) &&\\n459:           JodaBeanUtils.equal(stepinDateOffset, other.stepinDateOffset) &&\\n460:           JodaBeanUtils.equal(settlementDateOffset, other.settlementDateOffset);\\n461:     }\\n462:     return false;\\n463:   }\\n464: \\n465:   @Override\\n466:   public int hashCode() {\\n467:     int hash = getClass().hashCode();\\n468:     hash = hash * 31 + JodaBeanUtils.hashCode(buySell);\\n469:     hash = hash * 31 + JodaBeanUtils.hashCode(cdsIndexId);\\n470:     hash = hash * 31 + hash * 31 + JodaBeanUtils.hashCode(dayCount);\\n474:     hash = hash * 31 + JodaBeanUtils.hashCode(paymentOnDefault);\\n475:     hash = hash * 31 + JodaBeanUtils.hashCode(protectionStart);\\n476: valuation date, or settlement date if the product is associated with a {@code Trade}. \\\\n35:  */\\\\n36: public class IsdaCdsProductPricer {\\\\n37: \\\\n38:   /**\\\\n39:    * Default implementation.\\\\n40:    */\\\\n41:   public static final IsdaCdsProductPricer DEFAULT = new IsdaCdsProductPricer(AccrualOnDefaultFormula.ORIGINAL_ISDA);\\\\n42:   /**\\\\n43:    * The small parameter.\\\\n44:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n45:    * An approximation formula is used if a certain variable is smaller than this parameter.\\\\n46:    */\\\\n47:   private static final double SMALL = 1.0e-5;\\\\n48: \\\\n49:   /**\\\\n50:    * The formula\\\\n51:    */\\\\n52:   private final AccrualOnDefaultFormula formula;\\\\n53:   /**\\\\n54:    * The omega parameter.\\\\n55:    */\\\\n56:   private final double omega;\\\\n57: \\\\n58:   /**\\\\n59:    * Constructor specifying the formula to use for the accrued on default calculation.  \\\\n60:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n61:    * Options are the formula given in the ISDA model (version 1.8.2 and lower); \\\\n62:    * the proposed fix by Markit (given as a comment in version 1.8.2), or the mathematically correct formula. \\\\n63:    *\\\\n64:    * @param formula  the formula\\\\n65:    */\\\\n66:   public IsdaCdsProductPricer(AccrualOnDefaultFormula formula) {\\\\n67:     this.formula = ArgChecker.notNull(formula, \\\\\\\"formula\\\\\\\");\\\\n68:     this.omega = formula.getOmega();\\\\n69:   }\\\\n70: \\\\n71:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\n72:   /**\\\\n73:    * Gets the accrual-on-default formula used in this pricer. \\\\n74:    * \\\\n75:    * @return the formula\\\\n76:    */\\\\n77:   public AccrualOnDefaultFormula getAccrualOnDefaultFormula() {\\\\n78:     return formula;\\\\n79:   }\\\\n80: \\\\n81:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\n82:   /**\\\\n83:    * Calculates the price of the CDS product, which is the present value per unit notional. \\\\n84:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n85:    * This method can calculate the clean or dirty price, see {@link PriceType}. \\\\n86:    * If calculating the clean price, the accrued interest is calculated based on the step-in date.\\\\n87:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n88:    * This is coherent with {@link #presentValue(ResolvedCds, CreditRatesProvider, LocalDate, PriceType, ReferenceData)}.\\\\n89:    * \\\\n90:    * @param cds  the product\\\\n91:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\\\n92:    * @param referenceDate  the reference date\\\\n93:    * @param priceType  the price type\\\\n94:    * @param refData  the reference data\\\\n95:    * @return the price\\\\n96:    */\\\\n97:   public double price(\\\\n98:       ResolvedCds cds,\\\\n99:       CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\\\\n100:       LocalDate referenceDate,\\\\n101:       PriceType priceType,\\\\n102:       ReferenceData refData) {\\\\n103: \\\\n104:     return price(cds, ratesProvider, cds.getFixedRate(), referenceDate, priceType, refData);\\\\n105:   }\\\\n106: \\\\n107:   // internal price computation with specified coupon rate\\\\n108:   double price(\\\\n109:       ResolvedCds cds,\\\\n110:       CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\\\\n111:       double fractionalSpread,\\\\n112:       LocalDate referenceDate,\\\\n113:       PriceType priceType,\\\\n114:       ReferenceData refData) {\\\\n115: \\\\n116:     if (!cds.getProtectionEndDate().isAfter(ratesProvider.getValuationDate())) { //short cut already expired CDSs\\\\n117:       return 0d;\\\\n118:     }\\\\n119:     LocalDate stepinDate = cds.getStepinDateOffset().adjust(ratesProvider.getValuationDate(), refData);\\\\n120:     LocalDate effectiveStartDate = cds.calculateEffectiveStartDate(stepinDate);\\\\n121:     double recoveryRate = recoveryRate(cds, ratesProvider);\\\\n122:     Pair\\\\u003cCreditDiscountFactors, LegalEntitySurvivalProbabilities\\\\u003e rates = reduceDiscountFactors(cds, ratesProvider);\\\\n123:     double protectionLeg =\\\\n124:         protectionLeg(cds, rates.getFirst(), rates.getSecond(), referenceDate, effectiveStartDate, recoveryRate);\\\\n125:     double rpv01 = riskyAnnuity(\\\\n126:         cds, rates.getFirst(), rates.getSecond(), referenceDate, stepinDate, effectiveStartDate, priceType);\\\\n127:     return protectionLeg - rpv01 * fractionalSpread;\\\\n128:   }\\\\n129: \\\\n130:   /**\\\\n131:    * Calculates the price sensitivity of the product. \\\\n132:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n133:    * The price sensitivity of the product is the sensitivity of price to the underlying curves.\\\\n134:    * \\\\n135:    * @param cds  the product \\\\n136:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\\\n137:    * @param referenceDate  the reference date\\\\n138:    * @param refData  the reference data\\\\n139:    * @return the present value sensitivity\\\\n140:    */\\\\n141:   public PointSensitivityBuilder priceSensitivity(\\\\n142:       ResolvedCds cds,\\\\n143:       CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\\\\n144:       LocalDate referenceDate,\\\\n145:       ReferenceData refData) {\\\\n146: \\\\n147:     if (isExpired(cds, ratesProvider)) {\\\\n148:       return PointSensitivityBuilder.none();\\\\n149:     }\\\\n150:     LocalDate stepinDate = cds.getStepinDateOffset().adjust(ratesProvider.getValuationDate(), refData);\\\\n151:     LocalDate effectiveStartDate = cds.calculateEffectiveStartDate(stepinDate);\\\\n152:     double recoveryRate = recoveryRate(cds, ratesProvider);\\\\n153:     Pair\\\\u003cCreditDiscountFactors, LegalEntitySurvivalProbabilities\\\\u003e rates = reduceDiscountFactors(cds, ratesProvider);\\\\n154: \\\\n155:     PointSensitivityBuilder protectionLegSensi =\\\\n156:         protectionLegSensitivity(cds, rates.getFirst(), rates.getSecond(), referenceDate, effectiveStartDate, recoveryRate);\\\\n157:     PointSensitivityBuilder riskyAnnuitySensi =\\\\n158:         riskyAnnuitySensitivity(cds, rates.getFirst(), rates.getSecond(), referenceDate, stepinDate, effectiveStartDate)\\\\n159:             .multipliedBy(-cds.getFixedRate());\\\\n160: \\\\n161:     return protectionLegSensi.combinedWith(riskyAnnuitySensi);\\\\n162:   }\\\\n163: \\\\n164:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\n165:   /**\\\\n166:    * Calculates the present value of the CDS product.\\\\n167:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n168:    * The present value of the product is based on {@code referenceDate}.\\\\n169:    * This is typically the valuation date, or cash settlement date if the product is associated with a {@code Trade}. \\\\n170:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n171:    * This method can calculate the clean or dirty present value, see {@link PriceType}. \\\\n172:    * If calculating the clean value, the accrued interest is calculated based on the step-in date.\\\\n173:    * \\\\n174:    * @param cds  the product\\\\n175:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\\\n176:    * @param referenceDate  the reference date\\\\n177:    * @param priceType  the price type\\\\n178:    * @param refData  the reference data\\\\n179:    * @return the present value\\\\n180:    */\\\\n181:   public CurrencyAmount presentValue(\\\\n182:       ResolvedCds cds,\\\\n183:       CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\\\\n184:       LocalDate referenceDate,\\\\n185:       PriceType priceType,\\\\n186:       ReferenceData refData) {\\\\n187: \\\\n188:     double price = price(cds, ratesProvider, referenceDate, priceType, refData);\\\\n189:     return CurrencyAmount.of(cds.getCurrency(), cds.getBuySell().normalize(cds.getNotional()) * price);\\\\n190:   }\\\\n191: \\\\n192:   /**\\\\n193:    * Calculates the present value sensitivity of the product. \\\\n194:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n195:    * The present value sensitivity of the product is the sensitivity of present value to the underlying curves.\\\\n196:    * \\\\n197:    * @param cds  the product \\\\n198:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\\\n199:    * @param referenceDate  the reference date\\\\n200:    * @param refData  the reference data\\\\n201:    * @return the present value sensitivity\\\\n202:    */\\\\n203:   public PointSensitivityBuilder presentValueSensitivity(\\\\n204:       ResolvedCds cds,\\\\n205:       CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\\\\n206:       LocalDate referenceDate,\\\\n207:       ReferenceData refData) {\\\\n208: \\\\n209:     if (isExpired(cds, ratesProvider)) {\\\\n210:       return PointSensitivityBuilder.none();\\\\n211:     }\\\\n212:     LocalDate stepinDate = cds.getStepinDateOffset().adjust(ratesProvider.getValuationDate(), refData);\\\\n213:     LocalDate effectiveStartDate = cds.calculateEffectiveStartDate(stepinDate);\\\\n214:     double recoveryRate = recoveryRate(cds, ratesProvider);\\\\n215:     Pair\\\\u003cCreditDiscountFactors, LegalEntitySurvivalProbabilities\\\\u003e rates = reduceDiscountFactors(cds, ratesProvider);\\\\n216: \\\\n217:     double signedNotional = cds.getBuySell().normalize(cds.getNotional());\\\\n218:     PointSensitivityBuilder protectionLegSensi =\\\\n219:         protectionLegSensitivity(cds, rates.getFirst(), rates.getSecond(), referenceDate, effectiveStartDate, recoveryRate)\\\\n220:             .multipliedBy(signedNotional);\\\\n221:     PointSensitivityBuilder riskyAnnuitySensi = riskyAnnuitySensitivity(\\\\n222:         cds, rates.getFirst(), rates.getSecond(), referenceDate, stepinDate, effectiveStartDate)\\\\n223:             .multipliedBy(-cds.getFixedRate() * signedNotional);\\\\n224: \\\\n225:     return protectionLegSensi.combinedWith(riskyAnnuitySensi);\\\\n226:   }\\\\n227: \\\\n228:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\n229:   /**\\\\n230:    * Calculates the par spread of the CDS product.\\\\n231:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n232:    * The par spread is a coupon rate such that the clean PV is 0. \\\\n233:    * The result is represented in decimal form. \\\\n234:    * \\\\n235:    * @param cds  the product\\\\n236:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\\\n237:    * @param referenceDate  the reference date\\\\n238:    * @param refData  the reference data\\\\n239:    * @return the par spread\\\\n240:    */\\\\n241:   public double parSpread(\\\\n242:       ResolvedCds cds,\\\\n243:       CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\\\\n244:       LocalDate referenceDate,\\\\n245:       ReferenceData refData) {\\\\n246: \\\\n247:     ArgChecker.isTrue(cds.getProtectionEndDate().isAfter(ratesProvider.getValuationDate()), \\\\\\\"CDS already expired\\\\\\\");\\\\n248:     LocalDate stepinDate = cds.getStepinDateOffset().adjust(ratesProvider.getValuationDate(), refData);\\\\n249:     LocalDate effectiveStartDate = cds.calculateEffectiveStartDate(stepinDate);\\\\n250:     double recoveryRate = recoveryRate(cds, ratesProvider);\\\\n251:     Pair\\\\u003cCreditDiscountFactors, LegalEntitySurvivalProbabilities\\\\u003e rates = reduceDiscountFactors(cds, ratesProvider);\\\\n252:     double protectionLeg =\\\\n253:         protectionLeg(cds, rates.getFirst(), rates.getSecond(), referenceDate, effectiveStartDate, recoveryRate);\\\\n254:     double riskyAnnuity =\\\\n255:         riskyAnnuity(cds, rates.getFirst(), rates.getSecond(), referenceDate, stepinDate, effectiveStartDate, PriceType.CLEAN);\\\\n256:     return protectionLeg / riskyAnnuity;\\\\n257:   }\\\\n258: \\\\n259:   /**\\\\n260:    * Calculates the par spread sensitivity of the product.\\\\n261:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n262:    * The par spread sensitivity of the product is the sensitivity of par spread to the underlying curves.\\\\n263:    * The resulting sensitivity is based on the currency of the CDS product.\\\\n264:    * \\\\n265:    * @param cds  the product\\\\n266:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\\\n267:    * @param referenceDate  the reference date\\\\n268:    * @param refData  the reference data\\\\n269:    * @return the par spread\\\\n270:    */\\\\n271:   public PointSensitivityBuilder parSpreadSensitivity(\\\\n272:       ResolvedCds cds,\\\\n273:       CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\\\\n274:       LocalDate referenceDate,\\\\n275:       ReferenceData refData) {\\\\n276: \\\\n277:     ArgChecker.isTrue(cds.getProtectionEndDate().isAfter(ratesProvider.getValuationDate()), \\\\\\\"CDS already expired\\\\\\\");\\\\n278:     LocalDate stepinDate = cds.getStepinDateOffset().adjust(ratesProvider.getValuationDate(), refData);\\\\n279:     LocalDate effectiveStartDate = cds.calculateEffectiveStartDate(stepinDate);\\\\n280:     double recoveryRate = recoveryRate(cds, ratesProvider);\\\\n281:     Pair\\\\u003cCreditDiscountFactors, LegalEntitySurvivalProbabilities\\\\u003e rates = reduceDiscountFactors(cds, ratesProvider);\\\\n282:     double protectionLeg =\\\\n283:         protectionLeg(cds, rates.getFirst(), rates.getSecond(), referenceDate, effectiveStartDate, recoveryRate);\\\\n284:     double riskyAnnuityInv = 1d /\\\\n285:         riskyAnnuity(cds, rates.getFirst(), rates.getSecond(), referenceDate, stepinDate, effectiveStartDate, PriceType.CLEAN);\\\\n286: \\\\n287:     PointSensitivityBuilder protectionLegSensi =\\\\n288:         protectionLegSensitivity(cds, rates.getFirst(), rates.getSecond(), referenceDate, effectiveStartDate, recoveryRate)\\\\n289:             .multipliedBy(riskyAnnuityInv);\\\\n290:     PointSensitivityBuilder riskyAnnuitySensi = riskyAnnuitySensitivity(\\\\n291:         cds, rates.getFirst(), rates.getSecond(), referenceDate, stepinDate, effectiveStartDate)\\\\n292:             .multipliedBy(-protectionLeg * riskyAnnuityInv * riskyAnnuityInv);\\\\n293: \\\\n294:     return protectionLegSensi.combinedWith(riskyAnnuitySensi);\\\\n295:   }\\\\n296: \\\\n297:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\n298:   /**\\\\n299:    * Calculates the price of the protection leg, which is the protection leg present value per unit notional.\\\\n300:    * \\\\n301:    * @param cds  the product\\\\n302:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\\\n303:    * @param referenceDate  the reference date\\\\n304:    * @param refData  the reference data\\\\n305:    * @return the protection leg price\\\\n306:    */\\\\n307:   public double protectionLeg(\\\\n308:       ResolvedCds cds,\\\\n309:       CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\\\\n310:       LocalDate referenceDate,\\\\n311:       ReferenceData refData) {\\\\n312: \\\\n313:     if (isExpired(cds, ratesProvider)) {\\\\n314:       return 0d;\\\\n315:     }\\\\n316:     LocalDate stepinDate = cds.getStepinDateOffset().adjust(ratesProvider.getValuationDate(), refData);\\\\n317:     LocalDate effectiveStartDate = cds.calculateEffectiveStartDate(stepinDate);\\\\n318:     double recoveryRate = recoveryRate(cds, ratesProvider);\\\\n319:     Pair\\\\u003cCreditDiscountFactors, LegalEntitySurvivalProbabilities\\\\u003e rates = reduceDiscountFactors(cds, ratesProvider);\\\\n320:     return protectionLeg(cds, rates.getFirst(), rates.getSecond(), referenceDate, effectiveStartDate, recoveryRate);\\\\n321:   }\\\\n322: \\\\n323:   /**\\\\n324:    * Calculates the price sensitivity of the protection leg of the product.\\\\n325:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n326:    * Empty sensitivity is returned if the CDS already expired.\\\\n327:    *\\\\n328:    * @param cds  the product\\\\n329:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\\\n330:    * @param referenceDate  the reference date\\\\n331:    * @param refData  the reference data\\\\n332:    * @return the protection leg price sensitivity\\\\n333:    */\\\\n334:   public PointSensitivityBuilder protectionLegSensitivity(\\\\n335:       ResolvedCds cds,\\\\n336:       CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\\\\n337:       LocalDate referenceDate,\\\\n338:       ReferenceData refData) {\\\\n339: \\\\n340:     if (isExpired(cds, ratesProvider)) {\\\\n341:       return PointSensitivityBuilder.none();\\\\n342:     }\\\\n343:     LocalDate stepinDate = cds.getStepinDateOffset().adjust(ratesProvider.getValuationDate(), refData);\\\\n344:     LocalDate effectiveStartDate = cds.calculateEffectiveStartDate(stepinDate);\\\\n345:     double recoveryRate = recoveryRate(cds, ratesProvider);\\\\n346:     Pair\\\\u003cCreditDiscountFactors, LegalEntitySurvivalProbabilities\\\\u003e rates = reduceDiscountFactors(cds, ratesProvider);\\\\n347:     return protectionLegSensitivity(\\\\n348:         cds,\\\\n349:         rates.getFirst(),\\\\n350:         rates.getSecond(),\\\\n351:         referenceDate,\\\\n352:         effectiveStartDate,\\\\n353:         recoveryRate);\\\\n354:   }\\\\n355: \\\\n356:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\n357:   /**\\\\n358:    * Calculates the risky annuity, which is RPV01 per unit notional.\\\\n359:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n360:    * Zero is returned if the CDS already expired.\\\\n361:    * \\\\n362:    * @param cds  the product\\\\n363:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\\\n364:    * @param referenceDate  the reference date\\\\n365:    * @param priceType  the price type\\\\n366:    * @param refData  the reference data\\\\n367:    * @return the risky annuity\\\\n368:    */\\\\n369:   public double riskyAnnuity(\\\\n370:       ResolvedCds cds,\\\\n371:       CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\\\\n372:       LocalDate referenceDate,\\\\n373:       PriceType priceType,\\\\n374:       ReferenceData refData) {\\\\n375: \\\\n376:     if (isExpired(cds, ratesProvider)) {\\\\n377:       return 0d;\\\\n378:     }\\\\n379:     LocalDate stepinDate = cds.getStepinDateOffset().adjust(ratesProvider.getValuationDate(), refData);\\\\n380:     LocalDate effectiveStartDate = cds.calculateEffectiveStartDate(stepinDate);\\\\n381:     Pair\\\\u003cCreditDiscountFactors, LegalEntitySurvivalProbabilities\\\\u003e rates = reduceDiscountFactors(cds, ratesProvider);\\\\n382:     return riskyAnnuity(cds, rates.getFirst(), rates.getSecond(), referenceDate, stepinDate, effectiveStartDate, priceType);\\\\n383:   }\\\\n384: \\\\n385:   /**\\\\n386:    * Calculates the risky annuity sensitivity of the product.\\\\n387:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n388:    * The risky annuity sensitivity of the product is the sensitivity of risky annuity to the underlying curves.\\\\n389:    * The resulting sensitivity is based on the currency of the CDS product.\\\\n390:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n391:    * Empty sensitivity is returned if the CDS already expired.\\\\n392:    * \\\\n393:    * @param cds  the product\\\\n394:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\\\n395:    * @param referenceDate  the reference date\\\\n396:    * @param refData  the reference data\\\\n397:    * @return the risky annuity sensitivity\\\\n398:    */\\\\n399:   public PointSensitivityBuilder riskyAnnuitySensitivity(\\\\n400:       ResolvedCds cds,\\\\n401:       CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\\\\n402:       LocalDate referenceDate,\\\\n403:       ReferenceData refData) {\\\\n404: \\\\n405:     if (isExpired(cds, ratesProvider)) {\\\\n406:       return PointSensitivityBuilder.none();\\\\n407:     }\\\\n408:     LocalDate stepinDate = cds.getStepinDateOffset().adjust(ratesProvider.getValuationDate(), refData);\\\\n409:     LocalDate effectiveStartDate = cds.calculateEffectiveStartDate(stepinDate);\\\\n410:     Pair\\\\u003cCreditDiscountFactors, LegalEntitySurvivalProbabilities\\\\u003e rates = reduceDiscountFactors(cds, ratesProvider);\\\\n411:     return riskyAnnuitySensitivity(\\\\n412:         cds, rates.getFirst(), rates.getSecond(), referenceDate, stepinDate, effectiveStartDate);\\\\n413:   }\\\\n414: \\\\n415:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\n416:   /**\\\\n417:    * Calculates the risky PV01 of the CDS product. \\\\n418:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n419:    * RPV01 is defined as minus of the present value sensitivity to coupon rate.\\\\n420:    * \\\\n421:    * @param cds  the product\\\\n422:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\\\n423:    * @param referenceDate  the reference date\\\\n424:    * @param priceType  the price type\\\\n425:    * @param refData  the reference date\\\\n426:    * @return the RPV01\\\\n427:    */\\\\n428:   public CurrencyAmount rpv01(\\\\n429:       ResolvedCds cds,\\\\n430:       CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\\\\n431:       LocalDate referenceDate,\\\\n432:       PriceType priceType,\\\\n433:       ReferenceData refData) {\\\\n434: \\\\n435:     double riskyAnnuity = riskyAnnuity(cds, ratesProvider, referenceDate, priceType, refData);\\\\n436:     return CurrencyAmount.of(cds.getCurrency(), cds.getBuySell().normalize(cds.getNotional()) * riskyAnnuity);\\\\n437:   }\\\\n438: \\\\n439:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\n440:   /**\\\\n441:    * Calculates the recovery01 of the CDS product.\\\\n442:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n443:    * The recovery01 is defined as the present value sensitivity to the recovery rate.\\\\n444:    * Since the ISDA standard model requires the recovery rate to be constant throughout the lifetime of the CDS,  \\\\n445:    * one currency amount is returned by this method.\\\\n446:    * \\\\n447:    * @param cds  the product\\\\n448:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\\\n449:    * @param referenceDate  the reference date\\\\n450:    * @param refData  the reference data\\\\n451:    * @return the recovery01\\\\n452:    */\\\\n453:   public CurrencyAmount recovery01(\\\\n454:       ResolvedCds cds,\\\\n455:       CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\\\\n456:       LocalDate referenceDate,\\\\n457:       ReferenceData refData) {\\\\n458: \\\\n459:     if (isExpired(cds, ratesProvider)) {\\\\n460:       return CurrencyAmount.of(cds.getCurrency(), 0d);\\\\n461:     }\\\\n462:     LocalDate stepinDate = cds.getStepinDateOffset().adjust(ratesProvider.getValuationDate(), refData);\\\\n463:     LocalDate effectiveStartDate = cds.calculateEffectiveStartDate(stepinDate);\\\\n464:     validateRecoveryRates(cds, ratesProvider);\\\\n465:     Pair\\\\u003cCreditDiscountFactors, LegalEntitySurvivalProbabilities\\\\u003e rates = reduceDiscountFactors(cds, ratesProvider);\\\\n466:     double protectionFull = protectionFull(cds, rates.getFirst(), rates.getSecond(), referenceDate, effectiveStartDate);\\\\n467: \\\\n468:     return CurrencyAmount.of(cds.getCurrency(), -cds.getBuySell().normalize(cds.getNotional()) * protectionFull);\\\\n469:   }\\\\n470: \\\\n471:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\n472:   /**\\\\n473:    * Calculates the jump-to-default of the CDS product.\\\\n474:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n475:    * The jump-to-default is the value of the product in case of immediate default.\\\\n476:    * \\\\n477:    * @param cds  the product\\\\n478:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\\\n479:    * @param referenceDate  the reference date\\\\n480:    * @param refData  the reference data\\\\n481:    * @return the jump-to-default\\\\n482:    */\\\\n483:   public JumpToDefault jumpToDefault(\\\\n484:       ResolvedCds cds,\\\\n485:       CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\\\\n486:       LocalDate referenceDate,\\\\n487:       ReferenceData refData) {\\\\n488: \\\\n489:     StandardId legalEntityId = cds.getLegalEntityId();\\\\n490:     Currency currency = cds.getCurrency();\\\\n491:     if (isExpired(cds, ratesProvider)) {\\\\n492:       return JumpToDefault.of(currency, ImmutableMap.of(legalEntityId, 0d));\\\\n493:     }\\\\n494:     LocalDate stepinDate = cds.getStepinDateOffset().adjust(ratesProvider.getValuationDate(), refData);\\\\n495:     LocalDate effectiveStartDate = cds.calculateEffectiveStartDate(stepinDate);\\\\n496:     double recoveryRate = recoveryRate(cds, ratesProvider);\\\\n497:     Pair\\\\u003cCreditDiscountFactors, LegalEntitySurvivalProbabilities\\\\u003e rates = reduceDiscountFactors(cds, ratesProvider);\\\\n498:     double protectionFull = protectionFull(cds, rates.getFirst(), rates.getSecond(), referenceDate, effectiveStartDate);\\\\n499:     double lgd = 1d - recoveryRate;\\\\n500:     double rpv01 = riskyAnnuity(\\\\n501:         cds, rates.getFirst(), rates.getSecond(), referenceDate, stepinDate, effectiveStartDate, PriceType.CLEAN);\\\\n502:     double jtd = lgd - (lgd * protectionFull - cds.getFixedRate() * rpv01);\\\\n503:     return JumpToDefault.of(currency, ImmutableMap.of(legalEntityId, cds.getBuySell().normalize(cds.getNotional()) * jtd));\\\\n504:   }\\\\n505: \\\\n506:   /**\\\\n507:    * Calculates the expected loss of the CDS product.\\\\n508:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n509:    * The expected loss is the (undiscounted) expected default settlement value paid by the protection seller. \\\\n510:    * The resulting value is always positive.\\\\n511:    * \\\\n512:    * @param cds  the product\\\\n513:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\\\n514:    * @return the expected loss\\\\n515:    */\\\\n516:   public CurrencyAmount expectedLoss(\\\\n517:       ResolvedCds cds,\\\\n518:       CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider) {\\\\n519: \\\\n520:     if (isExpired(cds, ratesProvider)) {\\\\n521:       return CurrencyAmount.of(cds.getCurrency(), 0d);\\\\n522:     }\\\\n523:     double recoveryRate = recoveryRate(cds, ratesProvider);\\\\n524:     Pair\\\\u003cCreditDiscountFactors, LegalEntitySurvivalProbabilities\\\\u003e rates = reduceDiscountFactors(cds, ratesProvider);\\\\n525:     double survivalProbability = rates.getSecond().survivalProbability(cds.getProtectionEndDate());\\\\n526:     double el = (1d - recoveryRate) * (1d - survivalProbability);\\\\n527:     return CurrencyAmount.of(cds.getCurrency(), Math.abs(cds.getNotional()) * el);\\\\n528:   }\\\\n529: \\\\n530:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\n531:   // computes protection leg pv per unit notional\\\\n532:   private double protectionLeg(\\\\n533:       ResolvedCds cds,\\\\n534:       CreditDiscountFactors discountFactors,\\\\n535:       LegalEntitySurvivalProbabilities survivalProbabilities,\\\\n536:       LocalDate referenceDate,\\\\n537:       LocalDate effectiveStartDate,\\\\n538:       double recoveryRate) {\\\\n539: \\\\n540:     double protectionFull = protectionFull(cds, discountFactors, survivalProbabilities, referenceDate, effectiveStartDate);\\\\n541:     return (1d - recoveryRate) * protectionFull;\\\\n542:   }\\\\n543: \\\\n544:   // computes protection leg pv per unit notional, without loss-given-default rate multiplied\\\\n545:   double protectionFull(\\\\n546:       ResolvedCds cds,\\\\n547:       CreditDiscountFactors discountFactors,\\\\n548:       LegalEntitySurvivalProbabilities survivalProbabilities,\\\\n549:       LocalDate referenceDate,\\\\n550:       LocalDate effectiveStartDate) {\\\\n551: \\\\n552:     DoubleArray integrationSchedule = DoublesScheduleGenerator.getIntegrationsPoints(\\\\n553:         discountFactors.relativeYearFraction(effectiveStartDate),\\\\n554:         discountFactors.relativeYearFraction(cds.getProtectionEndDate()),\\\\n555:         discountFactors.getParameterKeys(),\\\\n556:         survivalProbabilities.getParameterKeys());\\\\n557: \\\\n558:     double pv = 0d;\\\\n559:     double ht0 = survivalProbabilities.zeroRate(integrationSchedule.get(0)) * integrationSchedule.get(0);\\\\n560:     double rt0 = discountFactors.zeroRate(integrationSchedule.get(0)) * integrationSchedule.get(0);\\\\n561:     double b0 = Math.exp(-ht0 - rt0);\\\\n562:     int n = integrationSchedule.size();\\\\n563:     for (int i = 1; i \\\\u003c n; ++i) {\\\\n564:       double ht1 = survivalProbabilities.zeroRate(integrationSchedule.get(i)) * integrationSchedule.get(i);\\\\n565:       double rt1 = discountFactors.zeroRate(integrationSchedule.get(i)) * integrationSchedule.get(i);\\\\n566:       double b1 = Math.exp(-ht1 - rt1);\\\\n567:       double dht = ht1 - ht0;\\\\n568:       double drt = rt1 - rt0;\\\\n569:       double dhrt = dht + drt;\\\\n570:       // The formula has been modified from ISDA (but is equivalent) to avoid log(exp(x)) and explicitly\\\\n571:       // calculating the time step - it also handles the limit\\\\n572:       double dPV = 0d;\\\\n573:       if (Math.abs(dhrt) \\\\u003c SMALL) {\\\\n574:         dPV = dht * b0 * epsilon(-dhrt);\\\\n575:       } else {\\\\n576:         dPV = (b0 - b1) * dht / dhrt;\\\\n577:       }\\\\n578:       pv += dPV;\\\\n579:       ht0 = ht1;\\\\n580:       rt0 = rt1;\\\\n581:       b0 = b1;\\\\n582:     }\\\\n583:     // roll to the cash settle date\\\\n584:     double df = discountFactors.discountFactor(referenceDate);\\\\n585: \\\\n586:     return pv / df;\\\\n587:   }\\\\n588: \\\\n589:   // computes risky annuity\\\\n590:   double riskyAnnuity(\\\\n591:       ResolvedCds cds,\\\\n592:       CreditDiscountFactors discountFactors,\\\\n593:       LegalEntitySurvivalProbabilities survivalProbabilities,\\\\n594:       LocalDate referenceDate,\\\\n595:       LocalDate stepinDate,\\\\n596:       LocalDate effectiveStartDate,\\\\n597:       PriceType priceType) {\\\\n598: \\\\n599:     double pv = 0d;\\\\n600:     for (CreditCouponPaymentPeriod coupon : cds.getPaymentPeriods()) {\\\\n601:       if (stepinDate.isBefore(coupon.getEndDate())) {\\\\n602:         double q = survivalProbabilities.survivalProbability(coupon.getEffectiveEndDate());\\\\n603:         double p = discountFactors.discountFactor(coupon.getPaymentDate());\\\\n604:         pv += coupon.getYearFraction() * p * q;\\\\n605:       }\\\\n606:     }\\\\n607: \\\\n608:     if (cds.getPaymentOnDefault().isAccruedInterest()) {\\\\n609:       // This is needed so that the code is consistent with ISDA C when the Markit `fix' is used. \\\\n610:       LocalDate start = cds.getPaymentPeriods().size() == 1 ? effectiveStartDate : cds.getAccrualStartDate();\\\\n611:       DoubleArray integrationSchedule = DoublesScheduleGenerator.getIntegrationsPoints(\\\\n612:           discountFactors.relativeYearFraction(start),\\\\n613:           discountFactors.relativeYearFraction(cds.getProtectionEndDate()),\\\\n614:           discountFactors.getParameterKeys(),\\\\n615:           survivalProbabilities.getParameterKeys());\\\\n616:       for (CreditCouponPaymentPeriod coupon : cds.getPaymentPeriods()) {\\\\n617:         pv += singlePeriodAccrualOnDefault(\\\\n618:             coupon, effectiveStartDate, integrationSchedule, discountFactors, survivalProbabilities);\\\\n619:       }\\\\n620:     }\\\\n621:     // roll to the cash settle date\\\\n622:     double df = discountFactors.discountFactor(referenceDate);\\\\n623:     pv /= df;\\\\n624: \\\\n625:     if (priceType.isCleanPrice()) {\\\\n626:       pv -= cds.accruedYearFraction(stepinDate);\\\\n627:     }\\\\n628: \\\\n629:     return pv;\\\\n630:   }\\\\n631: \\\\n632:   // computes accrual-on-default pv per unit notional for a single payment period\\\\n633:   private double singlePeriodAccrualOnDefault(\\\\n634:       CreditCouponPaymentPeriod coupon,\\\\n635:       LocalDate effectiveStartDate,\\\\n636:       DoubleArray integrationSchedule,\\\\n637:       CreditDiscountFactors discountFactors,\\\\n638:       LegalEntitySurvivalProbabilities survivalProbabilities) {\\\\n639: \\\\n640:     LocalDate start =\\\\n641:         coupon.getEffectiveStartDate().isBefore(effectiveStartDate) ? effectiveStartDate : coupon.getEffectiveStartDate();\\\\n642:     if (!start.isBefore(coupon.getEffectiveEndDate())) {\\\\n643:       return 0d; // this coupon has already expired\\\\n644:     }\\\\n645: \\\\n646:     DoubleArray knots = DoublesScheduleGenerator.truncateSetInclusive(discountFactors.relativeYearFraction(start),\\\\n647:         discountFactors.relativeYearFraction(coupon.getEffectiveEndDate()), integrationSchedule);\\\\n648: \\\\n649:     double t0Knot = knots.get(0);\\\\n650:     double ht0 = survivalProbabilities.zeroRate(t0Knot) * t0Knot;\\\\n651:     double rt0 = discountFactors.zeroRate(t0Knot) * t0Knot;\\\\n652:     double b0 = Math.exp(-rt0 - ht0);\\\\n653: \\\\n654:     double effStart = discountFactors.relativeYearFraction(coupon.getEffectiveStartDate());\\\\n655:     double t0 = t0Knot - effStart + omega;\\\\n656:     double pv = 0d;\\\\n657:     final int nItems = knots.size();\\\\n658:     for (int j = 1; j \\\\u003c nItems; ++j) {\\\\n659:       double t = knots.get(j);\\\\n660:       double ht1 = survivalProbabilities.zeroRate(t) * t;\\\\n661:       double rt1 = discountFactors.zeroRate(t) * t;\\\\n662:       double b1 = Math.exp(-rt1 - ht1);\\\\n663: \\\\n664:       double dt = knots.get(j) - knots.get(j - 1);\\\\n665: \\\\n666:       double dht = ht1 - ht0;\\\\n667:       double drt = rt1 - rt0;\\\\n668:       double dhrt = dht + drt;\\\\n669: \\\\n670:       double tPV;\\\\n671:       if (formula == AccrualOnDefaultFormula.MARKIT_FIX) {\\\\n672:         if (Math.abs(dhrt) \\\\u003c SMALL) {\\\\n673:           tPV = dht * dt * b0 * Epsilon.epsilonP(-dhrt);\\\\n674:         } else {\\\\n675:           tPV = dht * dt / dhrt * ((b0 - b1) / dhrt - b1);\\\\n676:         }\\\\n677:       } else {\\\\n678:         double t1 = t - effStart + omega;\\\\n679:         if (Math.abs(dhrt) \\\\u003c SMALL) {\\\\n680:           tPV = dht * b0 * (t0 * epsilon(-dhrt) + dt * Epsilon.epsilonP(-dhrt));\\\\n681:         } else {\\\\n682:           tPV = dht / dhrt * (t0 * b0 - t1 * b1 + dt / dhrt * (b0 - b1));\\\\n683:         }\\\\n684:         t0 = t1;\\\\n685:       }\\\\n686: \\\\n687:       pv += tPV;\\\\n688:       ht0 = ht1;\\\\n689:       rt0 = rt1;\\\\n690:       b0 = b1;\\\\n691:     }\\\\n692: \\\\n693:     double yearFractionCurve =\\\\n694:         discountFactors.getDayCount().relativeYearFraction(coupon.getStartDate(), coupon.getEndDate());\\\\n695:     return coupon.getYearFraction() * pv / yearFractionCurve;\\\\n696:   }\\\\n697: \\\\n698:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\n699:   PointSensitivityBuilder protectionLegSensitivity(\\\\n700:       ResolvedCds cds,\\\\n701:       CreditDiscountFactors discountFactors,\\\\n702:       LegalEntitySurvivalProbabilities survivalProbabilities,\\\\n703:       LocalDate referenceDate,\\\\n704:       LocalDate effectiveStartDate,\\\\n705:       double recoveryRate) {\\\\n706: \\\\n707:     DoubleArray integrationSchedule = DoublesScheduleGenerator.getIntegrationsPoints(\\\\n708:         discountFactors.relativeYearFraction(effectiveStartDate),\\\\n709:         discountFactors.relativeYearFraction(cds.getProtectionEndDate()),\\\\n710:         discountFactors.getParameterKeys(),\\\\n711:         survivalProbabilities.getParameterKeys());\\\\n712:     int n = integrationSchedule.size();\\\\n713:     double[] dht = new double[n - 1];\\\\n714:     double[] drt = new double[n - 1];\\\\n715:     double[] dhrt = new double[n - 1];\\\\n716:     double[] p = new double[n];\\\\n717:     double[] q = new double[n];\\\\n718:     // pv\\\\n719:     double pv = 0d;\\\\n720:     double ht0 = survivalProbabilities.zeroRate(integrationSchedule.get(0)) * integrationSchedule.get(0);\\\\n721:     double rt0 = discountFactors.zeroRate(integrationSchedule.get(0)) * integrationSchedule.get(0);\\\\n722:     p[0] = Math.exp(-rt0);\\\\n723:     q[0] = Math.exp(-ht0);\\\\n724:     double b0 = p[0] * q[0];\\\\n725:     for (int i = 1; i \\\\u003c n; ++i) {\\\\n726:       double ht1 = survivalProbabilities.zeroRate(integrationSchedule.get(i)) * integrationSchedule.get(i);\\\\n727:       double rt1 = discountFactors.zeroRate(integrationSchedule.get(i)) * integrationSchedule.get(i);\\\\n728:       p[i] = Math.exp(-rt1);\\\\n729:       q[i] = Math.exp(-ht1);\\\\n730:       double b1 = p[i] * q[i];\\\\n731:       dht[i - 1] = ht1 - ht0;\\\\n732:       drt[i - 1] = rt1 - rt0;\\\\n733:       dhrt[i - 1] = dht[i - 1] + drt[i - 1];\\\\n734:       double dPv = 0d;\\\\n735:       if (Math.abs(dhrt[i - 1]) \\\\u003c SMALL) {\\\\n736:         double eps = epsilon(-dhrt[i - 1]);\\\\n737:         dPv = dht[i - 1] * b0 * eps;\\\\n738:       } else {\\\\n739:         dPv = (b0 - b1) * dht[i - 1] / dhrt[i - 1];\\\\n740:       }\\\\n741:       pv += dPv;\\\\n742:       ht0 = ht1;\\\\n743:       rt0 = rt1;\\\\n744:       b0 = b1;\\\\n745:     }\\\\n746:     double df = discountFactors.discountFactor(referenceDate);\\\\n747:     // pv sensitivity\\\\n748:     double factor = (1d - recoveryRate) / df;\\\\n749:     double eps0 = computeExtendedEpsilon(-dhrt[0], p[1], q[1], p[0], q[0]);\\\\n750:     PointSensitivityBuilder pvSensi = discountFactors.zeroRatePointSensitivity(integrationSchedule.get(0))\\\\n751:         .multipliedBy(-dht[0] * q[0] * eps0 * factor);\\\\n752:     pvSensi = pvSensi.combinedWith(survivalProbabilities.zeroRatePointSensitivity(integrationSchedule.get(0))\\\\n753:         .multipliedBy(factor * (drt[0] * p[0] * eps0 + p[0])));\\\\n754:     for (int i = 1; i \\\\u003c n - 1; ++i) {\\\\n755:       double epsp = computeExtendedEpsilon(-dhrt[i], p[i + 1], q[i + 1], p[i], q[i]);\\\\n756:       double epsm = computeExtendedEpsilon(dhrt[i - 1], p[i - 1], q[i - 1], p[i], q[i]);\\\\n757:       PointSensitivityBuilder pSensi = discountFactors.zeroRatePointSensitivity(integrationSchedule.get(i))\\\\n758:           .multipliedBy(factor * (-dht[i] * q[i] * epsp - dht[i - 1] * q[i] * epsm));\\\\n759:       PointSensitivityBuilder qSensi = survivalProbabilities.zeroRatePointSensitivity(integrationSchedule.get(i))\\\\n760:           .multipliedBy(factor * (drt[i - 1] * p[i] * epsm + drt[i] * p[i] * epsp));\\\\n761:       pvSensi = pvSensi.combinedWith(pSensi).combinedWith(qSensi);\\\\n762:     }\\\\n763:     if (n \\\\u003e 1) {\\\\n764:       double epsLast = computeExtendedEpsilon(dhrt[n - 2], p[n - 2], q[n - 2], p[n - 1], q[n - 1]);\\\\n765:       pvSensi = pvSensi.combinedWith(discountFactors.zeroRatePointSensitivity(integrationSchedule.get(n - 1))\\\\n766:           .multipliedBy(-dht[n - 2] * q[n - 1] * epsLast * factor));\\\\n767:       pvSensi = pvSensi.combinedWith(survivalProbabilities.zeroRatePointSensitivity(integrationSchedule.get(n - 1))\\\\n768:           .multipliedBy(factor * (drt[n - 2] * p[n - 1] * epsLast - p[n - 1])));\\\\n769:     }\\\\n770: \\\\n771:     PointSensitivityBuilder dfSensi =\\\\n772:         discountFactors.zeroRatePointSensitivity(referenceDate).multipliedBy(-pv * factor / df);\\\\n773:     return dfSensi.combinedWith(pvSensi);\\\\n774:   }\\\\n775: \\\\n776:   private double computeExtendedEpsilon(double dhrt, double pn, double qn, double pd, double qd) {\\\\n777:     if (Math.abs(dhrt) \\\\u003c SMALL) {\\\\n778:       return -0.5 - dhrt / 6d - dhrt * dhrt / 24d;\\\\n779:     }\\\\n780:     return (1d - (pn * qn / (pd * qd) - 1d) / dhrt) / dhrt;\\\\n781:   }\\\\n782: \\\\n783:   PointSensitivityBuilder riskyAnnuitySensitivity(\\\\n784:       ResolvedCds cds,\\\\n785:       CreditDiscountFactors discountFactors,\\\\n786:       LegalEntitySurvivalProbabilities survivalProbabilities,\\\\n787:       LocalDate referenceDate,\\\\n788:       LocalDate stepinDate,\\\\n789:       LocalDate effectiveStartDate) {\\\\n790: \\\\n791:     double pv = 0d;\\\\n792:     PointSensitivityBuilder pvSensi = PointSensitivityBuilder.none();\\\\n793:     for (CreditCouponPaymentPeriod coupon : cds.getPaymentPeriods()) {\\\\n794:       if (stepinDate.isBefore(coupon.getEndDate())) {\\\\n795:         double q = survivalProbabilities.survivalProbability(coupon.getEffectiveEndDate());\\\\n796:         PointSensitivityBuilder qSensi = survivalProbabilities.zeroRatePointSensitivity(coupon.getEffectiveEndDate());\\\\n797:         double p = discountFactors.discountFactor(coupon.getPaymentDate());\\\\n798:         PointSensitivityBuilder pSensi = discountFactors.zeroRatePointSensitivity(coupon.getPaymentDate());\\\\n799:         pv += coupon.getYearFraction() * p * q;\\\\n800:         pvSensi = pvSensi.combinedWith(pSensi.multipliedBy(coupon.getYearFraction() * q)\\\\n801:             .combinedWith(qSensi.multipliedBy(coupon.getYearFraction() * p)));\\\\n802:       }\\\\n803:     }\\\\n804: \\\\n805:     if (cds.getPaymentOnDefault().isAccruedInterest()) {\\\\n806:       // This is needed so that the code is consistent with ISDA C when the Markit `fix' is used. \\\\n807:       LocalDate start = cds.getPaymentPeriods().size() == 1 ? effectiveStartDate : cds.getAccrualStartDate();\\\\n808:       DoubleArray integrationSchedule = DoublesScheduleGenerator.getIntegrationsPoints(\\\\n809:           discountFactors.relativeYearFraction(start),\\\\n810:           discountFactors.relativeYearFraction(cds.getProtectionEndDate()),\\\\n811:           discountFactors.getParameterKeys(),\\\\n812:           survivalProbabilities.getParameterKeys());\\\\n813:       for (CreditCouponPaymentPeriod coupon : cds.getPaymentPeriods()) {\\\\n814:         Pair\\\\u003cDouble, PointSensitivityBuilder\\\\u003e pvAndSensi = singlePeriodAccrualOnDefaultSensitivity(\\\\n815:             coupon, effectiveStartDate, integrationSchedule, discountFactors, survivalProbabilities);\\\\n816:         pv += pvAndSensi.getFirst();\\\\n817:         pvSensi = pvSensi.combinedWith(pvAndSensi.getSecond());\\\\n818:       }\\\\n819:     }\\\\n820: \\\\n821:     double df = discountFactors.discountFactor(referenceDate);\\\\n822:     PointSensitivityBuilder dfSensi =\\\\n823:         discountFactors.zeroRatePointSensitivity(referenceDate).multipliedBy(-pv / (df * df));\\\\n824:     pvSensi = pvSensi.multipliedBy(1d / df);\\\\n825: \\\\n826:     return dfSensi.combinedWith(pvSensi);\\\\n827:   }\\\\n828: \\\\n829:   private Pair\\\\u003cDouble, PointSensitivityBuilder\\\\u003e singlePeriodAccrualOnDefaultSensitivity(\\\\n830:       CreditCouponPaymentPeriod coupon,\\\\n831:       LocalDate effectiveStartDate,\\\\n832:       DoubleArray integrationSchedule,\\\\n833:       CreditDiscountFactors discountFactors,\\\\n834:       LegalEntitySurvivalProbabilities survivalProbabilities) {\\\\n835: \\\\n836:     LocalDate start =\\\\n837:         coupon.getEffectiveStartDate().isBefore(effectiveStartDate) ? effectiveStartDate : coupon.getEffectiveStartDate();\\\\n838:     if (!start.isBefore(coupon.getEffectiveEndDate())) {\\\\n839:       return Pair.of(0d, PointSensitivityBuilder.none()); //this coupon has already expired\\\\n840:     }\\\\n841:     DoubleArray knots = DoublesScheduleGenerator.truncateSetInclusive(discountFactors.relativeYearFraction(start),\\\\n842:         discountFactors.relativeYearFraction(coupon.getEffectiveEndDate()), integrationSchedule);\\\\n843:     // pv\\\\n844:     double pv = 0d;\\\\n845:     final int nItems = knots.size();\\\\n846:     double[] dhrtBar = new double[nItems - 1];\\\\n847:     double[] dhtBar = new double[nItems - 1];\\\\n848:     double[] bBar = new double[nItems];\\\\n849:     double[] p = new double[nItems];\\\\n850:     double[] q = new double[nItems];\\\\n851:     double t = knots.get(0);\\\\n852:     double ht0 = survivalProbabilities.zeroRate(t) * t;\\\\n853:     double rt0 = discountFactors.zeroRate(t) * t;\\\\n854:     q[0] = Math.exp(-ht0);\\\\n855:     p[0] = Math.exp(-rt0);\\\\n856:     double b0 = q[0] * p[0];\\\\n857:     double effStart = discountFactors.relativeYearFraction(coupon.getEffectiveStartDate());\\\\n858:     double t0 = t - effStart + omega;\\\\n859:     for (int i = 1; i \\\\u003c nItems; ++i) {\\\\n860:       t = knots.get(i);\\\\n861:       double ht1 = survivalProbabilities.zeroRate(t) * t;\\\\n862:       double rt1 = discountFactors.zeroRate(t) * t;\\\\n863:       q[i] = Math.exp(-ht1);\\\\n864:       p[i] = Math.exp(-rt1);\\\\n865:       double b1 = q[i] * p[i];\\\\n866:       double dt = knots.get(i) - knots.get(i - 1);\\\\n867:       double dht = ht1 - ht0;\\\\n868:       double drt = rt1 - rt0;\\\\n869:       double dhrt = dht + drt;\\\\n870:       double tPv;\\\\n871:       if (formula == AccrualOnDefaultFormula.MARKIT_FIX) {\\\\n872:         if (Math.abs(dhrt) \\\\u003c SMALL) {\\\\n873:           double eps = epsilonP(-dhrt);\\\\n874:           tPv = dht * dt * b0 * eps;\\\\n875:           dhtBar[i - 1] = dt * b0 * eps;\\\\n876:           dhrtBar[i - 1] = -dht * dt * b0 * epsilonPP(-dhrt);\\\\n877:           bBar[i - 1] += dht * eps;\\\\n878:         } else {\\\\n879:           tPv = dht * dt / dhrt * ((b0 - b1) / dhrt - b1);\\\\n880:           dhtBar[i - 1] = dt / dhrt * ((b0 - b1) / dhrt - b1);\\\\n881:           dhrtBar[i - 1] = dht * dt / (dhrt * dhrt) * (b1 - 2d * (b0 - b1) / dhrt);\\\\n882:           bBar[i - 1] += dht * dt / (dhrt * dhrt);\\\\n883:           bBar[i] += -dht * dt / dhrt * (1d + 1d / dhrt);\\\\n884:         }\\\\n885:       } else {\\\\n886:         double t1 = t - effStart + omega;\\\\n887:         if (Math.abs(dhrt) \\\\u003c SMALL) {\\\\n888:           double eps = epsilon(-dhrt);\\\\n889:           double epsp = epsilonP(-dhrt);\\\\n890:           tPv = dht * b0 * (t0 * eps + dt * epsp);\\\\n891:           dhtBar[i - 1] = b0 * (t0 * eps + dt * epsp);\\\\n892:           dhrtBar[i - 1] = -dht * b0 * (t0 * epsp + dt * epsilonPP(-dhrt));\\\\n893:           bBar[i - 1] += dht * (t0 * eps + dt * epsp);\\\\n894:         } else {\\\\n895:           tPv = dht / dhrt * (t0 * b0 - t1 * b1 + dt / dhrt * (b0 - b1));\\\\n896:           dhtBar[i - 1] = (t0 * b0 - t1 * b1 + dt / dhrt * (b0 - b1)) / dhrt;\\\\n897:           dhrtBar[i - 1] = dht / (dhrt * dhrt) * (-2d * dt / dhrt * (b0 - b1) - t0 * b0 + t1 * b1);\\\\n898:           bBar[i - 1] += dht / dhrt * (t0 + dt / dhrt);\\\\n899:           bBar[i] += dht / dhrt * (-t1 - dt / dhrt);\\\\n900:         }\\\\n901:         t0 = t1;\\\\n902:       }\\\\n903:       pv += tPv;\\\\n904:       ht0 = ht1;\\\\n905:       rt0 = rt1;\\\\n906:       b0 = b1;\\\\n907:     }\\\\n908:     double yfRatio = coupon.getYearFraction() /\\\\n909:         discountFactors.getDayCount().relativeYearFraction(coupon.getStartDate(), coupon.getEndDate());\\\\n910:     // pv sensitivity\\\\n911:     PointSensitivityBuilder qSensiFirst = survivalProbabilities.zeroRatePointSensitivity(knots.get(0))\\\\n912:         .multipliedBy(yfRatio * ((dhrtBar[0] + dhtBar[0]) / q[0] + bBar[0] * p[0]));\\\\n913:     PointSensitivityBuilder pSensiFirst = discountFactors.zeroRatePointSensitivity(knots.get(0))\\\\n914:         .multipliedBy(yfRatio * (dhrtBar[0] / p[0] + bBar[0] * q[0]));\\\\n915:     PointSensitivityBuilder pvSensi = pSensiFirst.combinedWith(qSensiFirst);\\\\n916:     for (int i = 1; i \\\\u003c nItems - 1; ++i) {\\\\n917:       PointSensitivityBuilder qSensi = survivalProbabilities.zeroRatePointSensitivity(knots.get(i)).multipliedBy(\\\\n918:           yfRatio * (-(dhrtBar[i - 1] + dhtBar[i - 1]) / q[i] + (dhrtBar[i] + dhtBar[i]) / q[i] + bBar[i] * p[i]));\\\\n919:       PointSensitivityBuilder pSensi = discountFactors.zeroRatePointSensitivity(knots.get(i)).multipliedBy(\\\\n920:           yfRatio * (-dhrtBar[i - 1] / p[i] + dhrtBar[i] / p[i] + bBar[i] * q[i]));\\\\n921:       pvSensi = pvSensi.combinedWith(pSensi).combinedWith(qSensi);\\\\n922:     }\\\\n923:     if (nItems \\\\u003e 1) {\\\\n924:       PointSensitivityBuilder qSensiLast = survivalProbabilities.zeroRatePointSensitivity(knots.get(nItems - 1)).multipliedBy(\\\\n925:           yfRatio * (-(dhrtBar[nItems - 2] + dhtBar[nItems - 2]) / q[nItems - 1] + bBar[nItems - 1] * p[nItems - 1]));\\\\n926:       PointSensitivityBuilder pSensiLast = discountFactors.zeroRatePointSensitivity(knots.get(nItems - 1)).multipliedBy(\\\\n927:           yfRatio * (-dhrtBar[nItems - 2] / p[nItems - 1] + bBar[nItems - 1] * q[nItems - 1]));\\\\n928:       pvSensi = pvSensi.combinedWith(pSensiLast).combinedWith(qSensiLast);\\\\n929:     }\\\\n930: \\\\n931:     return Pair.of(yfRatio * pv, pvSensi);\\\\n932:   }\\\\n933: \\\\n934:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\n935:   private boolean isExpired(ResolvedCds cds, CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider) {\\\\n936:     return !cds.getProtectionEndDate().isAfter(ratesProvider.getValuationDate());\\\\n937:   }\\\\n938: \\\\n939:   double recoveryRate(ResolvedCds cds, CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider) {\\\\n940:     RecoveryRates recoveryRates = ratesProvider.recoveryRates(cds.getLegalEntityId());\\\\n941:     ArgChecker.isTrue(recoveryRates instanceof ConstantRecoveryRates, \\\\\\\"recoveryRates must be ConstantRecoveryRates\\\\\\\");\\\\n942:     return recoveryRates.recoveryRate(cds.getProtectionEndDate());\\\\n943:   }\\\\n944: \\\\n945:   void validateRecoveryRates(ResolvedCds cds, CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider) {\\\\n946:     RecoveryRates recoveryRates = ratesProvider.recoveryRates(cds.getLegalEntityId());\\\\n947:     ArgChecker.isTrue(recoveryRates instanceof ConstantRecoveryRates, \\\\\\\"recoveryRates must be ConstantRecoveryRates\\\\\\\");\\\\n948:   }\\\\n949: \\\\n950:   private Pair\\\\u003cCreditDiscountFactors, LegalEntitySurvivalProbabilities\\\\u003e reduceDiscountFactors(\\\\n951:       ResolvedCds cds,\\\\n952:       CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider) {\\\\n953: \\\\n954:     Currency currency = cds.getCurrency();\\\\n955:     CreditDiscountFactors discountFactors = ratesProvider.discountFactors(currency);\\\\n956:     ArgChecker.isTrue(discountFactors.isIsdaCompliant(), \\\\\\\"discount factors must be IsdaCompliantZeroRateDiscountFactors\\\\\\\");\\\\n957:     LegalEntitySurvivalProbabilities survivalProbabilities =\\\\n958:         ratesProvider.survivalProbabilities(cds.getLegalEntityId(), currency);\\\\n959:     ArgChecker.isTrue(survivalProbabilities.getSurvivalProbabilities().isIsdaCompliant(),\\\\n960:         \\\\\\\"survival probabilities must be IsdaCompliantZeroRateDiscountFactors\\\\\\\");\\\\n961:     ArgChecker.isTrue(discountFactors.getDayCount().equals(survivalProbabilities.getSurvivalProbabilities().getDayCount()),\\\\n962:         \\\\\\\"day count conventions of discounting curve and credit curve must be the same\\\\\\\");\\\\n963:     return Pair.of(discountFactors, survivalProbabilities);\\\\n964:   }\\\\n965: \\\\n966: }\\\\n967: \\\",\\\"url\\\":\\\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/Strata--66225ca9@9d9ab49ce264443ddb305a8b1df6f48d01a2c67c/-/blob/modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/credit/IsdaCdsProductPricer.java\\\"}\", \"annotations\": null, \"meta\": null}], \"structuredContent\": {\"content\": \"1: /*\\n2:  * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\\n3:  *\\n4:  * Please see distribution for license.\\n5:  */\\n6: package com.opengamma.strata.pricer.credit;\\n7: \\n8: import static com.opengamma.strata.math.impl.util.Epsilon.epsilon;\\n9: import static com.opengamma.strata.math.impl.util.Epsilon.epsilonP;\\n10: import static com.opengamma.strata.math.impl.util.Epsilon.epsilonPP;\\n11: \\n12: import java.time.LocalDate;\\n13: \\n14: import com.google.common.collect.ImmutableMap;\\n15: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData;\\n16: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.StandardId;\\n17: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Currency;\\n18: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\\n19: import com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\\n20: import com.opengamma.strata.collect.array.DoubleArray;\\n21: import com.opengamma.strata.collect.tuple.Pair;\\n22: import com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivityBuilder;\\n23: import com.opengamma.strata.math.impl.util.Epsilon;\\n24: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.common.PriceType;\\n25: import com.opengamma.strata.product.credit.CreditCouponPaymentPeriod;\\n26: import com.opengamma.strata.product.credit.ResolvedCds;\\n27: \\n28: /**\\n29:  * Pricer for single-name credit default swaps (CDS) based on ISDA standard model. \\n30:  * <p>\\n31:  * The implementation is
