\"annotations\": null, \"meta\": null}], \"structuredContent\": {\"content\": \"1: /*\\n2:  * Copyright (C) 2017 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\\n3:  *\\n4:  * Please see distribution for license.\\n5:  */\\n6: package com.opengamma.strata.measure.credit;\\n7: \\n8: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData;\\n9: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\\n10: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.MultiCurrencyAmount;\\n11: import com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\\n12: import com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.CurrencyScenarioArray;\\n13: import com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.DoubleScenarioArray;\\n14: import com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.MultiCurrencyScenarioArray;\\n15: import com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.ScenarioArray;\\n16: import com.opengamma.strata.market.param.CurrencyParameterSensitivities;\\n17: import com.opengamma.strata.market.param.CurrencyParameterSensitivity;\\n18: import com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivities;\\n19: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.common.PriceType;\\n20: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.credit.AccrualOnDefaultFormula;\\n21: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.credit.AnalyticSpreadSensitivityCalculator;\\n22: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.credit.CdsMarketQuoteConverter;\\n23: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.credit.CreditRatesProvider;\\n24: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.credit.IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexTradePricer;\\n25: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.credit.JumpToDefault;\\n26: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.credit.SpreadSensitivityCalculator;\\n27: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.sensitivity.MarketQuoteSensitivityCalculator;\\n28: import com.opengamma.strata.product.credit.ResolvedCdsIndexTrade;\\n29: import com.opengamma.strata.product.credit.ResolvedCdsTrade;\\n30: \\n31: /**\\n32:  * Multi-scenario measure calculations for CDS index trades.\\n33:  * <p>\\n34:  * Each method corresponds to a measure, typically calculated by one or more calls to the pricer.\\n35:  */\\n36: final class CdsIndexMeasureCalculations {\\n37: \\n38:   /**\\n39:    * Default implementation.\\n40:    */\\n41:   public static final CdsIndexMeasureCalculations DEFAULT =\\n42:       new CdsIndexMeasureCalculations(new IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexTradePricer(AccrualOnDefaultFormula.CORRECT));\\n43: \\n44:   /**\\n45:    * The market quote sensitivity calculator.\\n46:    */\\n47:   private static final MarketQuoteSensitivityCalculator MARKET_QUOTE_SENS = MarketQuoteSensitivityCalculator.DEFAULT;\\n48:   /**\\n49:    * One basis point, expressed as a {@code double}.\\n50:    */\\n51:   private static final double ONE_BASIS_POINT = 1e-4;\\n52: \\n53:   /**\\n54:    * Pricer for {@link ResolvedCdsIndexTrade}.\\n55:    */\\n56:   private final IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexTradePricer tradePricer;\\n57:   /**\\n58:    * Spread sensitivity calculator.\\n59:    */\\n60:   private final SpreadSensitivityCalculator cs01Calculator;\\n61:   /**\\n62:    * Market quote converter.\\n63:    */\\n64:   private final CdsMarketQuoteConverter converter;\\n65: \\n66:   /**\\n67:    * Creates an instance. \\n68:    * \\n69:    * @param tradePricer  the pricer for {@link ResolvedCdsTrade}\\n70:    */\\n71:   public CdsIndexMeasureCalculations(IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexTradePricer tradePricer) {\\n72:     this.tradePricer = ArgChecker.notNull(tradePricer, \\\"tradePricer\\\");\\n73:     this.cs01Calculator = new AnalyticSpreadSensitivityCalculator(tradePricer.getAccrualOnDefaultFormula());\\n74:     this.converter = new CdsMarketQuoteConverter(tradePricer.getAccrualOnDefaultFormula());\\n75:   }\\n76: \\n77:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n78:   // calculates present value for all scenarios\\n79:   CurrencyScenarioArray presentValue(\\n80:       ResolvedCdsIndexTrade trade,\\n81:       CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData,\\n82:       ReferenceData refData) {\\n83: \\n84:     return CurrencyScenarioArray.of(\\n85:         marketData.getScenarioCount(),\\n86:         i -> presentValue(trade, marketData.scenario(i).creditRatesProvider(), PriceType.DIRTY, refData));\\n87:   }\\n88: \\n89:   // calculates present value for one scenario\\n90:   CurrencyAmount presentValue(\\n91:       ResolvedCdsIndexTrade trade,\\n92:       CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n93:       PriceType priceType,\\n94:       ReferenceData refData) {\\n95: \\n96:     return tradePricer.presentValue(trade, ratesProvider, priceType, refData);\\n97:   }\\n98: \\n99:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n100:   // calculates principal for all scenarios\\n101:   CurrencyScenarioArray principal(\\n102:       ResolvedCdsIndexTrade trade,\\n103:       CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData,\\n104:       ReferenceData refData) {\\n105: \\n106:     return CurrencyScenarioArray.of(\\n107:         marketData.getScenarioCount(),\\n108:         i -> principal(trade, marketData.scenario(i).creditRatesProvider(), refData));\\n109:   }\\n110: \\n111:   // calculates principal for one scenario\\n112:   CurrencyAmount principal(\\n113:       ResolvedCdsIndexTrade trade,\\n114:       CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n115:       ReferenceData refData) {\\n116: \\n117:     return tradePricer.presentValueOnSettle(trade, ratesProvider, PriceType.CLEAN, refData);\\n118:   }\\n119: \\n120:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n121:   // calculates price for all scenarios\\n122:   DoubleScenarioArray unitPrice(\\n123:       ResolvedCdsIndexTrade trade,\\n124:       CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData,\\n125:       ReferenceData refData) {\\n126: \\n127:     return DoubleScenarioArray.of(\\n128:         marketData.getScenarioCount(),\\n129:         i -> unitPrice(trade, marketData.scenario(i).creditRatesProvider(), refData));\\n130:   }\\n131: \\n132:   // calculates price for one scenario\\n133:   double unitPrice(\\n134:       ResolvedCdsIndexTrade trade,\\n135:       CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n136:       ReferenceData refData) {\\n137: \\n138:     double puf = tradePricer.price(trade, ratesProvider, PriceType.CLEAN, refData);\\n139:     return converter.cleanPriceFromPointsUpfront(puf);\\n140:   }\\n141: \\n142:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n143:   // calculates calibrated parallel IR01 for all scenarios\\n144:   CurrencyScenarioArray ir01CalibratedParallel(\\n145:       ResolvedCdsIndexTrade trade,\\n146:       CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData,\\n147:       ReferenceData refData) {\\n148: \\n149:     return CurrencyScenarioArray.of(\\n150:         marketData.getScenarioCount(),\\n151:         i -> ir01CalibratedParallel(trade, marketData.scenario(i).creditRatesProvider(), refData));\\n152:   }\\n153: \\n154:   // calculates calibrated parallel IR01 for one scenario\\n155:   CurrencyAmount ir01CalibratedParallel(\\n156:       ResolvedCdsIndexTrade trade,\\n157:       CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n158:       ReferenceData refData) {\\n159: \\n160:     PointSensitivities pointSensitivity = tradePricer.presentValueOnSettleSensitivity(trade, ratesProvider, refData);\\n161:     CurrencyParameterSensitivity irSensitivity = ratesProvider.singleDiscountCurveParameterSensitivity(\\n162:         pointSensitivity,\\n163:         trade.getProduct().getCurrency());\\n164:     return irSensitivity.total().multipliedBy(ONE_BASIS_POINT);\\n165:   }\\n166: \\n167:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n168:   // calculates calibrated bucketed IR01 for all scenarios\\n169:   ScenarioArray<CurrencyParameterSensitivity> ir01CalibratedBucketed(\\n170:       ResolvedCdsIndexTrade trade,\\n171:       CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData,\\n172:       ReferenceData refData) {\\n173: \\n174:     return ScenarioArray.of(\\n175:         marketData.getScenarioCount(),\\n176:         i -> ir01CalibratedBucketed(trade, marketData.scenario(i).creditRatesProvider(), refData));\\n177:   }\\n178: \\n179:   // calculates calibrated bucketed IR01 for one scenario\\n180:   CurrencyParameterSensitivity ir01CalibratedBucketed(\\n181:       ResolvedCdsIndexTrade trade,\\n182:       CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n183:       ReferenceData refData) {\\n184: \\n185:     PointSensitivities pointSensitivity = tradePricer.presentValueOnSettleSensitivity(trade, ratesProvider, refData);\\n186:     CurrencyParameterSensitivity irSensitivity = ratesProvider.singleDiscountCurveParameterSensitivity(\\n187:         pointSensitivity,\\n188:         trade.getProduct().getCurrency());\\n189:     return irSensitivity.multipliedBy(ONE_BASIS_POINT);\\n190:   }\\n191: \\n192:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n193:   // calculates market quote parallel IR01 for all scenarios\\n194:   MultiCurrencyScenarioArray ir01MarketQuoteParallel(\\n195:       ResolvedCdsIndexTrade trade,\\n196:       CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData,\\n197:       ReferenceData refData) {\\n198: \\n199:     return MultiCurrencyScenarioArray.of(\\n200:         marketData.getScenarioCount(),\\n201:         i -> ir01MarketQuoteParallel(trade, marketData.scenario(i).creditRatesProvider(), refData));\\n202:   }\\n203: \\n204:   // calculates market quote parallel IR01 for one scenario\\n205:   MultiCurrencyAmount ir01MarketQuoteParallel(\\n206:       ResolvedCdsIndexTrade trade,\\n207:       CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n208:       ReferenceData refData) {\\n209: \\n210:     PointSensitivities pointSensitivity = tradePricer.presentValueOnSettleSensitivity(trade, ratesProvider, refData);\\n211:     CurrencyParameterSensitivity parameterSensitivity =\\n212:         ratesProvider.singleDiscountCurveParameterSensitivity(pointSensitivity, trade.getProduct().getCurrency());\\n213:     CurrencyParameterSensitivities irSensitivity = MARKET_QUOTE_SENS.sensitivity(\\n214:         CurrencyParameterSensitivities.of(parameterSensitivity),\\n215:         ratesProvider);\\n216:     return irSensitivity.total().multipliedBy(ONE_BASIS_POINT);\\n217:   }\\n218: \\n219:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n220:   // calculates market quote bucketed IR01 for all scenarios\\n221:   ScenarioArray<CurrencyParameterSensitivities> ir01MarketQuoteBucketed(\\n222:       ResolvedCdsIndexTrade trade,\\n223:       CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData,\\n224:       ReferenceData refData) {\\n225: \\n226:     return ScenarioArray.of(\\n227:         marketData.getScenarioCount(),\\n228:         i -> ir01MarketQuoteBucketed(trade, marketData.scenario(i).creditRatesProvider(), refData));\\n229:   }\\n230: \\n231:   // calculates market quote bucketed IR01 for one scenario\\n232:   CurrencyParameterSensitivities ir01MarketQuoteBucketed(\\n233:       ResolvedCdsIndexTrade trade,\\n234:       CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n235:       ReferenceData refData) {\\n236: \\n237:     PointSensitivities pointSensitivity = tradePricer.presentValueOnSettleSensitivity(trade, ratesProvider, refData);\\n238:     CurrencyParameterSensitivity parameterSensitivity = ratesProvider.singleDiscountCurveParameterSensitivity(\\n239:         pointSensitivity,\\n240:         trade.getProduct().getCurrency());\\n241:     CurrencyParameterSensitivities irSensitivity = MARKET_QUOTE_SENS.sensitivity(\\n242:         CurrencyParameterSensitivities.of(parameterSensitivity),\\n243:         ratesProvider);\\n244:     return irSensitivity.multipliedBy(ONE_BASIS_POINT);\\n245:   }\\n246: \\n247:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n248:   // calculates calibrated sum PV01 for all scenarios\\n249:   MultiCurrencyScenarioArray pv01CalibratedSum(\\n250:       ResolvedCdsIndexTrade trade,\\n251:       CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData,\\n252:       ReferenceData refData) {\\n253: \\n254:     return MultiCurrencyScenarioArray.of(\\n255:         marketData.getScenarioCount(),\\n256:         i -> pv01CalibratedSum(trade, marketData.scenario(i).creditRatesProvider(), refData));\\n257:   }\\n258: \\n259:   // calculates calibrated sum PV01 for one scenario\\n260:   MultiCurrencyAmount pv01CalibratedSum(\\n261:       ResolvedCdsIndexTrade trade,\\n262:       CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n263:       ReferenceData refData) {\\n264: \\n265:     PointSensitivities pointSensitivity = tradePricer.presentValueSensitivity(trade, ratesProvider, refData);\\n266:     return ratesProvider.parameterSensitivity(pointSensitivity).total().multipliedBy(ONE_BASIS_POINT);\\n267:   }\\n268: \\n269:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n270:   // calculates calibrated bucketed PV01 for all scenarios\\n271:   ScenarioArray<CurrencyParameterSensitivities> pv01CalibratedBucketed(\\n272:       ResolvedCdsIndexTrade trade,\\n273:       CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData,\\n274:       ReferenceData refData) {\\n275: \\n276:     return ScenarioArray.of(\\n277:         marketData.getScenarioCount(),\\n278:         i -> pv01CalibratedBucketed(trade, marketData.scenario(i).creditRatesProvider(), refData));\\n279:   }\\n280: \\n281:   // calculates calibrated bucketed PV01 for one scenario\\n282:   CurrencyParameterSensitivities pv01CalibratedBucketed(\\n283:       ResolvedCdsIndexTrade trade,\\n284:       CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n285:       ReferenceData refData) {\\n286: \\n287:     PointSensitivities pointSensitivity = tradePricer.presentValueSensitivity(trade, ratesProvider, refData);\\n288:     return ratesProvider.parameterSensitivity(pointSensitivity).multipliedBy(ONE_BASIS_POINT);\\n289:   }\\n290: \\n291:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n292:   // calculates market quote sum PV01 for all scenarios\\n293:   MultiCurrencyScenarioArray pv01MarketQuoteSum(\\n294:       ResolvedCdsIndexTrade trade,\\n295:       CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData,\\n296:       ReferenceData refData) {\\n297: \\n298:     return MultiCurrencyScenarioArray.of(\\n299:         marketData.getScenarioCount(),\\n300:         i -> pv01MarketQuoteSum(trade, marketData.scenario(i).creditRatesProvider(), refData));\\n301:   }\\n302: \\n303:   // calculates market quote sum PV01 for one scenario\\n304:   MultiCurrencyAmount pv01MarketQuoteSum(\\n305:       ResolvedCdsIndexTrade trade,\\n306:       CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n307:       ReferenceData refData) {\\n308: \\n309:     PointSensitivities pointSensitivity = tradePricer.presentValueSensitivity(trade, ratesProvider, refData);\\n310:     CurrencyParameterSensitivities parameterSensitivity = ratesProvider.parameterSensitivity(pointSensitivity);\\n311:     CurrencyParameterSensitivities quoteSensitivity = MARKET_QUOTE_SENS.sensitivity(parameterSensitivity, ratesProvider);\\n312:     return quoteSensitivity.total().multipliedBy(ONE_BASIS_POINT);\\n313:   }\\n314: \\n315:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n316:   // calculates market quote bucketed PV01 for all scenarios\\n317:   ScenarioArray<CurrencyParameterSensitivities> pv01MarketQuoteBucketed(\\n318:       ResolvedCdsIndexTrade trade,\\n319:       CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData,\\n320:       ReferenceData refData) {\\n321: \\n322:     return ScenarioArray.of(\\n323:         marketData.getScenarioCount(),\\n324:         i -> pv01MarketQuoteBucketed(trade, marketData.scenario(i).creditRatesProvider(), refData));\\n325:   }\\n326: \\n327:   // calculates market quote bucketed PV01 for one scenario\\n328:   CurrencyParameterSensitivities pv01MarketQuoteBucketed(\\n329:       ResolvedCdsIndexTrade trade,\\n330:       CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n331:       ReferenceData refData) {\\n332: \\n333:     PointSensitivities pointSensitivity = tradePricer.presentValueSensitivity(trade, ratesProvider, refData);\\n334:     CurrencyParameterSensitivities parameterSensitivity = ratesProvider.parameterSensitivity(pointSensitivity);\\n335:     return MARKET_QUOTE_SENS.sensitivity(parameterSensitivity, ratesProvider).multipliedBy(ONE_BASIS_POINT);\\n336:   }\\n337: \\n338:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n339:   // calculates parallel CS01 for all scenarios\\n340:   CurrencyScenarioArray cs01Parallel(\\n341:       ResolvedCdsIndexTrade trade,\\n342:       CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData,\\n343:       ReferenceData refData) {\\n344: \\n345:     return CurrencyScenarioArray.of(\\n346:         marketData.getScenarioCount(),\\n347:         i -> cs01Parallel(trade, marketData.scenario(i).creditRatesProvider(), refData));\\n348:   }\\n349: \\n350:   // calculates parallel CS01 for one scenario\\n351:   CurrencyAmount cs01Parallel(\\n352:       ResolvedCdsIndexTrade trade,\\n353:       CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n354:       ReferenceData refData) {\\n355: \\n356:     return cs01Calculator.parallelCs01(trade, ratesProvider, refData);\\n357:   }\\n358: \\n359:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n360:   // calculates bucketed CS01 for all scenarios\\n361:   ScenarioArray<CurrencyParameterSensitivity> cs01Bucketed(\\n362:       ResolvedCdsIndexTrade trade,\\n363:       CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData,\\n364:       ReferenceData refData) {\\n365: \\n366:     return ScenarioArray.of(\\n367:         marketData.getScenarioCount(),\\n368:         i -> cs01Bucketed(trade, marketData.scenario(i).creditRatesProvider(), refData));\\n369:   }\\n370: \\n371:   // calculates bucketed CS01 for one scenario\\n372:   CurrencyParameterSensitivity cs01Bucketed(\\n373:       ResolvedCdsIndexTrade trade,\\n374:       CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n375:       ReferenceData refData) {\\n376: \\n377:     return cs01Calculator.bucketedCs01(trade, ratesProvider, refData);\\n378:   }\\n379: \\n380:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n381:   // calculates recovery01 for all scenarios\\n382:   CurrencyScenarioArray recovery01(\\n383:       ResolvedCdsIndexTrade trade,\\n384:       CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData,\\n385:       ReferenceData refData) {\\n386: \\n387:     return CurrencyScenarioArray.of(\\n388:         marketData.getScenarioCount(),\\n389:         i -> recovery01(trade, marketData.scenario(i).creditRatesProvider(), refData));\\n390:   }\\n391: \\n392:   // calculates recovery01 for one scenario\\n393:   CurrencyAmount recovery01(\\n394:       ResolvedCdsIndexTrade trade,\\n395:       CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n396:       ReferenceData refData) {\\n397: \\n398:     return tradePricer.recovery01OnSettle(trade, ratesProvider, refData);\\n399:   }\\n400: \\n401:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n402:   // calculates jump-to-default for all scenarios\\n403:   ScenarioArray<JumpToDefault> jumpToDefault(\\n404:       ResolvedCdsIndexTrade trade,\\n405:       CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData,\\n406: ResolvedCdsIndexTrade trade,\\n416:       CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n417:       ReferenceData refData) {\\n418: \\n419:     return tradePricer.jumpToDefault(trade, ratesProvider, refData);\\n420:   }\\n421: \\n422:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n423:   // calculates expected loss for all scenarios\\n424:   CurrencyScenarioArray expectedLoss(\\n425:       ResolvedCdsIndexTrade trade,\\n426:       CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData,\\n427:       ReferenceData refData) {\\n428: \\n429:     return 13. think @ 2026-03-11T18:24:45.562800

Input

{
  "thought": "Now I have enough context. Let me plan the implementation:\n\n1. **CdsTranche.java** - Product class, similar to CdsIndex but with:\n   - `underlyingIndex` field (CdsIndex reference instead of CdsIndexId + legalEntityIds - we'll keep similar structure)\n   - `attachmentPoint` (double, 0.0-1.0)\n   - `detachmentPoint` (double, 0.0-1.0)\n   - All the same fields as CdsIndex (buySell, currency, notional, paymentSchedule, fixedRate, etc.)\n   - `resolve()` produces `ResolvedCdsTranche`\n\n2. **CdsTrancheTrade.java** - Trade wrapper, same as CdsIndexTrade but for CdsTranche\n\n3. **ResolvedCdsTranche.java** - Resolved form, similar to ResolvedCdsIndex but with:\n   - `attachmentPoint` and `detachmentPoint` additional fields\n   - Similar payment periods structure\n\n4. **IsdaCdsTranchePricer.java** - The pricer:\n   - Contains `presentValue()` method\n   - Needs to compute tranche-specific PV using attachment/detachment points\n   - Can delegate to IsdaCdsProductPricer for individual CDS legs\n   - Tranche loss allocation: protection covers losses between attachment and detachment points\n   - Effective protection = min(loss, detachmentPoint) - attachmentPoint when loss > attachmentPoint\n\n5. **CdsTrancheTradeCalculationFunction.java** - Calculation function:\n   - Follows CdsIndexTradeCalculationFunction pattern\n   - Support PRESENT_VALUE and other measures\n\nLet me look at the IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexProductPricer briefly to understand more complex pricing.\n\nActually, let me think about what should be in each file...\n\nFor `CdsTranche`:\n- It should implement `Product` and `Resolvable<ResolvedCdsTranche>`\n- Fields needed per the spec:\n  - `underlyingIndex` (CdsIndex) - the underlying CDS index\n  - `attachmentPoint` (double)\n  - `detachmentPoint` (double)\n  - `protectionStart` (ProtectionStartOfDay)  \n  - `buySell` (BuySell)\n  - `currency` (Currency)\n  - `notional` (double)\n  - `fixedRate` (double)\n  - `paymentSchedule` (PeriodicSchedule)\n\nWait, looking at the spec more carefully. The spec says:\n- `underlyingIndex` (CdsIndex reference) - rather than a `StandardId`, it could be an actual `CdsIndex` object\n- Or alternatively a `StandardId cdsIndexId` similar to CdsIndex having `cdsIndexId`\n\nI think the cleanest design is to include the full CdsIndex inside CdsTranche as the underlying, plus the tranche-specific fields. This way the product has all the info needed.\n\nActually, I'll follow the CdsIndex pattern closely but add:\n- `attachmentPoint` \n- `detachmentPoint`\nThe `underlyingIndex` field makes most sense as a `CdsIndex` object or as `StandardId cdsIndexId` + `legalEntityIds`. Let me use a `StandardId cdsIndexId` + `legalEntityIds` approach, mirroring CdsIndex, and add `attachmentPoint` and `detachmentPoint`.\n\nFor the resolve() method:\n- The resolved product has all the payment periods computed from the schedule\n- Plus attachment and detachment points\n\nFor the pricer:\n- Simple approach: treat the tranche as a modified CDS index\n- Protection leg = (1-recoveryRate) * expected loss in [attachmentPoint, detachmentPoint] range\n- Use IsdaCdsProductPricer internally\n\nFor IsdaCdsTranchePricer:\n- Can reuse `IsdaCdsProductPricer` to compute the base protection leg and risky annuity\n- Scale the protection leg by (1/trancheWidth) to get tranche-specific protection\n- The tranche notional effectively covers losses from attachment to detachment\n\nActually for a proper tranche pricer we'd need a portfolio credit model (like Gaussian copula or large homogeneous pool). For simplicity, I'll implement:\n1. A simplified version that scales the CDS index protection/premium legs by the tranche factor (detachmentPoint - attachmentPoint)\n2. The key tranche-specific adjustment is that the protection leg only covers losses within the tranche range\n\nFor the measure calculations:\n- Create `CdsTrancheMeasureCalculations.java` to wrap the pricer\n- `CdsTrancheTradeCalculationFunction.java` to wire it up\n\nLet me now create the files. I need to understand the directory structure where I should put files locally.\n\nThe working directory is where I create files. The paths should be relative to the repo root:\n- `modules/product/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/product/credit/CdsTranche.java`\n- `modules/product/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/product/credit/CdsTrancheTrade.java`\n- `modules/product/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/product/credit/ResolvedCdsTranche.java`\n- `modules/product/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/product/credit/ResolvedCdsTrancheT rade.java`\n- `modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/credit/IsdaCdsTranchePricer.java`\n- `modules/measure/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/credit/CdsTrancheTradeCalculationFunction.java`\n\nI also need to add a `ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade.java` (the resolved trade form), modeled after `ResolvedCdsIndexTrade`.\n\nLet me compute correct Java hash codes for the new fields:\n- \"attachmentPoint\".hashCode() = we don't need to manually compute these, we can look at patterns and let Java compute them\n- Actually in the autogenerated code, the switch statements use the hash codes.   "file_text": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.product.credit;\n\nimport java.io.Serializable;\nimport java.time.LocalDate;\nimport java.util.List;\nimport java.util.Map;\nimport java.util.NoSuchElementException;\n\nimport org.joda.beans.Bean;\nimport org.joda.beans.ImmutableBean;\nimport org.joda.beans.JodaBeanUtils;\nimport org.joda.beans.MetaBean;\nimport org.joda.beans.MetaProperty;\nimport org.joda.beans.gen.BeanDefinition;\nimport org.joda.beans.gen.ImmutableDefaults;\nimport org.joda.beans.gen.ImmutablePreBuild;\nimport org.joda.beans.gen.ImmutableValidator;\nimport org.joda.beans.gen.PropertyDefinition;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectFieldsBeanBuilder;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaBean;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaProperty;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaPropertyMap;\n\nimport com.google.common.collect.ImmutableList;\nimport com.google.common.collect.ImmutableSet;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.Resolvable;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.StandardId;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Currency;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.date.BusinessDayAdjustment;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.date.BusinessDayConventions;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.date.DayCount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.date.DayCounts;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.date.DaysAdjustment;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.date.HolidayCalendarId;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.schedule.Frequency;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.schedule.PeriodicSchedule;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.schedule.RollConventions;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.schedule.Schedule;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.schedule.SchedulePeriod;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.schedule.StubConvention;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.Product;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.common.BuySell;\n\n/**\n * A CDS index tranche product.\n * <p>\n * A CDS tranche is a slice of credit risk from a CDS index portfolio, defined by\n * attachment and detachment points that determine the subordination level.\n * The protection buyer periodically pays fixed coupons to the protection seller until expiry.\n * In return, the protection buyer receives compensation for portfolio losses within\n * the tranche range [attachmentPoint, detachmentPoint].\n */\n@BeanDefinition\npublic final class CdsTranche\n    implements Product, Resolvable<ResolvedCdsTranche>, ImmutableBean, Serializable {\n\n  /**\n   * Whether the CDS tranche is buy or sell.\n   * <p>\n   * A value of 'Buy' implies buying protection, where the fixed coupon is paid\n   * and the protection is received in the event of defaults within the tranche.\n   * A value of 'Sell' implies selling protection, where the fixed coupon is received\n   * and the protection is paid for losses in the tranche.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final BuySell buySell;\n  /**\n   * The CDS index identifier underlying this tranche.\n   * <p>\n   * This identifier refers to the CDS index on which this tranche is based.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final StandardId cdsIndexId;\n  /**\n   * The legal entity identifiers.\n   * <p>\n   * These identifiers refer to the reference legal entities of the underlying CDS index.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final ImmutableList<StandardId> legalEntityIds;\n  /**\n   * The attachment point of the tranche.\n   * <p>\n   * The attachment point defines the lower boundary of the tranche as a fraction\n   * of the total portfolio notional (between 0.0 and 1.0).\n   * Losses below this level are absorbed by more junior tranches.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition\n  private final double attachmentPoint;\n  /**\n   * The detachment point of the tranche.\n   * <p>\n   * The detachment point defines the upper boundary of the tranche as a fraction\n   * of the total portfolio notional (between 0.0 and 1.0).\n   * Losses above this level are absorbed by more senior tranches.\n   * Must be greater than the attachment point.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition\n  private final double detachmentPoint;\n  /**\n   * The currency of the CDS tranche.\n   * <p>\n   * The amounts of the notional are expressed in terms of this currency.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final Currency currency;\n  /**\n   * The notional amount, must be non-negative.\n   * <p>\n   * The fixed notional amount applicable during the lifetime of the tranche.\n   * The currency of the notional is specified by {@code currency}.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"ArgChecker.notNegativeOrZero\")\n  private final double notional;\n  /**\n   * The payment schedule.\n   * <p>\n   * This is used to define the payment periods.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final PeriodicSchedule paymentSchedule;\n  /**\n   * The fixed coupon rate.\n   * <p>\n   * This must be represented in decimal form.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"ArgChecker.notNegative\")\n  private final double fixedRate;\n  /**\n   * The day count convention.\n   * <p>\n   * This is used to convert dates to a numerical value.\n   * <p>\n   * When building, this will default to 'Act/360'.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final DayCount dayCount;\n  /**\n   * The payment on default.\n   * <p>\n   * Whether the accrued premium is paid in the event of a default.\n   * <p>\n   * When building, this will default to 'AccruedPremium'.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final PaymentOnDefault paymentOnDefault;\n  /**\n   * The protection start of the day.\n   * <p>\n   * When the protection starts on the start date.\n   * <p>\n   * When building, this will default to 'Beginning'.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final ProtectionStartOfDay protectionStart;\n  /**\n   * The number of days between valuation date and step-in date.\n   * <p>\n   * The step-in date is also called protection effective date.\n   * It is usually 1 calendar day for standardized CDS contracts.\n   * <p>\n   * When building, this will default to 1 calendar day.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final DaysAdjustment stepinDateOffset;\n  /**\n   * The number of days between valuation date and settlement date.\n   * <p>\n   * It is usually 3 business days for standardized CDS contracts.\n   * <p>\n   * When building, this will default to 3 business days in the calendar of the payment schedule.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final DaysAdjustment settlementDateOffset;\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Creates an instance of a standardized CDS tranche.\n   *\n   * @param buySell  buy or sell\n   * @param cdsIndexId  the CDS index ID\n   * @param legalEntityIds  the legal entity IDs\n   * @param attachmentPoint  the attachment point (0.0 to 1.0)\n   * @param detachmentPoint  the detachment point (0.0 to 1.0, greater than attachment)\n   * @param currency  the currency\n   * @param notional  the notional\n   * @param startDate  the start date\n   * @param endDate  the end date\n   * @param calendar  the calendar\n   * @param paymentFrequency  the payment frequency\n   * @param fixedRate  the fixed coupon rate\n   * @return the instance\n   */\n  public static CdsTranche of(\n      BuySell buySell,\n      StandardId cdsIndexId,\n      List<StandardId> legalEntityIds,\n      double attachmentPoint,\n      double detachmentPoint,\n      Currency currency,\n      double notional,\n      LocalDate startDate,\n      LocalDate endDate,\n      Frequency paymentFrequency,\n      HolidayCalendarId calendar,\n      double fixedRate) {\n\n    PeriodicSchedule accrualSchedule = PeriodicSchedule.builder()\n        .businessDayAdjustment(BusinessDayAdjustment.of(BusinessDayConventions.FOLLOWING, calendar))\n        .startDate(startDate)\n        .endDate(endDate)\n        .startDateBusinessDayAdjustment(BusinessDayAdjustment.NONE)\n        .endDateBusinessDayAdjustment(BusinessDayAdjustment.NONE)\n        .frequency(paymentFrequency)\n        .rollConvention(RollConventions.NONE)\n        .stubConvention(StubConvention.SMART_INITIAL)\n        .build();\n    return new CdsTranche(\n        buySell,\n        cdsIndexId,\n        legalEntityIds,\n        attachmentPoint,\n        detachmentPoint,\n        currency,\n        notional,\n        accrualSchedule,\n        fixedRate,\n        DayCounts.ACT_360,\n        PaymentOnDefault.ACCRUED_PREMIUM,\n        ProtectionStartOfDay.BEGINNING,\n        DaysAdjustment.ofCalendarDays(1),\n        DaysAdjustment.ofBusinessDays(3, calendar));\n  }\n\n  @ImmutableDefaults\n  private static void applyDefaults(Builder builder) {\n    builder.dayCount = DayCounts.ACT_360;\n    builder.paymentOnDefault = PaymentOnDefault.ACCRUED_PREMIUM;\n    builder.protectionStart = ProtectionStartOfDay.BEGINNING;\n    builder.stepinDateOffset = DaysAdjustment.ofCalendarDays(1);\n  }\n\n  @ImmutablePreBuild\n  private static void preBuild(Builder builder) {\n    if (builder.settlementDateOffset == null && builder.paymentSchedule != null) {\n      builder.settlementDateOffset =\n          DaysAdjustment.ofBusinessDays(3, builder.paymentSchedule.getBusinessDayAdjustment().getCalendar());\n    }\n  }\n\n  @ImmutableValidator\n  private void validate() {\n    ArgChecker.inRange(attachmentPoint, 0d, 1d, \"attachmentPoint\");\n    ArgChecker.inRange(detachmentPoint, 0d, 1d, \"detachmentPoint\");\n    ArgChecker.isTrue(detachmentPoint > attachmentPoint,\n        \"detachmentPoint must be greater than attachmentPoint\");\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public ImmutableSet<Currency> allCurrencies() {\n    return ImmutableSet.of(currency);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public ResolvedCdsTranche resolve(ReferenceData refData) {\n    Schedule adjustedSchedule = paymentSchedule.createSchedule(refData);\n    ImmutableList.Builder<CreditCouponPaymentPeriod> accrualPeriods = ImmutableList.builder();\n    int nPeriods = adjustedSchedule.size();\n    for (int i = 0; i < nPeriods - 1; i++) {\n      SchedulePeriod period = adjustedSchedule.getPeriod(i);\n      accrualPeriods.add(CreditCouponPaymentPeriod.builder()\n          .startDate(period.getStartDate())\n          .endDate(period.getEndDate())\n          .unadjustedStartDate(period.getUnadjustedStartDate())\n          .unadjustedEndDate(period.getUnadjustedEndDate())\n          .effectiveStartDate(protectionStart.isBeginning() ? period.getStartDate().minusDays(1) : period.getStartDate())\n          .effectiveEndDate(protectionStart.isBeginning() ? period.getEndDate().minusDays(1) : period.getEndDate())\n          .paymentDate(period.getEndDate())\n          .notional(notional)\n          .currency(currency)\n          .fixedRate(fixedRate)\n          .yearFraction(period.yearFraction(dayCount, adjustedSchedule))\n          .build());\n    }\n    // last period - accrual end is modified\n    SchedulePeriod lastPeriod = adjustedSchedule.getPeriod(nPeriods - 1);\n    LocalDate accEndDate = protectionStart.isBeginning() ? lastPeriod.getEndDate().plusDays(1) : lastPeriod.getEndDate();\n    SchedulePeriod modifiedPeriod = lastPeriod.toBuilder().endDate(accEndDate).build();\n    accrualPeriods.add(CreditCouponPaymentPeriod.builder()\n        .startDate(modifiedPeriod.getStartDate())\n        .endDate(modifiedPeriod.getEndDate())\n        .unadjustedStartDate(modifiedPeriod.getUnadjustedStartDate())\n        .unadjustedEndDate(modifiedPeriod.getUnadjustedEndDate())\n        .effectiveStartDate(protectionStart.isBeginning() ? lastPeriod.getStartDate().minusDays(1) : lastPeriod.getStartDate())\n        .effectiveEndDate(lastPeriod.getEndDate())\n        .paymentDate(paymentSchedule.getBusinessDayAdjustment().adjust(lastPeriod.getEndDate(), refData))\n        .notional(notional)\n        .currency(currency)\n        .fixedRate(fixedRate)\n        .yearFraction(modifiedPeriod.yearFraction(dayCount, adjustedSchedule))\n        .build());\n    ImmutableList<CreditCouponPaymentPeriod> paymentPeriods = accrualPeriods.build();\n\n    return ResolvedCdsTranche.builder()\n        .buySell(buySell)\n        .cdsIndexId(cdsIndexId)\n        .legalEntityIds(legalEntityIds)\n        .attachmentPoint(attachmentPoint)\n        .detachmentPoint(detachmentPoint)\n        .protectionStart(protectionStart)\n        .paymentOnDefault(paymentOnDefault)\n        .paymentPeriods(paymentPeriods)\n        .protectionEndDate(lastPeriod.getEndDate())\n        .settlementDateOffset(settlementDateOffset)\n        .stepinDateOffset(stepinDateOffset)\n        .dayCount(dayCount)\n        .build();\n  }\n\n  //------------------------- AUTOGENERATED START -------------------------\n  /**\n   * The meta-bean for {@code CdsTranche}.\n   * @return the meta-bean, not null\n   */\n  public static CdsTranche.Meta meta() {\n    return CdsTranche.Meta.INSTANCE;\n  }\n\n  static {\n    MetaBean.register(CdsTranche.Meta.INSTANCE);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * The serialization version id.\n   */\n  private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\n\n  /**\n   * Returns a builder used to create an instance of the bean.\n   * @return the builder, not null\n   */\n  public static CdsTranche.Builder builder() {\n    return new CdsTranche.Builder();\n  }\n\n  private CdsTranche(\n      BuySell buySell,\n      StandardId cdsIndexId,\n      List<StandardId> legalEntityIds,\n      double attachmentPoint,\n      double detachmentPoint,\n      Currency currency,\n      double notional,\n      PeriodicSchedule paymentSchedule,\n      double fixedRate,\n      DayCount dayCount,\n      PaymentOnDefault paymentOnDefault,\n      ProtectionStartOfDay protectionStart,\n      DaysAdjustment stepinDateOffset,\n      DaysAdjustment settlementDateOffset) {\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(buySell, \"buySell\");\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(cdsIndexId, \"cdsIndexId\");\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(legalEntityIds, \"legalEntityIds\");\n    ArgChecker.notNegativeOrZero(notional, \"notional\");\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(paymentSchedule, \"paymentSchedule\");\n    ArgChecker.notNegative(fixedRate, \"fixedRate\");\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(dayCount, \"dayCount\");\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(paymentOnDefault, \"paymentOnDefault\");\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(protectionStart, \"protectionStart\");\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(stepinDateOffset, \"stepinDateOffset\");\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(settlementDateOffset, \"settlementDateOffset\");\n    this.buySell = buySell;\n    this.cdsIndexId = cdsIndexId;\n    this.legalEntityIds = ImmutableList.copyOf(legalEntityIds);\n    this.attachmentPoint = attachmentPoint;\n    this.detachmentPoint = detachmentPoint;\n    this.currency = currency;\n    this.notional = notional;\n    this.paymentSchedule = paymentSchedule;\n    this.fixedRate = fixedRate;\n    this.dayCount = dayCount;\n    this.paymentOnDefault = paymentOnDefault;\n    this.protectionStart = protectionStart;\n    this.stepinDateOffset = stepinDateOffset;\n    this.settlementDateOffset = settlementDateOffset;\n    validate();\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public CdsTranche.Meta metaBean() {\n    return CdsTranche.Meta.INSTANCE;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets whether the CDS tranche is buy or sell.\n   * @return the value of the property, not null\n   */\n  public BuySell getBuySell() {\n    return buySell;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets the CDS index identifier underlying this tranche.\n   * @return the value of the property, not null\n   */\n  public StandardId getCdsIndexId() {\n    return cdsIndexId;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets the legal entity identifiers.\n   * @return the value of the property, not null\n   */\n  public ImmutableList<StandardId> getLegalEntityIds() {\n    return legalEntityIds;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets the attachment point of the tranche.\n   * @return the value of the property\n   */\n  public double getAttachmentPoint() {\n    return attachmentPoint;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets the detachment point of the tranche.\n   * @return the value of the property\n   */\n  public double getDetachmentPoint() {\n    return detachmentPoint;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets the currency of the CDS tranche.\n   * @return the value of the property, not null\n   */\n  public Currency getCurrency() {\n    return currency;\n  }\n\n rate.\n   * @return the value of the property\n   */\n  public double getFixedRate() {\n    return fixedRate;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n   "file_text": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.product.credit;\n\nimport java.io.Serializable;\nimport java.util.Map;\nimport java.util.NoSuchElementException;\nimport java.util.Optional;\n\nimport org.joda.beans.Bean;\nimport org.joda.beans.ImmutableBean;\nimport org.joda.beans.JodaBeanUtils;\nimport org.joda.beans.MetaBean;\nimport org.joda.beans.MetaProperty;\nimport org.joda.beans.gen.BeanDefinition;\nimport org.joda.beans.gen.PropertyDefinition;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectFieldsBeanBuilder;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaBean;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaProperty;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaPropertyMap;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.AdjustablePayment;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.schedule.PeriodicSchedule;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.PortfolioItemInfo;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.PortfolioItemSummary;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.ProductTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.ProductType;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.ResolvableTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.TradeInfo;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.common.SummarizerUtils;\n\n/**\n * A trade in a CDS index tranche.\n * <p>\n * An Over-The-Counter (OTC) trade in a {@link CdsTranche}.\n * <p>\n * A CDS tranche is a slice of credit risk from a CDS index portfolio,\n * defined by attachment and detachment points.\n */\n@BeanDefinition\npublic final class CdsTrancheTrade\n    implements ProductTrade, ResolvableTrade<ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade>, ImmutableBean, Serializable {\n\n  /**\n   * The additional trade information, defaulted to an empty instance.\n   * <p>\n   * This allows additional information to be attached to the trade.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\", overrideGet = true)\n  private final TradeInfo info;\n  /**\n   * The CDS tranche product that was agreed when the trade occurred.\n   * <p>\n   * The product captures the contracted financial details of the trade.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\", overrideGet = true)\n  private final CdsTranche product;\n  /**\n   * The upfront fee of the product.\n   * <p>\n   * This specifies a single amount payable by the buyer to the seller.\n   * Thus the sign must be compatible with the product Pay/Receive flag.\n   * <p>\n   * Some CDS tranches are traded at par and the upfront fee is not paid.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(get = \"optional\")\n  private final AdjustablePayment upfrontFee;\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public CdsTrancheTrade withInfo(PortfolioItemInfo info) {\n    return new CdsTrancheTrade(TradeInfo.from(info), product, upfrontFee);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public PortfolioItemSummary summarize() {\n    // 2Y Buy USD 1mm CDX.NA.IG.27 [0%-3%] / 1.5% : 21Jan18-21Jan20\n    PeriodicSchedule paymentSchedule = product.getPaymentSchedule();\n    StringBuilder buf = new StringBuilder(128);\n    buf.append(SummarizerUtils.datePeriod(paymentSchedule.getStartDate(), paymentSchedule.getEndDate()));\n    buf.append(' ');\n    buf.append(product.getBuySell());\n    buf.append(' ');\n    buf.append(SummarizerUtils.amount(product.getCurrency(), product.getNotional()));\n    buf.append(' ');\n    buf.append(product.getCdsIndexId().getValue());\n    buf.append(\" [\");\n    buf.append(String.format(\"%.0f%%\", product.getAttachmentPoint() * 100));\n    buf.append('-');\n    buf.append(String.format(\"%.0f%%\", product.getDetachmentPoint() * 100));\n    buf.append(\"] / \");\n    buf.append(SummarizerUtils.percent(product.getFixedRate()));\n    buf.append(\" : \");\n    buf.append(SummarizerUtils.dateRange(paymentSchedule.getStartDate(), paymentSchedule.getEndDate()));\n    return SummarizerUtils.summary(this, ProductType.of(\"CDS_TRANCHE\"), buf.toString(), product.getCurrency());\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade resolve(ReferenceData refData) {\n    return ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade.builder()\n        .info(info)\n        .product(product.resolve(refData))\n        .upfrontFee(upfrontFee != null ? upfrontFee.resolve(refData) : null)\n        .build();\n  }\n\n  //------------------------- AUTOGENERATED START -------------------------\n  /**\n   * The meta-bean for {@code CdsTrancheTrade}.\n   * @return the meta-bean, not null\n   */\n  public static CdsTrancheTrade.Meta meta() {\n    return CdsTrancheTrade.Meta.INSTANCE;\n  }\n\n  static {\n   "file_text": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.product.credit;\n\nimport static com.opengamma.strata.collect.Guavate.ensureOnlyOne;\n\nimport java.io.Serializable;\nimport java.time.LocalDate;\nimport java.util.List;\nimport java.util.Map;\nimport java.util.NoSuchElementException;\nimport java.util.Optional;\n\nimport org.joda.beans.Bean;\nimport org.joda.beans.ImmutableBean;\nimport org.joda.beans.JodaBeanUtils;\nimport org.joda.beans.MetaBean;\nimport org.joda.beans.MetaProperty;\nimport org.joda.beans.gen.BeanDefinition;\nimport org.joda.beans.gen.PropertyDefinition;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectFieldsBeanBuilder;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaBean;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaProperty;\nimport org.joda.beans.impl.direct.DirectMetaPropertyMap;\n\nimport com.google.common.collect.ImmutableList;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.StandardId;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Currency;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.date.DayCount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.date.DaysAdjustment;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.ResolvedProduct;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.common.BuySell;\n\n/**\n * A CDS index tranche, resolved for pricing.\n * <p>\n * This is the resolved form of {@link CdsTranche} and is an input to the pricers.\n * Applications will typically create a {@code ResolvedCdsTranche} from a {@code CdsTranche}\n * using {@link CdsTranche#resolve(ReferenceData)}.\n */\n@BeanDefinition\npublic final class ResolvedCdsTranche\n    implements ResolvedProduct, ImmutableBean, Serializable {\n\n  /**\n   * Whether the CDS tranche is buy or sell.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final BuySell buySell;\n  /**\n   * The CDS index identifier underlying this tranche.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final StandardId cdsIndexId;\n  /**\n   * The legal entity identifiers.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final ImmutableList<StandardId> legalEntityIds;\n  /**\n   * The attachment point of the tranche (0.0 to 1.0).\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition\n  private final double attachmentPoint;\n  /**\n   * The detachment point of the tranche (0.0 to 1.0, greater than attachment point).\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition\n  private final double detachmentPoint;\n  /**\n   * The periodic payments based on the fixed rate.\n   * <p>\n   * Each payment period represents part of the life-time of the leg.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notEmpty\")\n  private final ImmutableList<CreditCouponPaymentPeriod> paymentPeriods;\n  /**\n   * The protection end date.\n   * <p>\n   * This may be different from the accrual end date of the last payment period.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final LocalDate protectionEndDate;\n  /**\n   * The day count convention.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final DayCount dayCount;\n  /**\n   * The payment on default.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final PaymentOnDefault paymentOnDefault;\n  /**\n   * The protection start of the day.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final ProtectionStartOfDay protectionStart;\n  /**\n   * The number of days between valuation date and step-in date.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final DaysAdjustment stepinDateOffset;\n  /**\n   * The number of days between valuation date and settlement date.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\")\n  private final DaysAdjustment settlementDateOffset;\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Obtains the accrual start date.\n   *\n   * @return the accrual start date\n   */\n  public LocalDate getAccrualStartDate() {\n    return paymentPeriods.get(0).getStartDate();\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Obtains the accrual end date.\n   *\n   * @return the accrual end date\n   */\n  public LocalDate getAccrualEndDate() {\n    return paymentPeriods.get(paymentPeriods.size() - 1).getEndDate();\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Obtains the notional.\n   *\n   * @return the notional\n   */\n  public double getNotional() {\n    return paymentPeriods.get(0).getNotional();\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Obtains the currency.\n   *\n   * @return the currency\n   */\n  public Currency getCurrency() {\n    return paymentPeriods.get(0).getCurrency();\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Obtains the fixed coupon rate.\n   *\n   * @return the fixed rate\n   */\n  public double getFixedRate() {\n    return paymentPeriods.get(0).getFixedRate();\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Obtains the tranche width (detachment minus attachment point).\n   *\n   * @return the tranche width\n   */\n  public double getTrancheWidth() {\n    return detachmentPoint - attachmentPoint;\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Obtains the effective start date from the step-in date.\n   *\n   * @param stepinDate  the step-in date\n   * @return the effective start date\n   */\n  public LocalDate calculateEffectiveStartDate(LocalDate stepinDate) {\n    LocalDate startDate = stepinDate.isAfter(getAccrualStartDate()) ? stepinDate : getAccrualStartDate();\n    return protectionStart.isBeginning() ? startDate.minusDays(1) : startDate;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the settlement date from the valuation date.\n   *\n   * @param valuationDate  the valuation date\n   * @param refData  the reference data to use\n   * @return the settlement date\n   */\n  public LocalDate calculateSettlementDateFromValuation(LocalDate valuationDate, ReferenceData refData) {\n    return settlementDateOffset.adjust(valuationDate, refData);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Finds the period that contains the specified date.\n   *\n   * @param date  the date to find the period for\n   * @return the period, empty if not found\n   * @throws IllegalArgumentException if more than one period matches\n   */\n  public Optional<CreditCouponPaymentPeriod> findPeriod(LocalDate date) {\n    return paymentPeriods.stream()\n        .filter(p -> p.contains(date))\n        .reduce(ensureOnlyOne());\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the accrued premium per fractional spread for unit notional.\n   *\n   * @param stepinDate  the step-in date\n   * @return the accrued year fraction\n   */\n  public double accruedYearFraction(LocalDate stepinDate) {\n    if (stepinDate.isBefore(getAccrualStartDate())) {\n      return 0d;\n    }\n    if (stepinDate.isEqual(getAccrualEndDate())) {\n      return paymentPeriods.get(paymentPeriods.size() - 1).getYearFraction();\n    }\n    CreditCouponPaymentPeriod period = findPeriod(stepinDate)\n        .orElseThrow(() -> new IllegalArgumentException(\"Date outside range\"));\n    return dayCount.relativeYearFraction(period.getStartDate(), stepinDate);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Reduce this instance to a {@code ResolvedCdsIndex} for use with existing index pricers.\n   * <p>\n   * The resultant object treats the tranche as an index for pricing purposes.\n   *\n   * @return the resolved CDS index\n   */\n  public ResolvedCdsIndex toResolvedCdsIndex() {\n    return ResolvedCdsIndex.builder()\n        .buySell(getBuySell())\n        .cdsIndexId(getCdsIndexId())\n        .legalEntityIds(getLegalEntityIds())\n        .dayCount(getDayCount())\n        .paymentOnDefault(getPaymentOnDefault())\n        .paymentPeriods(getPaymentPeriods())\n        .protectionEndDate(getProtectionEndDate())\n        .protectionStart(getProtectionStart())\n        .stepinDateOffset(getStepinDateOffset())\n        .settlementDateOffset(getSettlementDateOffset())\n        .build();\n  }\n\n  //------------------------- AUTOGENERATED START -------------------------\n  /**\n   * The meta-bean for {@code ResolvedCdsTranche}.\n   * @return the meta-bean, not null\n   */\n  public static ResolvedCdsTranche.Meta meta() {\n    return ResolvedCdsTranche.Meta.INSTANCE;\n  }\n\n  static {\n    MetaBean.register(ResolvedCdsTranche.Meta.INSTANCE);\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * The serialization version id.\n   */\n  private static final long serialVersionUID = 1L;\n\n  /**\n   * Returns a builder used to create an instance of the bean.\n   * @return the builder, not null\n   */\n  public static ResolvedCdsTranche.Builder builder() {\n    return new ResolvedCdsTranche.Builder();\n  }\n\n  private ResolvedCdsTranche(\n      BuySell buySell,\n      StandardId cdsIndexId,\n      List<StandardId> legalEntityIds,\n      double attachmentPoint,\n      double detachmentPoint,\n      List<CreditCouponPaymentPeriod> paymentPeriods,\n      LocalDate protectionEndDate,\n      DayCount dayCount,\n      PaymentOnDefault paymentOnDefault,\n      ProtectionStartOfDay protectionStart,\n      DaysAdjustment stepinDateOffset,\n      DaysAdjustment settlementDateOffset) {\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(buySell, \"buySell\");\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(cdsIndexId, \"cdsIndexId\");\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(legalEntityIds, \"legalEntityIds\");\n    JodaBeanUtils.notEmpty(paymentPeriods, \"paymentPeriods\");\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(protectionEndDate, \"protectionEndDate\");\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(dayCount, \"dayCount\");\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(paymentOnDefault, \"paymentOnDefault\");\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(protectionStart, \"protectionStart\");\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(stepinDateOffset, \"stepinDateOffset\");\n    JodaBeanUtils.notNull(settlementDateOffset, \"settlementDateOffset\");\n    this.buySell = buySell;\n    this.cdsIndexId = cdsIndexId;\n    this.legalEntityIds = ImmutableList.copyOf(legalEntityIds);\n    this.attachmentPoint = attachmentPoint;\n    this.detachmentPoint = detachmentPoint;\n    this.paymentPeriods = ImmutableList.copyOf(paymentPeriods);\n    this.protectionEndDate = protectionEndDate;\n    this.dayCount = dayCount;\n    this.paymentOnDefault = paymentOnDefault;\n    this.protectionStart = protectionStart;\n    this.stepinDateOffset = stepinDateOffset;\n    this.settlementDateOffset = settlementDateOffset;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public ResolvedCdsTranche.Meta metaBean() {\n    return ResolvedCdsTranche.Meta.INSTANCE;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets whether the CDS tranche is buy or sell.\n   * @return the value of the property, not null\n   */\n  public BuySell getBuySell() {\n    return buySell;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets the CDS index identifier underlying this tranche.\n   * @return the value of the property, not null\n   */\n  public StandardId getCdsIndexId() {\n    return cdsIndexId;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets the legal entity identifiers.\n   * @return the value of the property, not null\n   */\n  public ImmutableList<StandardId> getLegalEntityIds() {\n    return legalEntityIds;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets the attachment point of the tranche.\n   * @return the value of the property\n   */\n  public double getAttachmentPoint() {\n    return attachmentPoint;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets the detachment point of the tranche.\n   * @return the value of the property\n   */\n  public double getDetachmentPoint() {\n    return detachmentPoint;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets the periodic payments based on the fixed rate.\n   * @return the value of the property, not empty\n   */\n  public ImmutableList<CreditCouponPaymentPeriod> getPaymentPeriods() {\n    return paymentPeriods;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets the protection end date.\n   * @return the value of the property, not null\n   */\n  public LocalDate com.opengamma.strata.product.TradeInfo;\n\n/**\n * A trade in a CDS index tranche, resolved for pricing.\n * <p>\n * This is the resolved form of {@link CdsTrancheTrade} and is the primary input to the pricers.\n * Applications will typically create a {@code ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade} from a {@code CdsTrancheTrade}\n * using {@link CdsTrancheTrade#resolve(ReferenceData)}.\n * <p>\n * A {@code ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade} is bound to data that changes over time, such as holiday calendars.\n * If the data changes, such as the addition of a new holiday, the resolved form will not be updated.\n * Care must be taken when placing the resolved form in a cache or persistence layer.\n */\n@BeanDefinition\npublic final class ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade\n    implements ResolvedTrade, ImmutableBean, Serializable {\n\n  /**\n   * The additional trade information, defaulted to an empty instance.\n   * <p>\n   * This allows additional information to be attached to the trade.\n   */\n financial details of the trade.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(validate = \"notNull\", overrideGet = true)\n  private final ResolvedCdsTranche product;\n  /**\n   * The upfront fee of the product.\n   * <p>\n   * This specifies a single amount payable by the buyer to the seller.\n   * Thus the sign must be compatible with the product Pay/Receive flag.\n   */\n  @PropertyDefinition(get = \"optional\")\n  private final Payment upfrontFee;\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @ImmutableDefaults\n  private static void applyDefaults(Builder builder) {\n    builder.info = TradeInfo.empty();\n  }\n\n  //------------------------- AUTOGENERATED START -------------------------\n  /**\n   * The meta-bean for {@code ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade}.\n metaBean() {\n    return ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade.Meta.INSTANCE;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets the additional trade information, defaulted to an empty instance.\n   * @return the value of the property, not null\n   */\n  @Override\n  public TradeInfo getInfo() {\n    return info;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets the resolved CDS tranche product.\n   * @return the value of the property, not null\n   */\n  @Override\n  public ResolvedCdsTranche getProduct() {\n    return product;\n  }\n\n  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets the upfront fee of the product.\n   * @return the optional value of the property, not null\n   */\n  public Optional<Payment> getUpfrontFee() {\n    return Optional.ofNullable(upfrontFee);\n  }\n\n *\\\\n4:  * Please see distribution for license.\\\\n5:  */\\\\n6: package com.opengamma.strata.pricer.credit;\\\\n7: \\\\n8: import java.time.LocalDate;\\\\n9: \\\\n10: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Currency;\\\\n14: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\\\\n15: import com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\\\\n16: import com.opengamma.strata.collect.tuple.Triple;\\\\n17: import com.opengamma.strata.market.curve.CurveInfoType;\\\\n18: import com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivityBuilder;\\\\n19: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.common.PriceType;\\\\n20: import com.opengamma.strata.product.credit.ResolvedCds;\\\\n21: import com.opengamma.strata.product.credit.ResolvedCdsIndex;\\\\n22: \\\\n23: /**\\\\n24:  * Pricer for CDS portfolio index based on ISDA standard model. \\\\n25:  * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n26:  * The CDS index is priced as a single name CDS using a single credit curve rather than \\\\n27:  * credit curves of constituent single names. \\\\n28:  * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n29:  * {@code CreditRatesProvider} must contain the index credit curve as well as \\\\n30:  * the information on the relevant recovery rate and index factor. \\\\n31:  * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n32:  * This pricer invokes the implementation in {@link IsdaCdsProductPricer}. \\\\n33:  */\\\\n34: public class IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexProductPricer {\\\\n35: \\\\n36:   /**\\\\n37:    * Default implementation.\\\\n38:    */\\\\n39:   public static final IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexProductPricer DEFAULT =\\\\n40:       new IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexProductPricer(AccrualOnDefaultFormula.ORIGINAL_ISDA);\\\\n41: \\\\n42:   /**\\\\n43:    * The pricer for single name CDS.\\\\n44:    */\\\\n45:   private final IsdaCdsProductPricer underlyingPricer;\\\\n46: \\\\n47:   /**\\\\n48:    * Constructor specifying the formula to use for the accrued on default calculation.  \\\\n49:    * \\\\n50:    * @param formula  the formula\\\\n51:    */\\\\n52:   public IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexProductPricer(AccrualOnDefaultFormula formula) {\\\\n53:     this.underlyingPricer = new IsdaCdsProductPricer(formula);\\\\n54:   }\\\\n55: \\\\n56:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\n57:   /**\\\\n58:    * Gets the accrual-on-default formula used in this pricer. \\\\n59:    * \\\\n60:    * @return the formula\\\\n61:    */\\\\n62:   public AccrualOnDefaultFormula getAccrualOnDefaultFormula() {\\\\n63:     return underlyingPricer.getAccrualOnDefaultFormula();\\\\n64:   }\\\\n65: \\\\n66:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\n67:   /**\\\\n68:    * Calculates the price of the CDS index product, which is the minus of the present value per unit notional. \\\\n69:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n70:    * This method can calculate the clean or dirty price, see {@link PriceType}. \\\\n71:    * If calculating the clean price, the accrued interest is calculated based on the step-in date.\\\\n72:    * \\\\n73:    * @param cdsIndex  the product\\\\n74:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\\\n75:    * @param referenceDate  the reference date\\\\n76:    * @param priceType  the price type\\\\n77:    * @param refData  the reference data\\\\n78:    * @return the price\\\\n79:    */\\\\n80:   public double price(\\\\n81:       ResolvedCdsIndex cdsIndex,\\\\n82:       CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\\\\n83:       LocalDate referenceDate,\\\\n84:       PriceType priceType,\\\\n85:       ReferenceData refData) {\\\\n86: \\\\n87:     ResolvedCds cds = cdsIndex.toSingleNameCds();\\\\n88:     return underlyingPricer.price(cds, ratesProvider, referenceDate, priceType, refData);\\\\n89:   }\\\\n90: \\\\n91:   /**\\\\n92:    * Calculates the price sensitivity of the product. \\\\n93:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n94:    * The price sensitivity of the product is the sensitivity of price to the underlying curves.\\\\n95:    * \\\\n96:    * @param cdsIndex  the product \\\\n97:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\\\n98:    * @param referenceDate  the reference date\\\\n99:    * @param refData  the reference data\\\\n100:    * @return the present value sensitivity\\\\n101:    */\\\\n102:   public PointSensitivityBuilder priceSensitivity(\\\\n103:       ResolvedCdsIndex cdsIndex,\\\\n104:       CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\\\\n105:       LocalDate referenceDate,\\\\n106:       ReferenceData refData) {\\\\n107: \\\\n108:     ResolvedCds cds = cdsIndex.toSingleNameCds();\\\\n109:     return underlyingPricer.priceSensitivity(cds, ratesProvider, referenceDate, refData);\\\\n110:   }\\\\n111: \\\\n112:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\n113:   /**\\\\n114:    * Calculates the present value of the CDS index product.\\\\n115:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n116:    * The present value of the product is based on {@code referenceDate}.\\\\n117:    * This is typically the valuation date, or cash settlement date if the product is associated with a {@code Trade}. \\\\n118:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n119:    * This method can calculate the clean or dirty present value, see {@link PriceType}. \\\\n120:    * If calculating the clean value, the accrued interest is calculated based on the step-in date.\\\\n121:    * \\\\n122:    * @param cdsIndex  the product\\\\n123:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\\\n124:    * @param referenceDate  the reference date\\\\n125:    * @param priceType  the price type\\\\n126:    * @param refData  the reference data\\\\n127:    * @return the present value\\\\n128:    */\\\\n129:   public CurrencyAmount presentValue(\\\\n130:       ResolvedCdsIndex cdsIndex,\\\\n131:       CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\\\\n132:       LocalDate referenceDate,\\\\n133:       PriceType priceType,\\\\n134:       ReferenceData refData) {\\\\n135: \\\\n136:     if (isExpired(cdsIndex, ratesProvider)) {\\\\n137:       return CurrencyAmount.of(cdsIndex.getCurrency(), 0d);\\\\n138:     }\\\\n139:     ResolvedCds cds = cdsIndex.toSingleNameCds();\\\\n140:     LocalDate stepinDate = cds.getStepinDateOffset().adjust(ratesProvider.getValuationDate(), refData);\\\\n141:     LocalDate effectiveStartDate = cds.calculateEffectiveStartDate(stepinDate);\\\\n142:     double recoveryRate = underlyingPricer.recoveryRate(cds, ratesProvider);\\\\n143:     Triple\\\\u003cCreditDiscountFactors, LegalEntitySurvivalProbabilities, Double\\\\u003e rates = reduceDiscountFactors(cds, ratesProvider);\\\\n144:     double protectionLeg = (1d - recoveryRate) *\\\\n145:         underlyingPricer.protectionFull(cds, rates.getFirst(), rates.getSecond(), referenceDate, effectiveStartDate);\\\\n146:     double rpv01 = underlyingPricer.riskyAnnuity(\\\\n147:         cds, rates.getFirst(), rates.getSecond(), referenceDate, stepinDate, effectiveStartDate, priceType);\\\\n148:     double amount =\\\\n149:         cds.getBuySell().normalize(cds.getNotional()) * rates.getThird() * (protectionLeg - rpv01 * cds.getFixedRate());\\\\n150:     return CurrencyAmount.of(cds.getCurrency(), amount);\\\\n151: com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\\n15: import com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\\n16: import com.opengamma.strata.collect.tuple.Triple;\\n17: import com.opengamma.strata.product.credit.ResolvedCds;\\n21: import com.opengamma.strata.product.credit.ResolvedCdsIndex;\\n22: \\n23: /**\\n24:  * Pricer for CDS portfolio index based on ISDA standard model. \\n25:  * <p>\\n26:  * The CDS index is priced as a single name CDS using a single credit curve rather than \\n27:  * credit curves of constituent single names. \\n28:  * <p>\\n29:  * {@code CreditRatesProvider} must contain the index credit curve as well as \\n30:  * the information on the relevant recovery rate and index factor. \\n31:  * <p>\\n32:  * This pricer invokes the implementation in {@link IsdaCdsProductPricer}. \\n33:  */\\n34: public class IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexProductPricer {\\n35: \\n36:   /**\\n37:    * Default implementation.\\n38:    */\\n39:   public static final IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexProductPricer DEFAULT =\\n40:       new IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexProductPricer(AccrualOnDefaultFormula.ORIGINAL_ISDA);\\n41: \\n42:   /**\\n43:    * The pricer for single name CDS.\\n44:    */\\n45:   private final IsdaCdsProductPricer underlyingPricer;\\n46: \\n47:   /**\\n48:    * Constructor specifying the formula to use for the accrued on default calculation.  \\n49:    * \\n50:    * @param formula  the formula\\n51:    */\\n52:   public IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexProductPricer(AccrualOnDefaultFormula formula) {\\n53:     this.underlyingPricer = new IsdaCdsProductPricer(formula);\\n54:   }\\n55: \\n56:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n57:   /**\\n58:    * Gets the accrual-on-default formula used in this pricer. \\n59:    * \\n60:    * @return the formula\\n61:    */\\n62:   public AccrualOnDefaultFormula getAccrualOnDefaultFormula() {\\n63:     return underlyingPricer.getAccrualOnDefaultFormula();\\n64:   }\\n65: \\n66:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n67:   /**\\n68:    * Calculates the price of the CDS index product, which is the minus of the present value per unit notional. \\n69:    * <p>\\n70:    * This method can calculate the clean or dirty price, see {@link PriceType}. \\n71:    * If calculating the clean price, the accrued interest is calculated based on the step-in date.\\n72:    * \\n73:    * @param cdsIndex  the product\\n74:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n75:    * @param referenceDate  the reference date\\n76:    * @param priceType  the price type\\n77:    * @param refData  the reference data\\n78:    * @return the price\\n79:    */\\n80:   public double price(\\n81:       ResolvedCdsIndex cdsIndex,\\n82:       CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n83:       LocalDate referenceDate,\\n84:       PriceType priceType,\\n85:       ReferenceData refData) {\\n86: \\n87:     ResolvedCds cds = cdsIndex.toSingleNameCds();\\n88:     return underlyingPricer.price(cds, ratesProvider, referenceDate, priceType, refData);\\n89:   }\\n90: \\n91:   /**\\n92:    * Calculates the price sensitivity of the product. \\n93:    * <p>\\n94:    * The price sensitivity of the product is the sensitivity of price to the underlying curves.\\n95:    * \\n96:    * @param cdsIndex  the product \\n97:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n98:    * @param referenceDate  the reference date\\n99:    * @param refData  the reference data\\n100:    * @return the present value sensitivity\\n101:    */\\n102:   public PointSensitivityBuilder priceSensitivity(\\n103:       ResolvedCdsIndex cdsIndex,\\n104:       CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n105:       LocalDate referenceDate,\\n106:       ReferenceData refData) {\\n107: \\n108:     ResolvedCds cds = cdsIndex.toSingleNameCds();\\n109:     return underlyingPricer.priceSensitivity(cds, ratesProvider, referenceDate, refData);\\n110:   }\\n111: \\n112:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n113:   /**\\n114:    * Calculates the present value of the CDS index product.\\n115:    * <p>\\n116:    * The present value of the product is based on {@code referenceDate}.\\n117:    * This is typically the valuation date, or cash settlement date if the product is associated with a {@code Trade}. \\n118:    * <p>\\n119:    * This method can calculate the clean or dirty present value, see {@link PriceType}. \\n120:    * If calculating the clean value, the accrued interest is calculated based on the step-in date.\\n121:    * \\n122:    * @param cdsIndex  the product\\n123:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n124:    * @param referenceDate  the reference date\\n125:    * @param priceType  the price type\\n126:    * @param refData  the reference data\\n127:    * @return the present value\\n128:    */\\n129:   public CurrencyAmount presentValue(\\n130:       ResolvedCdsIndex cdsIndex,\\n131:       CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n132:       LocalDate referenceDate,\\n133:       PriceType priceType,\\n134:       ReferenceData refData) {\\n135: \\n136:     if (isExpired(cdsIndex, ratesProvider)) {\\n137:       return CurrencyAmount.of(cdsIndex.getCurrency(), 0d);\\n138:     }\\n139:     ResolvedCds cds = cdsIndex.toSingleNameCds();\\n140:     LocalDate stepinDate = cds.getStepinDateOffset().adjust(ratesProvider.getValuationDate(), refData);\\n141:     LocalDate effectiveStartDate = cds.calculateEffectiveStartDate(stepinDate);\\n142:     double recoveryRate = underlyingPricer.recoveryRate(cds, ratesProvider);\\n143:     Triple<CreditDiscountFactors, LegalEntitySurvivalProbabilities, Double> rates = reduceDiscountFactors(cds, ratesProvider);\\n144:     double protectionLeg = (1d - recoveryRate) *\\n145:         underlyingPricer.protectionFull(cds, rates.getFirst(), rates.getSecond(), referenceDate, effectiveStartDate);\\n146:     double rpv01 = underlyingPricer.riskyAnnuity(\\n147:         cds, rates.getFirst(), rates.getSecond(), referenceDate, stepinDate, effectiveStartDate, priceType);\\n148:     double amount =\\n149:         cds.getBuySell().normalize(cds.getNotional()) * rates.getThird() * (protectionLeg - rpv01 * cds.getFixedRate());\\n150:     return CurrencyAmount.of(cds.getCurrency(), amount);\\n151: \", \"url\":
