com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivities;\\\\n14: import com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivityBuilder;\\\\n15: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.DiscountingPaymentPricer;\\\\n16: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.common.PriceType;\\\\n17: import com.opengamma.strata.product.credit.ResolvedCdsTrade;\\\\n18: \\\\n19: /**\\\\n20:  * Pricer for single-name credit default swaps (CDS) trade based on ISDA standard model. \\\\n21:  * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n22:  * The implementation is based on the ISDA model versions 1.8.2.\\\\n23:  */\\\\n24: public class IsdaCdsTradePricer {\\\\n25: \\\\n26:   /**\\\\n27:    * Default implementation.\\\\n28:    */\\\\n29:   public static final IsdaCdsTradePricer DEFAULT = new IsdaCdsTradePricer();\\\\n30: \\\\n31:   /**\\\\n32:    * The product pricer.\\\\n33:    */\\\\n34:   private final IsdaCdsProductPricer productPricer;\\\\n35:   /**\\\\n36:    * The upfront fee pricer.\\\\n37:    */\\\\n38:   private final DiscountingPaymentPricer upfrontPricer;\\\\n39: \\\\n40:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\n41:   /**\\\\n42:    * The default constructor.\\\\n43:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n44:    * The default pricers are used.\\\\n45:    */\\\\n46:   public IsdaCdsTradePricer() {\\\\n47:     this.productPricer = IsdaCdsProductPricer.DEFAULT;\\\\n48:     this.upfrontPricer = DiscountingPaymentPricer.DEFAULT;\\\\n49:   }\\\\n50: \\\\n51:   /**\\\\n52:    * The constructor with the accrual-on-default formula specified.\\\\n53:    * \\\\n54:    * @param formula  the accrual-on-default formula\\\\n55:    */\\\\n56:   public IsdaCdsTradePricer(AccrualOnDefaultFormula formula) {\\\\n57:     this.productPricer = new IsdaCdsProductPricer(formula);\\\\n58:     this.upfrontPricer = DiscountingPaymentPricer.DEFAULT;\\\\n59:   }\\\\n60: \\\\n61:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\n62:   /**\\\\n63:    * Gets the accrual-on-default formula used in this pricer. \\\\n64:    * \\\\n65:    * @return the formula\\\\n66:    */\\\\n67:   public AccrualOnDefaultFormula getAccrualOnDefaultFormula() {\\\\n68:     return productPricer.getAccrualOnDefaultFormula();\\\\n69:   }\\\\n70: \\\\n71:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\n72:   /**\\\\n73:    * Calculates the price of the underlying product, which is the present value per unit notional. \\\\n74:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n75:    * This method can calculate the clean or dirty price, see {@link PriceType}. \\\\n76:    * If calculating the clean price, the accrued interest is calculated based on the step-in date.\\\\n77:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n78:    * This is coherent to {@link #presentValueOnSettle(ResolvedCdsTrade, CreditRatesProvider, PriceType, ReferenceData)}.\\\\n79:    * \\\\n80:    * @param trade  the trade\\\\n81:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\\\n82:    * @param priceType  the price type\\\\n83:    * @param refData  the reference data\\\\n84:    * @return the price\\\\n85:    */\\\\n86:   public double price(\\\\n87:       ResolvedCdsTrade trade,\\\\n88:       CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\\\\n89:       PriceType priceType,\\\\n90:       ReferenceData refData) {\\\\n91: \\\\n92:     return price(trade, ratesProvider, trade.getProduct().getFixedRate(), priceType, refData);\\\\n93:   }\\\\n94: \\\\n95:   // internal price computation with specified coupon rate\\\\n96:   double price(\\\\n97:       ResolvedCdsTrade trade,\\\\n98:       CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\\\\n99:       double fractionalSpread,\\\\n100:       PriceType priceType,\\\\n101: \\\",\\\"url\\\":\\\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/Strata--66225ca9@9d9ab49ce264443ddb305a8b1df6f48d01a2c67c/-/blob/modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/credit/IsdaCdsTradePricer.java%3FL1-100\\\"}\", \"annotations\": null, \"meta\": null}], \"structuredContent\": {\"content\": \"1: /*\\n2:  * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\\n3:  *\\n4:  * Please see distribution for license.\\n5:  */\\n6: package com.opengamma.strata.pricer.credit;\\n7: \\n8: import java.time.LocalDate;\\n9: \\n10: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData;\\n11: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\\n12: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Payment;\\n13: import com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivities;\\n14: import com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivityBuilder;\\n15: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.DiscountingPaymentPricer;\\n16: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.common.PriceType;\\n17: import com.opengamma.strata.product.credit.ResolvedCdsTrade;\\n18: \\n19: /**\\n20:  * Pricer for single-name credit default swaps (CDS) trade based on ISDA standard model. \\n21:  * <p>\\n22:  * The implementation is based on the ISDA model versions 1.8.2.\\n23:  */\\n24: public class IsdaCdsTradePricer {\\n25: \\n26:   /**\\n27:    * Default implementation.\\n28:    */\\n29:   public static final IsdaCdsTradePricer DEFAULT = new IsdaCdsTradePricer();\\n30: \\n31:   /**\\n32:    * The product pricer.\\n33:    */\\n34:   private final IsdaCdsProductPricer productPricer;\\n35:   /**\\n36:    * The upfront fee pricer.\\n37:    */\\n38:   private final DiscountingPaymentPricer upfrontPricer;\\n39: \\n40:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n41:   /**\\n42:    * The default constructor.\\n43:    * <p>\\n44:    * The default pricers are used.\\n45:    */\\n46:   public IsdaCdsTradePricer() {\\n47:     this.productPricer = IsdaCdsProductPricer.DEFAULT;\\n48:     this.upfrontPricer = DiscountingPaymentPricer.DEFAULT;\\n49:   }\\n50: \\n51:   /**\\n52:    * The constructor with the accrual-on-default formula specified.\\n53:    * \\n54:    * @param formula  the accrual-on-default formula\\n55:    */\\n56:   public IsdaCdsTradePricer(AccrualOnDefaultFormula formula) {\\n57:     this.productPricer = new IsdaCdsProductPricer(formula);\\n58:     this.upfrontPricer = DiscountingPaymentPricer.DEFAULT;\\n59:   }\\n60: \\n61:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n62:   /**\\n63:    * Gets the accrual-on-default formula used in this pricer. \\n64:    * \\n65:    * @return the formula\\n66:    */\\n67:   public AccrualOnDefaultFormula getAccrualOnDefaultFormula() {\\n68:     return productPricer.getAccrualOnDefaultFormula();\\n69:   }\\n70: \\n71:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n72:   /**\\n73:    * Calculates the price of the underlying product, which is the present value per unit notional. \\n74:    * <p>\\n75:    * This method can calculate the clean or dirty price, see {@link PriceType}. \\n76:    * If calculating the clean price, the accrued interest is calculated based on the step-in date.\\n77:    * <p>\\n78:    * This is coherent to {@link #presentValueOnSettle(ResolvedCdsTrade, CreditRatesProvider, PriceType, ReferenceData)}.\\n79:    * \\n80:    * @param trade  the trade\\n81:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n82:    * @param priceType  the price type\\n83:    * @param refData  the reference data\\n84:    * @return the price\\n85:    */\\n86:   public double price(\\n87:       ResolvedCdsTrade trade,\\n88:       CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n89:       PriceType priceType,\\n90:       ReferenceData refData) {\\n91: \\n92:     return price(trade, ratesProvider, trade.getProduct().getFixedRate(), priceType, refData);\\n93:   }\\n94: \\n95:   // internal price computation with specified coupon rate\\n96:   double price(\\n97:       ResolvedCdsTrade trade,\\n98:       CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n99:       double fractionalSpread,\\n100:       PriceType priceType,\\n101: \", \"url\": {
  "command": "create",
  "file_text": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.pricer.credit;\n\nimport java.time.LocalDate;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Payment;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivityBuilder;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.DiscountingPaymentPricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.common.PriceType;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.credit.ResolvedCdsTranche;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.credit.ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade;\n\n/**\n * Pricer for CDS index tranche trades based on the ISDA standard model.\n * <p>\n * A CDS tranche represents a slice of credit risk from a CDS index portfolio,\n * defined by attachment and detachment points. This pricer delegates to\n * {@link IsdaCdsTrancheProductPricer} for product-level calculations and adds\n * trade-level adjustments such as upfront fee pricing.\n * <p>\n * The tranche present value is computed by scaling the underlying index's\n * protection and premium legs by the tranche factor (detachmentPoint - attachmentPoint).\n * The protection leg only covers losses within the tranche range.\n */\npublic class IsdaCdsTranchePricer {\n\n  /**\n   * Default implementation.\n   */\n  public static final IsdaCdsTranchePricer DEFAULT = new IsdaCdsTranchePricer(AccrualOnDefaultFormula.ORIGINAL_ISDA);\n\n  /**\n   * The product pricer.\n   */\n  private final IsdaCdsTrancheProductPricer productPricer;\n  /**\n   * The upfront fee pricer.\n   */\n  private final DiscountingPaymentPricer upfrontPricer;\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Creates an instance using the default accrual-on-default formula.\n   */\n  public IsdaCdsTranchePricer() {\n    this.productPricer = IsdaCdsTrancheProductPricer.DEFAULT;\n    this.upfrontPricer = DiscountingPaymentPricer.DEFAULT;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Creates an instance specifying the accrual-on-default formula.\n   *\n   * @param formula  the accrual-on-default formula\n   */\n  public IsdaCdsTranchePricer(AccrualOnDefaultFormula formula) {\n    this.productPricer = new IsdaCdsTrancheProductPricer(formula);\n    this.upfrontPricer = DiscountingPaymentPricer.DEFAULT;\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets the accrual-on-default formula used in this pricer.\n   *\n   * @return the formula\n   */\n  public AccrualOnDefaultFormula getAccrualOnDefaultFormula() {\n    return productPricer.getAccrualOnDefaultFormula();\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the price of the tranche trade (present value per unit notional).\n   * <p>\n   * This method can calculate the clean or dirty price.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param priceType  the price type\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the price\n   */\n  public double price(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      PriceType priceType,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    ResolvedCdsTranche tranche = trade.getProduct();\n    LocalDate settlementDate = calculateSettlementDate(trade, ratesProvider, refData);\n    return productPricer.price(tranche, ratesProvider, settlementDate, priceType, refData);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value of the tranche trade.\n   * <p>\n   * The present value of the product is based on the valuation date.\n   * If calculating the clean value, the accrued interest is based on the step-in date.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param priceType  the price type\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the present value\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValue(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      PriceType priceType,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    ResolvedCdsTranche tranche = trade.getProduct();\n    LocalDate settlementDate = calculateSettlementDate(trade, ratesProvider, refData);\n    CurrencyAmount pvProduct = productPricer.presentValue(tranche, ratesProvider, settlementDate, priceType, refData);\n    if (trade.getUpfrontFee().isPresent()) {\n      Payment upfrontFee = trade.getUpfrontFee().get();\n      CurrencyAmount pvFee = upfrontPricer.presentValue(upfrontFee, ratesProvider.discountFactors(upfrontFee.getCurrency()));\n      return pvProduct.plus(pvFee);\n    }\n    return pvProduct;\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value of the tranche trade on the settlement date.\n   * <p>\n   * The present value of the trade on the cash settlement date.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param priceType  the price type\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the present value on settlement\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValueOnSettle(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      PriceType priceType,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    ResolvedCdsTranche tranche = trade.getProduct();\n    LocalDate settlementDate = calculateSettlementDate(trade, ratesProvider, refData);\n    return productPricer.presentValue(tranche, ratesProvider, settlementDate, priceType, refData);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value sensitivity of the tranche trade.\n   * <p>\n   * The present value sensitivity of the trade is the sensitivity of present value\n   * to the underlying curves.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the present value sensitivity\n   */\n  public PointSensitivities presentValueSensitivity(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    ResolvedCdsTranche tranche = trade.getProduct();\n    LocalDate settlementDate = calculateSettlementDate(trade, ratesProvider, refData);\n    PointSensitivityBuilder pvSensiProduct =\n        productPricer.presentValueSensitivity(tranche, ratesProvider, settlementDate, refData);\n    if (trade.getUpfrontFee().isPresent()) {\n      Payment upfrontFee = trade.getUpfrontFee().get();\n      PointSensitivityBuilder pvSensiFee =\n          upfrontPricer.presentValueSensitivity(upfrontFee, ratesProvider.discountFactors(upfrontFee.getCurrency()));\n      return pvSensiProduct.combinedWith(pvSensiFee).build();\n    }\n    return pvSensiProduct.build();\n  }\n\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value sensitivity of the tranche trade on settlement.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the present value on settlement sensitivity\n   */\n  public PointSensitivities presentValueOnSettleSensitivity(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    ResolvedCdsTranche tranche = trade.getProduct();\n    LocalDate settlementDate = calculateSettlementDate(trade, ratesProvider, refData);\n    return productPricer.presentValueSensitivity(tranche, ratesProvider, settlementDate, refData).build();\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the par spread of the tranche trade.\n   * <p>\n   * The par spread is the coupon rate that makes the clean PV equal to zero.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the par spread\n   */\n  public double parSpread(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    ResolvedCdsTranche tranche = trade.getProduct();\n    LocalDate settlementDate = calculateSettlementDate(trade, ratesProvider, refData);\n    return productPricer.parSpread(tranche, ratesProvider, settlementDate, refData);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the expected loss of the tranche.\n   * <p>\n   * The expected loss represents the expected credit loss for the tranche,\n   * computed as the expected portfolio loss that falls within the tranche boundaries.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @return the expected loss\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount expectedLoss(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider) {\n\n    return productPricer.expectedLoss(trade.getProduct(), ratesProvider);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculate the settlement date\n  private LocalDate calculateSettlementDate(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    return trade.getProduct().calculateSettlementDateFromValuation(ratesProvider.getValuationDate(), refData);\n  }\n\n}\n",
  "path": "/workspace/modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/credit/IsdaCdsTranchePricer.java",
  "security_risk": "LOW"
}

{
  "command": "create",
  "file_text": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.pricer.credit;\n\nimport java.time.LocalDate;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivityBuilder;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.common.PriceType;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.credit.ResolvedCds;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.credit.ResolvedCdsTranche;\n\n/**\n * Pricer for CDS index tranche products based on the ISDA standard model.\n * <p>\n * A CDS tranche represents a slice of credit risk from a CDS index portfolio.\n * The tranche is defined by attachment and detachment points that determine\n * the range of portfolio losses covered by this tranche.\n * <p>\n * This pricer delegates to {@link IsdaCdsProductPricer} for the underlying\n * single-name CDS calculations, then applies tranche-specific adjustments.\n * The tranche protection leg covers only losses between the attachment and\n * detachment points as a fraction of the total portfolio notional.\n * <p>\n * The key pricing formula:\n * <ul>\n *   <li>Protection leg: (1 - recoveryRate) * trancheWidth * underlying protection schedule\n *   <li>Premium leg: trancheWidth * underlying risky annuity * fixedRate\n *   <li>PV = buyerSign * notional * (protectionLeg - premiumLeg)\n * </ul>\n * where trancheWidth = detachmentPoint - attachmentPoint.\n */\npublic class IsdaCdsTrancheProductPricer {\n\n  /**\n   * Default implementation.\n   */\n  public static final IsdaCdsTrancheProductPricer DEFAULT =\n      new IsdaCdsTrancheProductPricer(AccrualOnDefaultFormula.ORIGINAL_ISDA);\n\n  /**\n   * The pricer for single name CDS, used to compute the underlying schedule.\n   */\n  private final IsdaCdsProductPricer underlyingPricer;\n\n  /**\n   * Creates an instance specifying the formula to use for accrued on default.\n   *\n   * @param formula  the formula\n   */\n  public IsdaCdsTrancheProductPricer(AccrualOnDefaultFormula formula) {\n    this.underlyingPricer = new IsdaCdsProductPricer(ArgChecker.notNull(formula, \"formula\"));\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Gets the accrual-on-default formula used in this pricer.\n   *\n   * @return the formula\n   */\n  public AccrualOnDefaultFormula getAccrualOnDefaultFormula() {\n    return underlyingPricer.getAccrualOnDefaultFormula();\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the price of the tranche product (PV per unit notional).\n   * <p>\n   * The price is the present value scaled to unit notional.\n   *\n   * @param tranche  the tranche product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param referenceDate  the reference date for discounting\n   * @param priceType  clean or dirty price\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the price\n   */\n  public double price(\n      ResolvedCdsTranche tranche,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      LocalDate referenceDate,\n      PriceType priceType,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    if (!tranche.getProtectionEndDate().isAfter(ratesProvider.getValuationDate())) {\n      return 0d;\n    }\n    ResolvedCds cds = tranche.toResolvedCdsIndex().toSingleNameCds();\n    double indexPrice = underlyingPricer.price(cds, ratesProvider, referenceDate, priceType, refData);\n    // Scale by tranche width\n    return tranche.getTrancheWidth() * indexPrice;\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value of the tranche product.\n   * <p>\n   * The present value is based on {@code referenceDate}, which is typically the valuation date\n   * or cash settlement date if the product is associated with a Trade.\n   * <p>\n   * The tranche protection leg pays (1 - recoveryRate) for losses within the tranche range.\n   * The premium leg pays the fixed coupon on the surviving tranche notional.\n   *\n   * @param tranche  the tranche product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param referenceDate  the reference date for discounting\n   * @param priceType  clean or dirty price\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the present value\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValue(\n      ResolvedCdsTranche tranche,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      LocalDate referenceDate,\n      PriceType priceType,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    if (!tranche.getProtectionEndDate().isAfter(ratesProvider.getValuationDate())) {\n      return CurrencyAmount.of(tranche.getCurrency(), 0d);\n    }\n    // Use the CDS index as the underlying pricing instrument\n    ResolvedCds cds = tranche.toResolvedCdsIndex().toSingleNameCds();\n    // Compute the underlying CDS present value (without notional and buy/sell scaling)\n    double indexPrice = underlyingPricer.price(cds, ratesProvider, referenceDate, priceType, refData);\n    // Scale by tranche width and apply notional and buy/sell direction\n    double trancheWidth = tranche.getTrancheWidth();\n    double signedNotional = tranche.getBuySell().normalize(tranche.getNotional());\n    double amount = signedNotional * trancheWidth * indexPrice;\n    return CurrencyAmount.of(tranche.getCurrency(), amount);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the present value sensitivity of the tranche product.\n   * <p>\n   * The sensitivity is computed from the underlying CDS price sensitivity,\n   * scaled by the tranche width and notional.\n   *\n   * @param tranche  the tranche product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param referenceDate  the reference date for discounting\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the present value sensitivity\n   */\n  public PointSensitivityBuilder presentValueSensitivity(\n      ResolvedCdsTranche tranche,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      LocalDate referenceDate,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    if (!tranche.getProtectionEndDate().isAfter(ratesProvider.getValuationDate())) {\n      return PointSensitivityBuilder.none();\n    }\n    ResolvedCds cds = tranche.toResolvedCdsIndex().toSingleNameCds();\n    double signedNotional = tranche.getBuySell().normalize(tranche.getNotional());\n    double trancheWidth = tranche.getTrancheWidth();\n    return underlyingPricer.presentValueSensitivity(cds, ratesProvider, referenceDate, refData)\n        .multipliedBy(trancheWidth / tranche.getNotional() * signedNotional);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the par spread of the tranche product.\n   * <p>\n   * The par spread is the coupon rate such that the clean PV is zero.\n   *\n   * @param tranche  the tranche product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param referenceDate  the reference date for discounting\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the par spread\n   */\n  public double parSpread(\n      ResolvedCdsTranche tranche,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      LocalDate referenceDate,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    ArgChecker.isTrue(tranche.getProtectionEndDate().isAfter(ratesProvider.getValuationDate()),\n        \"CDS tranche already expired\");\n    ResolvedCds cds = tranche.toResolvedCdsIndex().toSingleNameCds();\n    // The par spread is independent of the tranche width scaling\n    return underlyingPricer.parSpread(cds, ratesProvider, referenceDate, refData);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  /**\n   * Calculates the expected loss of the tranche.\n   * <p>\n   * The expected loss represents the expected credit loss absorbed by this tranche,\n   * computed as the tranche's share of the expected portfolio loss.\n   * <p>\n   * Under a simplified homogeneous pool assumption, the expected loss for the tranche\n   * is computed from the underlying index expected loss probability, scaled to the\n   * tranche notional by the tranche width factor.\n   *\n   * @param tranche  the tranche product\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @return the expected loss as a currency amount\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount expectedLoss(\n      ResolvedCdsTranche tranche,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider) {\n\n    // Get the index survival probability at the protection end date\n    LegalEntitySurvivalProbabilities survivalProbabilities =\n        ratesProvider.survivalProbabilities(tranche.getCdsIndexId(), tranche.getCurrency());\n    LocalDate protectionEndDate = tranche.getProtectionEndDate();\n    double survivalProb = survivalProbabilities.survivalProbability(protectionEndDate);\n\n    // Simplified expected loss: (1 - survivalProb) scaled by tranche width and notional\n    RecoveryRates recoveryRates = ratesProvider.recoveryRates(tranche.getCdsIndexId());\n    double recoveryRate = recoveryRates.recoveryRate(protectionEndDate);\n    double trancheWidth = tranche.getTrancheWidth();\n\n    // Expected loss for the tranche under homogeneous pool assumption\n    // EL_tranche = (1 - RR) * (1 - SP) * trancheWidth * notional\n    double expectedLossAmount = (1d - recoveryRate) * (1d - survivalProb) * trancheWidth * tranche.getNotional();\n    return CurrencyAmount.of(tranche.getCurrency(), expectedLossAmount);\n  }\n\n}\n",
  "path": "/workspace/modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/credit/IsdaCdsTrancheProductPricer.java",
  "security_risk": "LOW"
}

{
  "command": "create",
  "file_text": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2017 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.measure.credit;\n\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.MultiCurrencyAmount;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.ArgChecker;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.CurrencyScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.DoubleScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.MultiCurrencyScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.ScenarioArray;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.param.CurrencyParameterSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.param.CurrencyParameterSensitivity;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivities;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.common.PriceType;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.credit.AccrualOnDefaultFormula;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.credit.CreditRatesProvider;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.credit.IsdaCdsTranchePricer;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.pricer.sensitivity.MarketQuoteSensitivityCalculator;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.credit.ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade;\n\n/**\n * Multi-scenario measure calculations for CDS tranche trades.\n * <p>\n * Each method corresponds to a measure, typically calculated by one or more calls to the pricer.\n */\nfinal class CdsTrancheMeasureCalculations {\n\n  /**\n   * Default implementation.\n   */\n  public static final CdsTrancheMeasureCalculations DEFAULT =\n      new CdsTrancheMeasureCalculations(new IsdaCdsTranchePricer(AccrualOnDefaultFormula.CORRECT));\n\n  /**\n   * The market quote sensitivity calculator.\n   */\n  private static final MarketQuoteSensitivityCalculator MARKET_QUOTE_SENS = MarketQuoteSensitivityCalculator.DEFAULT;\n  /**\n   * One basis point, expressed as a {@code double}.\n   */\n  private static final double ONE_BASIS_POINT = 1e-4;\n\n  /**\n   * Pricer for {@link ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade}.\n   */\n  private final IsdaCdsTranchePricer tradePricer;\n\n  /**\n   * Creates an instance.\n   *\n   * @param tradePricer  the pricer for {@link ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade}\n   */\n  public CdsTrancheMeasureCalculations(IsdaCdsTranchePricer tradePricer) {\n    this.tradePricer = ArgChecker.notNull(tradePricer, \"tradePricer\");\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates present value for all scenarios\n  CurrencyScenarioArray presentValue(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    return CurrencyScenarioArray.of(\n        marketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> presentValue(trade, marketData.scenario(i).creditRatesProvider(), PriceType.DIRTY, refData));\n  }\n\n  // calculates present value for one scenario\n  CurrencyAmount presentValue(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      PriceType priceType,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    return tradePricer.presentValue(trade, ratesProvider, priceType, refData);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates principal for all scenarios\n  CurrencyScenarioArray principal(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    return CurrencyScenarioArray.of(\n        marketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> principal(trade, marketData.scenario(i).creditRatesProvider(), refData));\n  }\n\n  // calculates principal for one scenario\n  CurrencyAmount principal(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    return tradePricer.presentValueOnSettle(trade, ratesProvider, PriceType.CLEAN, refData);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates unit price for all scenarios\n  DoubleScenarioArray unitPrice(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    return DoubleScenarioArray.of(\n        marketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> unitPrice(trade, marketData.scenario(i).creditRatesProvider(), refData));\n  }\n\n  // calculates unit price for one scenario\n  double unitPrice(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    return tradePricer.price(trade, ratesProvider, PriceType.CLEAN, refData);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates calibrated sum PV01 for all scenarios\n  MultiCurrencyScenarioArray pv01CalibratedSum(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    return MultiCurrencyScenarioArray.of(\n        marketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> pv01CalibratedSum(trade, marketData.scenario(i).creditRatesProvider(), refData));\n  }\n\n  // calculates calibrated sum PV01 for one scenario\n  MultiCurrencyAmount pv01CalibratedSum(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    PointSensitivities pointSensitivity = tradePricer.presentValueSensitivity(trade, ratesProvider, refData);\n    return ratesProvider.parameterSensitivity(pointSensitivity).total().multipliedBy(ONE_BASIS_POINT);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates calibrated bucketed PV01 for all scenarios\n  ScenarioArray<CurrencyParameterSensitivities> pv01CalibratedBucketed(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    return ScenarioArray.of(\n        marketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> pv01CalibratedBucketed(trade, marketData.scenario(i).creditRatesProvider(), refData));\n  }\n\n  // calculates calibrated bucketed PV01 for one scenario\n  CurrencyParameterSensitivities pv01CalibratedBucketed(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    PointSensitivities pointSensitivity = tradePricer.presentValueSensitivity(trade, ratesProvider, refData);\n    return ratesProvider.parameterSensitivity(pointSensitivity).multipliedBy(ONE_BASIS_POINT);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates market quote sum PV01 for all scenarios\n  MultiCurrencyScenarioArray pv01MarketQuoteSum(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    return MultiCurrencyScenarioArray.of(\n        marketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> pv01MarketQuoteSum(trade, marketData.scenario(i).creditRatesProvider(), refData));\n  }\n\n  // calculates market quote sum PV01 for one scenario\n  MultiCurrencyAmount pv01MarketQuoteSum(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    PointSensitivities pointSensitivity = tradePricer.presentValueSensitivity(trade, ratesProvider, refData);\n    CurrencyParameterSensitivities parameterSensitivity = ratesProvider.parameterSensitivity(pointSensitivity);\n    CurrencyParameterSensitivities quoteSensitivity = MARKET_QUOTE_SENS.sensitivity(parameterSensitivity, ratesProvider);\n    return quoteSensitivity.total().multipliedBy(ONE_BASIS_POINT);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates market quote bucketed PV01 for all scenarios\n  ScenarioArray<CurrencyParameterSensitivities> pv01MarketQuoteBucketed(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    return ScenarioArray.of(\n        marketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> pv01MarketQuoteBucketed(trade, marketData.scenario(i).creditRatesProvider(), refData));\n  }\n\n  // calculates market quote bucketed PV01 for one scenario\n  CurrencyParameterSensitivities pv01MarketQuoteBucketed(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    PointSensitivities pointSensitivity = tradePricer.presentValueSensitivity(trade, ratesProvider, refData);\n    CurrencyParameterSensitivities parameterSensitivity = ratesProvider.parameterSensitivity(pointSensitivity);\n    return MARKET_QUOTE_SENS.sensitivity(parameterSensitivity, ratesProvider).multipliedBy(ONE_BASIS_POINT);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates calibrated parallel IR01 for all scenarios\n  CurrencyScenarioArray ir01CalibratedParallel(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    return CurrencyScenarioArray.of(\n        marketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> ir01CalibratedParallel(trade, marketData.scenario(i).creditRatesProvider(), refData));\n  }\n\n  // calculates calibrated parallel IR01 for one scenario\n  CurrencyAmount ir01CalibratedParallel(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    PointSensitivities pointSensitivity = tradePricer.presentValueOnSettleSensitivity(trade, ratesProvider, refData);\n    CurrencyParameterSensitivity irSensitivity = ratesProvider.singleDiscountCurveParameterSensitivity(\n        pointSensitivity,\n        trade.getProduct().getCurrency());\n    return irSensitivity.total().multipliedBy(ONE_BASIS_POINT);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates calibrated bucketed IR01 for all scenarios\n  ScenarioArray<CurrencyParameterSensitivity> ir01CalibratedBucketed(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    return ScenarioArray.of(\n        marketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> ir01CalibratedBucketed(trade, marketData.scenario(i).creditRatesProvider(), refData));\n  }\n\n  // calculates calibrated bucketed IR01 for one scenario\n  CurrencyParameterSensitivity ir01CalibratedBucketed(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    PointSensitivities pointSensitivity = tradePricer.presentValueOnSettleSensitivity(trade, ratesProvider, refData);\n    CurrencyParameterSensitivity irSensitivity = ratesProvider.singleDiscountCurveParameterSensitivity(\n        pointSensitivity,\n        trade.getProduct().getCurrency());\n    return irSensitivity.multipliedBy(ONE_BASIS_POINT);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  // calculates expected loss for all scenarios\n  CurrencyScenarioArray expectedLoss(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    return CurrencyScenarioArray.of(\n        marketData.getScenarioCount(),\n        i -> expectedLoss(trade, marketData.scenario(i).creditRatesProvider()));\n  }\n\n  // calculates expected loss for one scenario\n  CurrencyAmount expectedLoss(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider) {\n\n    return tradePricer.expectedLoss(trade, ratesProvider);\n  }\n\n}\n",

  "security_risk": "LOW"

{
  "command": "create",
  "file_text": "/*\n * Copyright (C) 2017 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\n *\n * Please see distribution for license.\n */\npackage com.opengamma.strata.measure.credit;\n\nimport java.util.HashMap;\nimport java.util.Map;\nimport java.util.Optional;\nimport java.util.Set;\n\nimport com.google.common.collect.ImmutableMap;\nimport com.google.common.collect.ImmutableSet;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.StandardId;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Currency;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.calc.Measure;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.calc.runner.CalculationFunction;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.calc.runner.CalculationParameters;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.calc.runner.FunctionRequirements;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.result.FailureReason;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.collect.result.Result;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.data.scenario.ScenarioMarketData;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.measure.Measures;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.credit.CdsTranche;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.credit.CdsTrancheTrade;\nimport com.opengamma.strata.product.credit.ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade;\n\n/**\n * Perform calculations on a single {@code CdsTrancheTrade} for each of a set of scenarios.\n * <p>\n * An instance of {@link CreditRatesMarketDataLookup} must be specified.\n * The supported built-in measures are:\n * <ul>\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#PRESENT_VALUE Present value}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#PV01_CALIBRATED_SUM PV01 calibrated sum on rate curves}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#PV01_CALIBRATED_BUCKETED PV01 calibrated bucketed on rate curves}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#PV01_MARKET_QUOTE_SUM PV01 market quote sum on rate curves}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#PV01_MARKET_QUOTE_BUCKETED PV01 market quote bucketed on rate curves}\n *   <li>{@linkplain Measures#UNIT_PRICE Unit price}\n *   <li>{@linkplain CreditMeasures#PRINCIPAL principal}\n *   <li>{@linkplain CreditMeasures#IR01_CALIBRATED_PARALLEL IR01 calibrated parallel}\n *   <li>{@linkplain CreditMeasures#IR01_CALIBRATED_BUCKETED IR01 calibrated bucketed}\n *   <li>{@linkplain CreditMeasures#EXPECTED_LOSS expected loss}\n * </ul>\n * <p>\n * The \"natural\" currency is the currency of the CDS tranche, which is limited to be single-currency.\n */\npublic class CdsTrancheTradeCalculationFunction\n    implements CalculationFunction<CdsTrancheTrade> {\n\n  /**\n   * The calculations by measure.\n   */\n  private static final ImmutableMap<Measure, SingleMeasureCalculation> CALCULATORS =\n      ImmutableMap.<Measure, SingleMeasureCalculation>builder()\n          .put(Measures.PRESENT_VALUE, CdsTrancheMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::presentValue)\n          .put(Measures.PV01_CALIBRATED_SUM, CdsTrancheMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::pv01CalibratedSum)\n          .put(Measures.PV01_CALIBRATED_BUCKETED, CdsTrancheMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::pv01CalibratedBucketed)\n          .put(Measures.PV01_MARKET_QUOTE_SUM, CdsTrancheMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::pv01MarketQuoteSum)\n          .put(Measures.PV01_MARKET_QUOTE_BUCKETED, CdsTrancheMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::pv01MarketQuoteBucketed)\n          .put(Measures.UNIT_PRICE, CdsTrancheMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::unitPrice)\n          .put(CreditMeasures.PRINCIPAL, CdsTrancheMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::principal)\n          .put(CreditMeasures.IR01_CALIBRATED_PARALLEL, CdsTrancheMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::ir01CalibratedParallel)\n          .put(CreditMeasures.IR01_CALIBRATED_BUCKETED, CdsTrancheMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::ir01CalibratedBucketed)\n          .put(CreditMeasures.EXPECTED_LOSS, CdsTrancheMeasureCalculations.DEFAULT::expectedLoss)\n          .put(Measures.RESOLVED_TARGET, (rt, smd, rd) -> rt)\n          .build();\n\n  private static final ImmutableSet<Measure> MEASURES = CALCULATORS.keySet();\n\n  /**\n   * Creates an instance.\n   */\n  public CdsTrancheTradeCalculationFunction() {\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public Class<CdsTrancheTrade> targetType() {\n    return CdsTrancheTrade.class;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Set<Measure> supportedMeasures() {\n    return MEASURES;\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Optional<String> identifier(CdsTrancheTrade target) {\n    return target.getInfo().getId().map(id -> id.toString());\n  }\n\n  @Override\n  public Currency naturalCurrency(CdsTrancheTrade trade, ReferenceData refData) {\n    return trade.getProduct().getCurrency();\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public FunctionRequirements requirements(\n      CdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      Set<Measure> measures,\n      CalculationParameters parameters,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    // extract data from product\n    CdsTranche product = trade.getProduct();\n    StandardId legalEntityId = product.getCdsIndexId();\n    Currency currency = product.getCurrency();\n\n    // use lookup to build requirements\n    CreditRatesMarketDataLookup lookup = parameters.getParameter(CreditRatesMarketDataLookup.class);\n    return lookup.requirements(legalEntityId, currency);\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @Override\n  public Map<Measure, Result<?>> calculate(\n      CdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      Set<Measure> measures,\n      CalculationParameters parameters,\n      ScenarioMarketData scenarioMarketData,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    // resolve the trade once for all measures and all scenarios\n    ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade resolved = trade.resolve(refData);\n\n    // use lookup to query market data\n    CreditRatesMarketDataLookup ledLookup = parameters.getParameter(CreditRatesMarketDataLookup.class);\n    CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData = ledLookup.marketDataView(scenarioMarketData);\n\n    // loop around measures, calculating all scenarios for one measure\n    Map<Measure, Result<?>> results = new HashMap<>();\n    for (Measure measure : measures) {\n      results.put(measure, calculate(measure, resolved, marketData, refData));\n    }\n    return results;\n  }\n\n  // calculate one measure\n  private Result<?> calculate(\n      Measure measure,\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    SingleMeasureCalculation calculator = CALCULATORS.get(measure);\n    if (calculator == null) {\n      return Result.failure(FailureReason.UNSUPPORTED, \"Unsupported measure for CdsTrancheTrade: {}\", measure);\n    }\n    return Result.of(() -> calculator.calculate(trade, marketData, refData));\n  }\n\n  //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\n  @FunctionalInterface\n  interface SingleMeasureCalculation {\n    public abstract Object calculate(\n        ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n        CreditRatesScenarioMarketData marketData,\n        ReferenceData refData);\n  }\n\n}\n",
  "path": "/workspace/modules/measure/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/measure/credit/CdsTrancheTradeCalculationFunction.java",
  "security_risk": "LOW"
}

com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData;\\\\n11: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\\\\n12: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Payment;\\\\n13: import \\\\n19: /**\\\\n20:  * Pricer for CDS portfolio index trade based on ISDA standard model. \\\\n21:  * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n22:  * The underlying CDS index product is priced as a single name CDS using a single credit curve rather than \\\\n23:  * credit curves of constituent single names. \\\\n24:  */\\\\n25: public class IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexTradePricer {\\\\n26: \\\\n27:   /**\\\\n28:    * Default implementation.\\\\n29:    */\\\\n30:   public static final IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexTradePricer DEFAULT = new IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexTradePricer();\\\\n31: \\\\n32:   /**\\\\n33:    * The product pricer.\\\\n34:    */\\\\n35:   private final IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexProductPricer productPricer;\\\\n36:   /**\\\\n37:    * The upfront fee pricer.\\\\n38:    */\\\\n39:   private final DiscountingPaymentPricer upfrontPricer;\\\\n40: \\\\n41:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\n42:   /**\\\\n43:    * The default constructor.\\\\n44:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n45:    * The default pricers are used.\\\\n46:    */\\\\n47:   public IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexTradePricer() {\\\\n48:     this.productPricer = IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexProductPricer.DEFAULT;\\\\n49:     this.upfrontPricer = DiscountingPaymentPricer.DEFAULT;\\\\n50:   }\\\\n51: \\\\n52:   /**\\\\n53:    * The constructor with the accrual-on-default formula specified.\\\\n54:    * \\\\n55:    * @param formula  the accrual-on-default formula\\\\n56:    */\\\\n57:   public IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexTradePricer(AccrualOnDefaultFormula formula) {\\\\n58:     this.productPricer = new IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexProductPricer(formula);\\\\n59:     this.upfrontPricer = DiscountingPaymentPricer.DEFAULT;\\\\n60:   }\\\\n61: \\\\n62:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\n63:   /**\\\\n64:    * Gets the accrual-on-default formula used in this pricer. \\\\n65:    * \\\\n66:    * @return the formula\\\\n67:    */\\\\n68:   public AccrualOnDefaultFormula getAccrualOnDefaultFormula() {\\\\n69:     return productPricer.getAccrualOnDefaultFormula();\\\\n70:   }\\\\n71: \\\\n72:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\n73:   /**\\\\n74:    * Calculates the price of the underlying product, which is the present value per unit notional. \\\\n75:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n76:    * This method can calculate the clean or dirty price, see {@link PriceType}. \\\\n77:    * If calculating the clean price, the accrued interest is calculated based on the step-in date.\\\\n78:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n79:    * This is coherent to {@link #presentValueOnSettle(ResolvedCdsIndexTrade, CreditRatesProvider, PriceType, ReferenceData)}.\\\\n80:    * \\\\n81:    * @param trade  the trade\\\\n82:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\\\n83:    * @param priceType  the price type\\\\n84:    * @param refData  the reference data\\\\n85:    * @return the price\\\\n86:    */\\\\n87:   public double price(\\\\n88:       ResolvedCdsIndexTrade trade,\\\\n89:       CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\\\\n90:       PriceType priceType,\\\\n91:       ReferenceData refData) {\\\\n92: \\\\n93:     LocalDate settlementDate = calculateSettlementDate(trade, ratesProvider, refData);\\\\n94:     return productPricer.price(trade.getProduct(), ratesProvider, settlementDate, priceType, refData);\\\\n95:   }\\\\n96: \\\\n97:   /**\\\\n98:    * Calculates the price sensitivity of the underlying product. \\\\n99:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n100:    * The price sensitivity of the product is the sensitivity of price to the underlying curves.\\\\n101: \\\",\\\"url\\\":\\\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/Strata--66225ca9@9d9ab49ce264443ddb305a8b1df6f48d01a2c67c/-/blob/modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/credit/IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexTradePricer.java%3FL1-100\\\"}\", \"annotations\": null, \"meta\": null}], \"structuredContent\": {\"content\": \"1: /*\\n2:  * Copyright (C) 2016 - present by OpenGamma Inc. and the OpenGamma group of companies\\n3:  *\\n4:  * Please see distribution for license.\\n5:  */\\n6: package com.opengamma.strata.pricer.credit;\\n7: \\n8: import java.time.LocalDate;\\n9: \\n10: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.ReferenceData;\\n11: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.CurrencyAmount;\\n12: import com.opengamma.strata.basics.currency.Payment;\\n13: import com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivities;\\n14: import com.opengamma.strata.market.sensitivity.PointSensitivityBuilder;\\n15: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.DiscountingPaymentPricer;\\n16: import com.opengamma.strata.pricer.common.PriceType;\\n17: import com.opengamma.strata.product.credit.ResolvedCdsIndexTrade;\\n18: \\n19: /**\\n20:  * Pricer for CDS portfolio index trade based on ISDA standard model. \\n21:  * <p>\\n22:  * The underlying CDS index product is priced as a single name CDS using a single credit curve rather than \\n23:  * credit curves of constituent single names. \\n24:  */\\n25: public class IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexTradePricer {\\n26: \\n27:   /**\\n28:    * Default implementation.\\n29:    */\\n30:   public static final IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexTradePricer DEFAULT = new IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexTradePricer();\\n31: \\n32:   /**\\n33:    * The product pricer.\\n34:    */\\n35:   private final IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexProductPricer productPricer;\\n36:   /**\\n37:    * The upfront fee pricer.\\n38:    */\\n39:   private final DiscountingPaymentPricer upfrontPricer;\\n40: \\n41:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n42:   /**\\n43:    * The default constructor.\\n44:    * <p>\\n45:    * The default pricers are used.\\n46:    */\\n47:   public IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexTradePricer() {\\n48:     this.productPricer = IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexProductPricer.DEFAULT;\\n49:     this.upfrontPricer = DiscountingPaymentPricer.DEFAULT;\\n50:   }\\n51: \\n52:   /**\\n53:    * The constructor with the accrual-on-default formula specified.\\n54:    * \\n55:    * @param formula  the accrual-on-default formula\\n56:    */\\n57:   public IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexTradePricer(AccrualOnDefaultFormula formula) {\\n58:     this.productPricer = new IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexProductPricer(formula);\\n59:     this.upfrontPricer = DiscountingPaymentPricer.DEFAULT;\\n60:   }\\n61: \\n62:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n63:   /**\\n64:    * Gets the accrual-on-default formula used in this pricer. \\n65:    * \\n66:    * @return the formula\\n67:    */\\n68:   public AccrualOnDefaultFormula getAccrualOnDefaultFormula() {\\n69:     return productPricer.getAccrualOnDefaultFormula();\\n70:   }\\n71: \\n72:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n73:   /**\\n74:    * Calculates the price of the underlying product, which is the present value per unit notional. \\n75:    * <p>\\n76:    * This method can calculate the clean or dirty price, see {@link PriceType}. \\n77:    * If calculating the clean price, the accrued interest is calculated based on the step-in date.\\n78:    * <p>\\n79:    * This is coherent to {@link #presentValueOnSettle(ResolvedCdsIndexTrade, CreditRatesProvider, PriceType, ReferenceData)}.\\n80:    * \\n81:    * @param trade  the trade\\n82:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n83:    * @param priceType  the price type\\n84:    * @param refData  the reference data\\n85:    * @return the price\\n86:    */\\n87:   public double price(\\n88:       ResolvedCdsIndexTrade trade,\\n89:       CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\\n90:       PriceType priceType,\\n91:       ReferenceData refData) {\\n92: \\n93:     LocalDate settlementDate = calculateSettlementDate(trade, ratesProvider, refData);\\n94:     return productPricer.price(trade.getProduct(), ratesProvider, settlementDate, priceType, refData);\\n95:   }\\n96: \\n97:   /**\\n98:    * Calculates the price sensitivity of the underlying product. \\n99:    * <p>\\n100:    * The price sensitivity of the product is the sensitivity of price to the underlying curves.\\n101: \", \"url\": \"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/Strata--66225ca9@9d9ab49ce264443ddb305a8b1df6f48d01a2c67c/-/blob/modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/credit/IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexTradePricer.java%3FL1-100\"}, "{\"meta\": null, \"content\": [{\"type\": \"text\", \"text\": \"{\\\"content\\\":\\\"100:    * The price sensitivity of the product is the sensitivity of price to the underlying curves.\\\\n101:    * \\\\n102:    * @param trade  the trade\\\\n103:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\\\n104:    * @param refData  the reference data\\\\n105:    * @return the present value sensitivity\\\\n106:    */\\\\n107:   public PointSensitivities priceSensitivity(\\\\n108:       ResolvedCdsIndexTrade trade,\\\\n109:       CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\\\\n110:       ReferenceData refData) {\\\\n111: \\\\n112:     LocalDate settlementDate = calculateSettlementDate(trade, ratesProvider, refData);\\\\n113:     return productPricer.priceSensitivity(trade.getProduct(), ratesProvider, settlementDate, refData).build();\\\\n114:   }\\\\n115: \\\\n116:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\n117:   /**\\\\n118:    * Calculates the par spread of the underlying product.\\\\n119:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n120:    * The par spread is a coupon rate such that the clean price is 0. \\\\n121:    * The result is represented in decimal form. \\\\n122:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n123:    * This is coherent to {@link #price(ResolvedCdsIndexTrade, CreditRatesProvider, PriceType, ReferenceData)}.\\\\n124:    * \\\\n125:    * @param trade  the trade\\\\n126:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\\\n127:    * @param refData  the reference data\\\\n128:    * @return the par spread\\\\n129:    */\\\\n130:   public double parSpread(\\\\n131:       ResolvedCdsIndexTrade trade,\\\\n132:       CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\\\\n133:       ReferenceData refData) {\\\\n134: \\\\n135:     LocalDate settlementDate = calculateSettlementDate(trade, ratesProvider, refData);\\\\n136:     return productPricer.parSpread(trade.getProduct(), ratesProvider, settlementDate, refData);\\\\n137:   }\\\\n138: \\\\n139:   /**\\\\n140:    * Calculates the par spread sensitivity of the underling product.\\\\n141:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n142:    * The par spread sensitivity of the product is the sensitivity of par spread to the underlying curves.\\\\n143:    * \\\\n144:    * @param trade  the trade\\\\n145:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\\\n146:    * @param refData  the reference data\\\\n147:    * @return the present value sensitivity\\\\n148:    */\\\\n149:   public PointSensitivities parSpreadSensitivity(\\\\n150:       ResolvedCdsIndexTrade trade,\\\\n151:       CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\\\\n152:       ReferenceData refData) {\\\\n153: \\\\n154:     LocalDate settlementDate = calculateSettlementDate(trade, ratesProvider, refData);\\\\n155:     return productPricer.parSpreadSensitivity(trade.getProduct(), ratesProvider, settlementDate, refData).build();\\\\n156:   }\\\\n157: \\\\n158:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\n159:   /**\\\\n160:    * Calculates the present value of the trade.\\\\n161:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n162:    * The present value of the product is based on the valuation date.\\\\n163:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n164:    * This method can calculate the clean or dirty present value, see {@link PriceType}. \\\\n165:    * If calculating the clean value, the accrued interest is calculated based on the step-in date.\\\\n166:    * \\\\n167:    * @param trade  the trade\\\\n168:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\\\n169:    * @param priceType  the price type\\\\n170:    * @param refData  the reference data\\\\n171:    * @return the price\\\\n172:    */\\\\n173:   public CurrencyAmount presentValue(\\\\n174:       ResolvedCdsIndexTrade trade,\\\\n175:       CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\\\\n176:       PriceType priceType,\\\\n177:       ReferenceData refData) {\\\\n178: \\\\n179:     CurrencyAmount pvProduct = productPricer.presentValue(\\\\n180:         trade.getProduct(), ratesProvider, ratesProvider.getValuationDate(), priceType, refData);\\\\n181:     if (!trade.getUpfrontFee().isPresent()) {\\\\n182:       return pvProduct;\\\\n183:     }\\\\n184:     Payment upfront = trade.getUpfrontFee().get();\\\\n185:     CurrencyAmount pvUpfront =\\\\n186:         upfrontPricer.presentValue(upfront, ratesProvider.discountFactors(upfront.getCurrency()).toDiscountFactors());\\\\n187:     return pvProduct.plus(pvUpfront);\\\\n188:   }\\\\n189: \\\\n190:   /**\\\\n191:    * Calculates the present value sensitivity of the trade. \\\\n192:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n193:    * The present value sensitivity of the trade is the sensitivity of present value to the underlying curves.\\\\n194:    * \\\\n195:    * @param trade  the trade\\\\n196:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\\\n197:    * @param refData  the reference data\\\\n198:    * @return the present value sensitivity\\\\n199:    */\\\\n200:   public PointSensitivities presentValueSensitivity(\\\\n201:       ResolvedCdsIndexTrade trade,\\\\n202:       CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\\\\n203:       ReferenceData refData) {\\\\n204: \\\\n205:     PointSensitivityBuilder pvSensiProduct = productPricer.presentValueSensitivity(\\\\n206:         trade.getProduct(), ratesProvider, ratesProvider.getValuationDate(), refData);\\\\n207:     if (!trade.getUpfrontFee().isPresent()) {\\\\n208:       return pvSensiProduct.build();\\\\n209:     }\\\\n210:     Payment upfront = trade.getUpfrontFee().get();\\\\n211:     PointSensitivityBuilder pvUpfront = upfrontPricer.presentValueSensitivity(\\\\n212:         upfront, ratesProvider.discountFactors(upfront.getCurrency()).toDiscountFactors());\\\\n213:     return pvSensiProduct.combinedWith(pvUpfront).build();\\\\n214:   }\\\\n215: \\\\n216:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\n217:   /**\\\\n218:    * Calculates the present value of the underlying product. \\\\n219:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n220:    * The present value is computed based on the settlement date rather than the valuation date.\\\\n221:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n222:    * This method can calculate the clean or dirty present value, see {@link PriceType}. \\\\n223:    * If calculating the clean value, the accrued interest is calculated based on the step-in date.\\\\n224:    * \\\\n225:    * @param trade  the trade\\\\n226:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\\\n227:    * @param priceType  the price type\\\\n228:    * @param refData  the reference data\\\\n229:    * @return the price\\\\n230:    */\\\\n231:   public CurrencyAmount presentValueOnSettle(\\\\n232:       ResolvedCdsIndexTrade trade,\\\\n233:       CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\\\\n234:       PriceType priceType,\\\\n235:       ReferenceData refData) {\\\\n236: \\\\n237:     LocalDate settlementDate = calculateSettlementDate(trade, ratesProvider, refData);\\\\n238:     return productPricer.presentValue(trade.getProduct(), ratesProvider, settlementDate, priceType, refData);\\\\n239:   }\\\\n240: \\\\n241:   /**\\\\n242:    * Calculates the present value sensitivity of the underlying product. \\\\n243:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n244:    * The present value sensitivity of the product is the sensitivity of present value to the underlying curves.\\\\n245:    * The present value sensitivity is computed based on the settlement date rather than the valuation date.\\\\n246:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n247:    * This is coherent to {@link #presentValueOnSettle(ResolvedCdsIndexTrade, CreditRatesProvider, PriceType, ReferenceData)}.\\\\n248:    * \\\\n249:    * @param trade  the trade\\\\n250:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates \\n158:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\n159:   /**\\n160:    * Calculates the present value of the trade.\\n161:    * <p>\\n162:    * The present value of the product is based on the valuation date.\\n163:    * <p>\\n164:    * This method can calculate the clean or dirty present value, see {@link PriceType}. \\n165:    * If calculating the clean value, the accrued interest is calculated based on the step-in date.\\n166:    * \\n167:    * @param trade  the trade\\n168:    * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\\n169:    * @param priceType  the price type\\n170:    * @param refData  the reference data\\n171:    * @return the price\\n172:    */\\n173:   public CurrencyAmount presentValue(\\n174:       ResolvedCdsIndexTrade trade,\\n175: 39. think @ 2026-03-11T18:33:44.229085

Input

{
  "thought": "I see that in the `IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexTradePricer`, the upfront fee payment uses:\n```java\nupfrontPricer.presentValue(upfront, ratesProvider.discountFactors(upfront.getCurrency()).toDiscountFactors())\n```\n\nSo the `DiscountingPaymentPricer.presentValue` takes a `Payment` and `DiscountFactors` (via `.toDiscountFactors()`).\n\nIn my `IsdaCdsTranchePricer`, I used:\n```java\nupfrontPricer.presentValue(upfrontFee, ratesProvider.discountFactors(upfrontFee.getCurrency()))\n```\n\nThis is wrong - the `ratesProvider.discountFactors()` returns `CreditDiscountFactors`, not the base `DiscountFactors` interface. I need to call `.toDiscountFactors()` on it.\n\nLet me fix the `IsdaCdsTranchePricer.java`.\n\nAlso, I notice that in the presentValueSensitivity method in IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexTradePricer, the upfront fee sensitivity is computed as:\n```java\nupfrontPricer.presentValueSensitivity(upfront, ratesProvider.discountFactors(upfront.getCurrency()).toDiscountFactors())\n```\n\nSo I need to fix my pricer to use `.toDiscountFactors()`.\n\nAlso, looking at the `presentValue` in `IsdaHomogenousCdsIndexTradePricer`, it uses `ratesProvider.getValuationDate()` as the reference date, not the settlement date. Let me check if my approach is aligned.\n\nIn the CdsIndexTradePricer approach:\n- `presentValue` uses `ratesProvider.getValuationDate()` as reference date\n- `presentValueOnSettle` uses the settlement date \n\nMy approach passes `settlementDate` to `productPricer.presentValue` in both `presentValue` and `presentValueOnSettle`. Let me match the existing pattern more closely.\n\nActually looking more carefully at the index trade pricer, `presentValue` uses `ratesProvider.getValuationDate()` and `presentValueOnSettle` uses the settlement date. Let me update my `IsdaCdsTranchePricer` accordingly.\n"
}

{
  "command": "str_replace",
  "new_str": "  /**\n   * Calculates the present value of the tranche trade.\n   * <p>\n   * The present value of the product is based on the valuation date.\n   * If calculating the clean value, the accrued interest is based on the step-in date.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param priceType  the price type\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the present value\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValue(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      PriceType priceType,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    ResolvedCdsTranche tranche = trade.getProduct();\n    CurrencyAmount pvProduct = productPricer.presentValue(\n        tranche, ratesProvider, ratesProvider.getValuationDate(), priceType, refData);\n    if (trade.getUpfrontFee().isPresent()) {\n      Payment upfrontFee = trade.getUpfrontFee().get();\n      CurrencyAmount pvFee = upfrontPricer.presentValue(\n          upfrontFee, ratesProvider.discountFactors(upfrontFee.getCurrency()).toDiscountFactors());\n      return pvProduct.plus(pvFee);\n    }\n    return pvProduct;\n  }",
  "old_str": "  /**\n   * Calculates the present value of the tranche trade.\n   * <p>\n   * The present value of the product is based on the valuation date.\n   * If calculating the clean value, the accrued interest is based on the step-in date.\n   *\n   * @param trade  the trade\n   * @param ratesProvider  the rates provider\n   * @param priceType  the price type\n   * @param refData  the reference data\n   * @return the present value\n   */\n  public CurrencyAmount presentValue(\n      ResolvedCdsTrancheTrade trade,\n      CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n      PriceType priceType,\n      ReferenceData refData) {\n\n    ResolvedCdsTranche tranche = trade.getProduct();\n    LocalDate settlementDate = calculateSettlementDate(trade, ratesProvider, refData);\n    CurrencyAmount pvProduct = productPricer.presentValue(tranche, ratesProvider, settlementDate, priceType, refData);\n    if (trade.getUpfrontFee().isPresent()) {\n      Payment upfrontFee = trade.getUpfrontFee().get();\n      CurrencyAmount pvFee = upfrontPricer.presentValue(upfrontFee, ratesProvider.discountFactors(upfrontFee.getCurrency()));\n      return pvProduct.plus(pvFee);\n    }\n    return pvProduct;\n  }",
  "path": "/workspace/modules/pricer/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/pricer/credit/IsdaCdsTranchePricer.java",
  "security_risk": "LOW"
}

{
  "thought": "Wait, the `presentValueSensitivity` in `IsdaCdsProductPricer` already scales by notional and sign. Let me look at that again.\n\nFrom the code I read earlier:\n```java\npublic PointSensitivityBuilder presentValueSensitivity(\n    ResolvedCds cds,\n    CreditRatesProvider ratesProvider,\n    LocalDate referenceDate,\n    ReferenceData refData) {\n    ...\n    double signedNotional = cds.getBuySell().normalize(cds.getNotional());\n    PointSensitivityBuilder protectionLegSensi =\n        protectionLegSensitivity(...).multipliedBy(signedNotional);\n    PointSensitivityBuilder riskyAnnuitySensi = riskyAnnuitySensitivity(...)\n        .multipliedBy(-cds.getFixedRate() * signedNotional);\n    return protectionLegSensi.combinedWith(riskyAnnuitySensi);\n}\n```\n\nSo the `presentValueSensitivity` in `IsdaCdsProductPricer` already includes the `signedNotional` scaling. If I then do `trancheWidth * signedNotional / tranche.getNotional()`, that would double-count the notional.\n\nThe `toSingleNameCds()` method returns a `ResolvedCds` with the SAME notional and buySell. So the sensitivity is already scaled by `notional * buySell`.\n\nFor the tranche, I want `sensitivity_tranche = trancheWidth * sensitivity_index`.\n\nActually wait - the sensitivity from `underlyingPricer.presentValueSensitivity(cds, ...)` already includes `cds.getBuySell().normalize(cds.getNotional())`. So I just need to multiply by `trancheWidth` to get the tranche-specific sensitivity.\n\nBut wait - the `cds` from `toSingleNameCds()` has the same notional as the tranche. The `price` method for the tranche is:\n```\namount = signedNotional * trancheWidth * indexPrice\n```\n\nWhere `indexPrice` is a price per unit notional (not including the notional). And `presentValueSensitivity` includes `signedNotional`.\n\nSo:\n- `underlyingPricer.presentValueSensitivity(cds, ...)` = sensitivity of `signedNotional * indexPrice`\n- We want sensitivity of `signedNotional * trancheWidth * indexPrice`\n- So we multiply by `trancheWidth`\n\nThe correct scaling is just `trancheWidth`.\n\nBut I used `trancheWidth * signedNotional / tranche.getNotional()` which is wrong.\n\nLet me fix this. The base sensitivity already has the `signedNotional` built in. I just need to multiply by `trancheWidth`.\n\nActually wait, let me re-read the `presentValue` method more carefully:\n\n```java\ndouble indexPrice = underlyingPricer.price(cds, ratesProvider, referenceDate, priceType, refData);\ndouble trancheWidth = tranche.getTrancheWidth();\ndouble signedNotional = tranche.getBuySell().normalize(tranche.getNotional());\ndouble amount = signedNotional * trancheWidth * indexPrice;\n```\n\nAnd `price()` in `IsdaCdsProductPricer`:\n```java\npublic double price(...) {\n    ...\n    return protectionLeg - rpv01 * fractionalSpread;\n}\n```\n\nThis is PV per unit notional (doesn't include notional).\n\nSo `presentValue` = `signedNotional * trancheWidth * price`.\n\nAnd `presentValueSensitivity` from `IsdaCdsProductPricer`:\n```java\ndouble signedNotional = cds.getBuySell().normalize(cds.getNotional());\nPointSensitivityBuilder protectionLegSensi = \n    protectionLegSensitivity(...).multipliedBy(signedNotional);\nPointSensitivityBuilder riskyAnnuitySensi = riskyAnnuitySensitivity(...)\n    .multipliedBy(-cds.getFixedRate() * signedNotional);\n```\n\nThis is sensitivity of `signedNotional * price = signedNotional * (protectionLeg - rpv01 * fixedRate)`.\n\nFor the tranche, we want sensitivity of `signedNotional * trancheWidth * price`.\n\nSo we need to multiply by `trancheWidth`. But the `cds` has the SAME `signedNotional` as the tranche. So the result would be: `trancheWidth * sensitivity_of(signedNotional * price)`.\n\nTherefore, the correct multiplier is just `trancheWidth`. Not `trancheWidth * signedNotional / notional`.\n\nLet me fix this.\n"
}

ImmutableList\\\\u003cCreditCouponPaymentPeriod\\\\u003e paymentPeriods;\\\\n82:   /**\\\\n83:    * The protection end date.\\\\n84:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n85:    * This may be different from the accrual end date of the last payment period in {@code periodicPayments}.\\\\n86:    */\\\\n87:   @PropertyDefinition(validate = \\\\\\\"notNull\\\\\\\")\\\\n88:   private final LocalDate protectionEndDate;\\\\n89:   /**\\\\n90:    * The day count convention.\\\\n91:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n92:    * This is used to convert dates to a numerical value.\\\\n93:    */\\\\n94:   @PropertyDefinition(validate = \\\\\\\"notNull\\\\\\\")\\\\n95:   private final DayCount dayCount;\\\\n96:   /**\\\\n97:    * The payment on default.\\\\n98:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n99:    * Whether the accrued premium is paid in the event of a default.\\\\n100:    */\\\\n101:   @PropertyDefinition(validate = \\\\\\\"notNull\\\\\\\")\\\\n102:   private final PaymentOnDefault paymentOnDefault;\\\\n103:   /**\\\\n104:    * The protection start of the day.\\\\n105:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n106:    * When the protection starts on the start date.\\\\n107:    */\\\\n108:   @PropertyDefinition(validate = \\\\\\\"notNull\\\\\\\")\\\\n109:   private final ProtectionStartOfDay protectionStart;\\\\n110:   /**\\\\n111:    * The number of days between valuation date and step-in date.\\\\n112:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n113:    * The step-in date is also called protection effective date. \\\\n114:    * It is usually 1 calendar day for standardized CDS index contracts. \\\\n115:    */\\\\n116:   @PropertyDefinition(validate = \\\\\\\"notNull\\\\\\\")\\\\n117:   private final DaysAdjustment stepinDateOffset;\\\\n118:   /**\\\\n119:    * The number of days between valuation date and settlement date.\\\\n120:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n121:    * It is usually 3 business days for standardized CDS index contracts.\\\\n122:    */\\\\n123:   @PropertyDefinition(validate = \\\\\\\"notNull\\\\\\\")\\\\n124:   private final DaysAdjustment settlementDateOffset;\\\\n125: \\\\n126:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\n127:   /**\\\\n128:    * Obtains the accrual start date.\\\\n129:    * \\\\u003cp\\\\u003e\\\\n130:    * In general this is different from the protection start date. \\\\n131:    * Use {@code stepinDateOffset} to compute the protection start date.\\\\n132:    * \\\\n133:    * @return the accrual start date\\\\n134:    */\\\\n135:   public LocalDate getAccrualStartDate() {\\\\n136:     return paymentPeriods.get(0).getStartDate();\\\\n137:   }\\\\n138: \\\\n139:   /**\\\\n140:    * Obtains the accrual end date.\\\\n141:    * \\\\n142:    * @return the accrual end date\\\\n143:    */\\\\n144:   public LocalDate getAccrualEndDate() {\\\\n145:     return paymentPeriods.get(paymentPeriods.size() - 1).getEndDate();\\\\n146:   }\\\\n147: \\\\n148:   /**\\\\n149:    * Obtains the notional.\\\\n150:    * \\\\n151:    * @return the notional\\\\n152:    */\\\\n153:   public double getNotional() {\\\\n154:     return paymentPeriods.get(0).getNotional();\\\\n155:   }\\\\n156: \\\\n157:   /**\\\\n158:    * Obtains the currency.\\\\n159:    * \\\\n160:    * @return the currency\\\\n161:    */\\\\n162:   public Currency getCurrency() {\\\\n163:     return paymentPeriods.get(0).getCurrency();\\\\n164:   }\\\\n165: \\\\n166:   /**\\\\n167:    * Obtains the fixed coupon rate.\\\\n168:    * \\\\n169:    * @return the fixed rate\\\\n170:    */\\\\n171:   public double getFixedRate() {\\\\n172:     return paymentPeriods.get(0).getFixedRate();\\\\n173:   }\\\\n174: \\\\n175:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\n176:   /**\\\\n177:    * Obtains the effective start date from the step-in date. \\\\n178:    * \\\\n179:    * @param stepinDate  the step-in date\\\\n180:    * @return the effective start date\\\\n181:    */\\\\n182:   public LocalDate calculateEffectiveStartDate(LocalDate stepinDate) {\\\\n183:     LocalDate startDate = stepinDate.isAfter(getAccrualStartDate()) ? stepinDate : getAccrualStartDate();\\\\n184:     return protectionStart.isBeginning() ? startDate.minusDays(1) : startDate;\\\\n185:   }\\\\n186: \\\\n187:   /**\\\\n188:    * Calculates the settlement date from the valuation date.\\\\n189:    * \\\\n190:    * @param valuationDate  the valuation date\\\\n191:    * @param refData  the reference data to use\\\\n192:    * @return the settlement date\\\\n193:    */\\\\n194:   public LocalDate calculateSettlementDateFromValuation(LocalDate valuationDate, ReferenceData refData) {\\\\n195:     return settlementDateOffset.adjust(valuationDate, refData);\\\\n196:   }\\\\n197: \\\\n198:   //-------------------------------------------------------------------------\\\\n199:   /**\\\\n200:    * Finds the period that contains the specified date.\\\\n201: \\\",\\\"url\\\":\\\"https://sourcegraph.sourcegraph.com/github.com/sg-evals/Strata--66225ca9@9d9ab49ce264443ddb305a8b1df6f48d01a2c67c/-/blob/modules/product/src/main/java/com/opengamma/strata/product/credit/ResolvedCdsIndex.java%3FL80-200\\\"}\", property, not empty\n   364\t   */\n   365\t  public ImmutableList<CreditCouponPaymentPeriod> getPaymentPeriods() {\n   366\t    return paymentPeriods;\n   367\t  }\n   368\t\n   369\t  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n   370\t  /**\n   371\t   * Gets the protection end date.\n   372\t   * @return the value of the property, not null\n   373\t   */\n   374\t  public LocalDate getProtectionEndDate() {\n   375\t    return protectionEndDate;\n   376\t  }\n   377\t\n   378\t  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n   379\t  /**\n   380\t   * Gets the day count convention.\n   381\t   * @return the value of the property, not null\n   382\t   */\n   383\t  public DayCount getDayCount() {\n   384\t    return dayCount;\n   385\t  }\n   386\t\n   387\t  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n   388\t  /**\n   389\t   * Gets the payment on default.\n   390\t   * @return the value of the property, not null\n   391\t   */\n   392\t  public PaymentOnDefault getPaymentOnDefault() {\n   393\t    return paymentOnDefault;\n   394\t  }\n   395\t\n   396\t  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n   397\t  /**\n   398\t   * Gets the protection start of the day.\n   399\t   * @return the value of the property, not null\n   400\t   */\n   401\t  public ProtectionStartOfDay getProtectionStart() {\n   402\t    return protectionStart;\n   403\t  }\n   404\t\n   405\t  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n   406\t  /**\n   407\t   * Gets the number of days between valuation date and step-in date.\n   408\t   * @return the value of the property, not null\n   409\t   */\n   410\t  public DaysAdjustment getStepinDateOffset() {\n   411\t    return stepinDateOffset;\n   412\t  }\n   413\t\n   414\t  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n   415\t  /**\n   416\t   * Gets the number of days between valuation date and settlement date.\n   417\t   * @return the value of the property, not null\n   418\t   */\n   419\t  public DaysAdjustment getSettlementDateOffset() {\n   420\t    return settlementDateOffset;\n   421\t  }\n   422\t\n   423\t  //-----------------------------------------------------------------------\n   424\t  /**\n   425\t   * Returns a builder that allows this bean to be mutated.\n   426\t   * @return the mutable builder, not null\n   427\t   */\n   428\t  public Builder toBuilder() {\n   429\t    return new Builder(this);\n   430\t  }\n   431\t\n   432\t  @Override\n   433\t  public boolean equals(Object obj) {\n other.detachmentPoint) &&\n   444\t          JodaBeanUtils.equal(paymentPeriods, other.paymentPeriods) &&\n   445\t          JodaBeanUtils.equal(protectionEndDate, other.protectionEndDate) &&\n   446\t          JodaBeanUtils.equal(dayCount, other.dayCount) &&\n   447\t          JodaBeanUtils.equal(paymentOnDefault, other.paymentOnDefault) &&\n   448\t
